    7  *
    8  *  ls_sel_dtel-name = 'MFRPN'.
    9  *  ls_sel_dtel-kind = 'S'.
   10  *  ls_sel_dtel-datenelment = 'MFRPN'.
   11  *  APPEND ls_sel_dtel TO lt_sel_dtel.
   12  *
   13  *  CALL FUNCTION 'SELECTION_TEXTS_MODIFY_DTEL'

   17  *      sel_dtel                    = lt_sel_dtel

   19  *      program_not_found           = 1

  276  *
  277  * - table ORGAN is replaced by G_T_ORGAN
  278  *   - it is filled by the following ways :
  279  *     - at process time at selection screen if the
  280  *       user wants the selection via cc or plant
  281  *     - otherwise after the database selection of the stock
  282  *       tables
  283  *   - it contains less data fields
  284  *   - it contains all entries twice, for binary search
  285  *     with plant or valuation area
  286  *
  287  * - selection of databases MKPF and MSEG in one SELECT
  288  *   command with an inner JOIN
  289  *
  290  * - authority checks after the database selections
  291  *

  293  *   MSEG and MKPF in working table G_F_MSEG_LEAN instead of

  298  *   the processed fields deleting the '*' in the types-command

  312  ************************************************************************
  313  *     Anzeige der Materialbestände in einem Zeitintervall              *
  314  ************************************************************************
  315  *  Der Report gliedert sich im wesentlichen in folgende Verarbeitungs- *
  316  *  blöcke:                                                             *
  317  *  1) Definition des Einstiegsbildes und Vorbelegung einzelner         *
  318  *     Selektionsfelder, sowie Prüfung der eingegebenen Selektions-     *
  319  *     parameter und Berechtigungsprüfung                               *
  320  *  2) Lesen der aktuellen Bestandswerte                                *
  321  *  3) Lesen und Verarbeiten der Materialbelege                         *
  322  *  4) Berechnung der Bestandswerte zu den vorgegebenen Datümern        *
  323  *  5) Ausgabe der Bestände und Materialbelege                          *
  324  ************************************************************************
  325

  399    SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK database-selection
  400      WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  401  *  Text-001: Datenbankabgrenzungen
  402      SELECT-OPTIONS: matnr FOR mard-matnr MEMORY ID mat
  403                                           MATCHCODE OBJECT mat1.
  404
  405
  406      "{ Begin ENHO AD_MPN_PUR2_RM07MLBD IS-AD-MPN-MD AD_MPN }
  407      IF cl_immpn_cust=>check_mpn_active( ) = abap_true.
  408  * DI A&D MPN
  409        SELECT-OPTIONS:
  410                        mfrpn FOR mara-mfrpn MEMORY ID mpn
  411                                      MATCHCODE OBJECT htn.
  412      ENDIF.
  413      "{ End ENHO AD_MPN_PUR2_RM07MLBD IS-AD-MPN-MD AD_MPN }

 1261  * create the title line
 1262
 1263  * If no date is given at all, the range is set to the maximum
 1264  * extend (1.1.0000 - 31.12.9999).
 1265  * If only datum-low is set, it is interpreted as the day for
 1266  * which the analysis is wanted --> datum-high is filled up.
 1267    IF datum-low IS INITIAL.
 1268      datum-low = '00000101'.
 1269      IF datum-high IS INITIAL.
 1270        datum-high = '99991231'.
 1271      ENDIF.
 1272    ELSE.
 1273      IF datum-high IS INITIAL.
 1274        datum-high = datum-low.
 1275      ENDIF.
 1276    ENDIF.
 1277  *  Begin of changes of note 1117067                        "n1117067
 1278  *  MOVE: datum-low(4)    TO jahrlow,
 1279  *        datum-low+4(2)  TO monatlow,
 1280  *        datum-low+6(2)  TO taglow,
 1281  *        datum-high(4)   TO jahrhigh,
 1282  *        datum-high+4(2) TO monathigh,
 1283  *        datum-high+6(2) TO taghigh.
 1284  *  SET TITLEBAR 'MAN'
 1285  *  WITH taglow monatlow jahrlow taghigh monathigh jahrhigh.
 1286  * Conversion of the dates from the internal to the external view
 1287    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_DATE_TO_EXTERNAL'
 1288      EXPORTING
 1289        date_internal            = datum-low
 1290      IMPORTING
 1291        date_external            = d_from
 1292      EXCEPTIONS
 1293        date_internal_is_invalid = 1
 1294        OTHERS                   = 2.
 1295    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 1296      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
 1297              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
 1298    ENDIF.
 1299
 1300    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_DATE_TO_EXTERNAL'
 1301      EXPORTING
 1302        date_internal            = datum-high
 1303      IMPORTING
 1304        date_external            = d_to
 1305      EXCEPTIONS
 1306        date_internal_is_invalid = 1
 1307        OTHERS                   = 2.
 1308    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 1309      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
 1310              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
 1311    ENDIF.
 1312
 1313
 1314    SET TITLEBAR 'MAN'
 1315    WITH d_from d_to.
 1316  *  End of changes of note 1117067                          "n1117067

 2061  *    create_table_totals_hq
 2062  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2063
 2064  FORM create_table_totals_hq.
 2065
 2066  * create output table
 2067    LOOP AT bestand.
 2068  *   part 1 : create header table g_t_totals_header
 2069      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  bestand        TO  g_s_totals_header.
 2070      MOVE  sobkz                        TO  g_s_totals_header-sobkz.
 2071
 2072      PERFORM  f2100_mat_text  USING  bestand-matnr.
 2073      MOVE  g_s_makt-maktx     TO  g_s_totals_header-maktx.
 2074
 2075      IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 2076  *     mode : stocks or special stocks
 2077        PERFORM  f2200_read_t001 USING bestand-werks.
 2078
 2079        MOVE  t001w-name1      TO  g_s_totals_header-name1.
 2080      ELSE.
 2081  *     mode : valuated stocks
 2082        IF  curm = '3'.
 2083  *       valuation level is company code
 2084          SELECT SINGLE butxt  FROM t001
 2085                               INTO g_f_butxt
 2086          WHERE  bukrs = bestand-bwkey.
 2087
 2088          IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 2089            MOVE  g_f_butxt    TO  g_s_totals_header-name1.
 2090          ELSE.
 2091            CLEAR              g_s_totals_header-name1.
 2092          ENDIF.
 2093        ELSE.
 2094  *       valuation level is plant -> take the name of the plant
 2095          PERFORM  f2200_read_t001 USING bestand-werks.
 2096
 2097          MOVE  t001w-name1    TO  g_s_totals_header-name1.
 2098        ENDIF.
 2099      ENDIF.
 2100
 2101      APPEND  g_s_totals_header     TO  g_t_totals_header.
 2102
 2103  *   part 2 : create 4 lines in item table g_t_totals_item
 2104      CLEAR                         g_s_totals_item.

 2171  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2172  * create_table_totals_hq_1.
 2173  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2174
 2175  * colorize the numeric fields depending on the sign and append the
 2176  * entries into table G_T_TOTALS_ITEM
 2177
 2178  FORM create_table_totals_hq_1.
 2179
 2180    REFRESH                    g_t_color.
 2181    CLEAR                      g_s_color.
 2182
 2183  * colorize the quntities always
 2184    IF      g_s_totals_item-menge > 0.
 2185  *   positive value -> green
 2186      MOVE : 'MENGE'           TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2187             '5'               TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "green
 2188             '0'               TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2189      APPEND  g_s_color        TO  g_t_color.
 2190
 2191      MOVE : 'MEINS'           TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2192             '5'               TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "green
 2193             '0'               TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2194      APPEND  g_s_color        TO  g_t_color.
 2195
 2196    ELSEIF  g_s_totals_item-menge < 0.
 2197  *   negative value -> red
 2198      MOVE : 'MENGE'           TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2199             '6'               TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "red
 2200             '0'               TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2201      APPEND  g_s_color        TO  g_t_color.
 2202
 2203      MOVE : 'MEINS'           TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2204             '6'               TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "red
 2205             '0'               TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2206      APPEND  g_s_color        TO  g_t_color.
 2207    ENDIF.
 2208
 2209    IF  bwbst = 'X'.
 2210  *  colorize the values only in mode valuated stock
 2211      IF      g_s_totals_item-wert > 0.
 2212  *     positive value -> green
 2213        MOVE : 'WERT'          TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2214               '5'             TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "green
 2215               '0'             TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2216        APPEND  g_s_color      TO  g_t_color.
 2217
 2218        MOVE : 'WAERS'         TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     39
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2219               '5'             TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "green
 2220               '0'             TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2221        APPEND  g_s_color      TO  g_t_color.
 2222
 2223      ELSEIF  g_s_totals_item-wert < 0.
 2224  *     negative value -> red
 2225        MOVE : 'WERT'          TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2226               '6'             TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "red
 2227               '0'             TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2228        APPEND  g_s_color      TO  g_t_color.
 2229
 2230        MOVE : 'WAERS'         TO  g_s_color-fieldname,
 2231               '6'             TO  g_s_color-color-col,    "red
 2232               '0'             TO  g_s_color-color-int.
 2233        APPEND  g_s_color      TO  g_t_color.
 2234      ENDIF.
 2235    ENDIF.
 2236
 2237    IF  g_t_color[] IS INITIAL.
 2238      CLEAR :                  g_s_totals_item-color.
 2239    ELSE.
 2240  *   customizing : set the color information
 2241      IF  g_cust_color  = 'X'.
 2242        MOVE  g_t_color[]      TO  g_s_totals_item-color.
 2243      ENDIF.
 2244    ENDIF.
 2245
 2246    ADD   1                    TO  g_s_totals_item-counter.
 2247    APPEND  g_s_totals_item    TO  g_t_totals_item.
 2248    CLEAR :                    g_s_totals_item-stock_type.
 2249
 2250  ENDFORM.                     " create_table_totals_hq_1.

 2255
 2256  FORM create_table_for_detail.
 2257
 2258    STATICS : l_flag_sorted(01)     TYPE  c.
 2259    DATA    : l_tabix               LIKE  sy-tabix.
 2260
 2261    IF gv_newdb = abap_true.
 2262  *   read it134m from db in form kontiert_aussortieren      "1784986v2!
 2263      REFRESH g_t_mseg_lean.
 2264      REFRESH matnr.
 2265      matnr-sign = 'I'.
 2266      matnr-option = 'EQ'.
 2267      matnr-low = g_s_bestand_detail-matnr.
 2268      matnr-high = space.
 2269      APPEND matnr.
 2270      PERFORM f1000_select_mseg_mkpf.
 2271      PERFORM belege_sortieren.
 2272      PERFORM summen_bilden.                                  "1784986
 2273      SELECT matnr meins mtart FROM mara                      "1784986
 2274        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE imara              "1784986
 2275        WHERE  matnr  =  g_s_bestand_detail-matnr             "1784986
 2276      ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.                                   "1858578
 2277      PERFORM kontiert_aussortieren.                          "1784986
 2278      CLEAR l_flag_sorted.
 2279    ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     40
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2280
 2281  * sort table with the documents
 2282    IF  l_flag_sorted IS INITIAL.
 2283      SORT  g_t_mseg_lean
 2284        BY matnr werks charg budat mblnr zeile belnr.
 2285      MOVE  'X'                TO  l_flag_sorted.
 2286    ENDIF.
 2287
 2288    REFRESH                    g_t_belege1.
 2289
 2290  * find the first entry with this material number
 2291    READ TABLE g_t_mseg_lean   INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 2292      WITH KEY matnr = g_s_bestand_detail-matnr
 2293        BINARY SEARCH.
 2294
 2295    IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 2296      MOVE  sy-tabix           TO  l_tabix.
 2297
 2298      LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean   INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 2299                               FROM l_tabix.
 2300
 2301  *     leave this loop when the material number changes
 2302        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-matnr  NE  g_s_bestand_detail-matnr.
 2303          EXIT.
 2304        ENDIF.
 2305
 2306        IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 2307          CHECK : g_s_mseg_lean-werks = bestand-werks.        "n1390970
 2308          CHECK : xchar               IS INITIAL       OR
 2309                  g_s_mseg_lean-charg = bestand-charg.
 2310          MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean
 2311                               TO  g_t_belege1.
 2312

 2314          PERFORM  f9500_set_color_and_sign
 2315                         USING  g_t_belege1  'G_T_BELEGE1'.
 2316          APPEND                g_t_belege1.
 2317        ELSE.

 2330          APPEND               g_t_belege1.
 2331        ENDIF.
 2332      ENDLOOP.
 2333    ENDIF.

 2341  FORM create_table_totals_flat.
 2342
 2343  * create output table G-T-totals_flat
 2344    LOOP AT bestand.
 2345      REFRESH                  g_t_color.

 2355             datum-low         TO  g_s_totals_flat-start_date,
 2356             datum-high        TO  g_s_totals_flat-end_date.

 2359      PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING 'SOLL'.
 2360      PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING 'HABEN'.
 2361      PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING 'ENDMENGE'.

       RM07MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_12\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer=>ge

 2367        PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING '/CWM/SOLL'.
 2368        PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING '/CWM/HABEN'.
 2369        PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING '/CWM/ENDMENGE'.

 2378        PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING 'SOLLWERT'.
 2379        PERFORM  colorize_totals_flat   USING 'HABENWERT'.

 2381      ENDIF.

 3071  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3072
 3073
 3074  *  Aus dieser Unterroutine heraus werden implizit, d.h. in der Schleife
 3075  *  über alle selektierten Bestände, die zugehörigen Materialbelege
 3076  *  aufgerufen.
 3077  *  Die Bestände werden zum Anfangs- und Enddatum als Summen zu
 3078  *  folgendem Schlüssel, der im Listkopf geführt wird, ausgegeben:
 3079  *  Buchungskreis bzw. Werk, Material, Charge. Nicht-chargenpflichtige
 3080  *  Materialien werden auf Materialebene angezeigt.
 3081  *  Es folgt jeweils eine Liste mit den einzelnen Belegpositionen.
 3082
 3083  *********************** Ende HAUPTPROGRAMM *****************************
 3084  *
 3085  ************************* FORMROUTINEN *********************************
 3086
 3087  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3088  *&      Form  EINGABEN_PRUEFEN
 3089  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3090  *       Prüfung der Eingaben auf dem Selektionsbild                    *
 3091  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3092  FORM eingaben_pruefen.
 3093
 3094  * check the entries only in releases >= 46B
 3095    CALL FUNCTION 'MMIM_ENTRYCHECK_MAIN'
 3096      TABLES
 3097        it_matnr = matnr
 3098        it_werks = werks
 3099        it_lgort = lgort
 3100        it_bwart = bwart
 3101        it_bukrs = bukrs.
 3102
 3103  *  Die Selektionseingaben Buchungskreis und Werk werden hierarchisch
 3104  *  verstanden, d.h. es werden nur Werke innerhalb der angegebenen
 3105  *  Buchungskreise selektiert.
 3106  *  Lagerort-/Chargenbestand: Da die Werksbezeichnung eindeutig ist,
 3107  *  finden alle Selektionen auf Werksebene bzw. - falls mindestens ein
 3108  *  Lagerort eingegeben wurde - auf der Ebene der eingegebenen Lagerorte
 3109  *  statt. Die Ausgabe erfolgt auf Werksebene des Materials / der Charge.
 3110  *  Bewerteter Bestand: Die Ausgabe erfolgt auf Bewertungskreisebene,
 3111  *  d.h. je nach Einstellung in der Tabelle TCURM auf Werks- oder
 3112  *  Buchungskreisebene.
 3113
 3114  *  Feststellen, ob der Bewertungskreis auf Buchungskreis- oder
 3115  *  Werksebene liegt:
 3116  *  tcurm-bwkrs_cus = 1  =>  Bewertungskreis auf Werksebene,
 3117  *  tcurm-bwkrs_cus = 3  =>  Bewertungskreis auf Buchungskreisebene.
 3118    SELECT bwkrs_cus FROM tcurm INTO curm
 3119              ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.
 3120    ENDSELECT.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     54
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3121
 3122    IF xchar = ' ' AND NOT charg-low IS INITIAL.
 3123      xchar = 'X'.
 3124    ENDIF.
 3125    IF xchar = ' ' AND NOT xnomchb IS INITIAL.                "838360_v
 3126      xchar = 'X'.
 3127    ENDIF.                                                    "838360_^
 3128
 3129    IF sbbst = 'X' AND sobkz IS INITIAL.
 3130      MESSAGE e286.
 3131  *   Bitte ein Sonderbestandskennzeichen eingeben.
 3132    ELSEIF sbbst = ' ' AND NOT sobkz IS INITIAL.
 3133      CLEAR sobkz.
 3134      MESSAGE w287.
 3135  *   Sonderbestandskennzeichen wird zurückgesetzt.
 3136    ENDIF.
 3137
 3138  * reset the entries for plant when valuation area is        "n599218
 3139  * company code and mode is valuated stock                   "n599218
 3140    IF     curm  = '3'      AND                               "n599218
 3141           bwbst = 'X'.                                       "n599218
 3142      IF  NOT werks[]  IS INITIAL.                            "n599218
 3143  *     reset the restricts for plants                        "n599218
 3144        CLEAR                  werks.                         "n599218
 3145        REFRESH                werks.                         "n599218
 3146  *     text-074 : valuation area = company code              "n599218
 3147  *     text-075 : entries for plant will be reset            "n599218
 3148        MESSAGE w010(ad) WITH TEXT-074 TEXT-075 space space.  "n599218
 3149      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3150    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218
 3151
 3152    IF bwbst = 'X' AND NOT charg IS INITIAL
 3153      OR bwbst = 'X' AND NOT xchar IS INITIAL.
 3154      CLEAR charg. REFRESH charg.
 3155      MESSAGE w285.
 3156  *   Charge wird zurückgesetzt.
 3157    ENDIF.
 3158    IF bwbst = 'X' AND NOT lgort IS INITIAL.
 3159      CLEAR lgort. REFRESH lgort.
 3160      MESSAGE w284.
 3161  *   Lagerort wird zurückgesetzt.
 3162    ENDIF.
 3163
 3164  * consider and prepare select-options depending on the required
 3165  * special stock indicator
 3166    REFRESH                    g_ra_sobkz.
 3167    CLEAR                      g_ra_sobkz.
 3168
 3169    IF      lgbst = 'X'.       "only Storage loc./batch stock
 3170  *   create ranges table : select only sobkz = space
 3171      PERFORM f0500_append_ra_sobkz   USING  c_space.
 3172
 3173    ELSEIF  bwbst = 'X'.       "only valuated stocks
 3174  *   take all special stock indicators / the record selection
 3175  *   will be done after the database selection
 3176
 3177    ELSEIF  sbbst = 'X'.       "only special stocks
 3178      PERFORM f0500_append_ra_sobkz   USING  sobkz.
 3179
 3180  ENHANCEMENT-SECTION     rm07mlbd_02 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd.

21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     55
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3182  "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD001 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 3183  * DI A&D SSP
 3184  IF      sobkz  =  'O'  OR
 3185          sobkz  =  'V'  OR
 3186          sobkz  =  'W'  OR
 3187          sobkz  =  'E'  OR
 3188          sobkz  =  'K'  OR
 3189          sobkz  =  'M'  OR
 3190          sobkz  =  'Q'  OR
 3191          sobkz  =  'T'  OR

 3193          sobkz  =  'B' OR
 3194  * A&D IS-ADEC-SUB Sales Order Stock, Project Stock,       "v_n_GA1551829
 3195  * Customer Stock, Vendor Consignment or RTP Stock

 3544  *       Lesen der Tabellen zur Bewegungsart                            *

 3546
 3547  FORM  bewegungsarten_lesen.
 3548
 3549    DATA: BEGIN OF k2 OCCURS 0,
 3550            bwart LIKE t156s-bwart,
 3551          END OF k2.
 3552    REFRESH k2.
 3553
 3554  * select the movement types from the selected documents
 3555    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO  g_s_mseg_lean.
 3556      MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-bwart          TO  k2-bwart.
 3557      COLLECT                            k2.
 3558    ENDLOOP.
 3559
 3560  * Read data for movement type from new tables
 3561  * T156SY/C/Q with function module from release >=46B
 3562    DATA: t_st156s         LIKE st156s OCCURS 0
 3563    WITH HEADER LINE.
 3564
 3565    REFRESH it156.
 3566
 3567  * optimized movement type selection                           "v2724521
 3568    SELECT t156~bwart t156sy~wertu t156sy~mengu
 3569           t156sy~sobkz t156sy~kzbew t156sy~kzzug t156sy~kzvbr
 3570           t156sy~bustm t156sy~bustw t156q~bwagr
 3571       INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it156
 3572        FROM t156sy
 3573         JOIN t156
 3574          ON  t156~bustr  = t156sy~bustr
 3575         JOIN t156q
 3576          ON  t156q~bwart = t156~bwart
 3577          AND t156q~sobkz = t156sy~sobkz
 3578          AND t156q~kzbew = t156sy~kzbew
 3579          AND t156q~kzzug = t156sy~kzzug
 3580          AND t156q~kzvbr = t156sy~kzvbr
 3581         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN k2 WHERE t156~bwart = k2-bwart. "#EC CI_BUFFJO
       IN
 3582
 3583    SORT it156 BY bwart wertu mengu sobkz kzbew kzzug kzvbr.
 3584
 3585  * LBBSA is not used, skipped selection of T156M               "^2724521
 3586
 3587    DATA: rc TYPE i.                                          "147374
 3588    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO  g_s_mseg_lean.
 3589  *   find and delete reversal movements / only in releases >= 45B
 3590      IF NOT nosto IS INITIAL AND
 3591         NOT ( g_s_mseg_lean-smbln IS INITIAL OR
 3592               g_s_mseg_lean-smblp IS INITIAL ).
 3593        MOVE-CORRESPONDING  g_s_mseg_lean
 3594                               TO  storno.
 3595
 3596        APPEND storno.
 3597        DELETE                 g_t_mseg_lean.
 3598        CONTINUE.
 3599      ENDIF.
 3600
 3601      READ TABLE it156 WITH KEY bwart = g_s_mseg_lean-bwart
 3602                                wertu = g_s_mseg_lean-wertu
 3603                                mengu = g_s_mseg_lean-mengu
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     62
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3604                                sobkz = g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz
 3605                                kzbew = g_s_mseg_lean-kzbew
 3606                                kzzug = g_s_mseg_lean-kzzug
 3607                                kzvbr = g_s_mseg_lean-kzvbr

 3610      rc = sy-subrc.                                          "147374
 3611      IF  g_s_mseg_lean-bustm = space AND
 3612          g_s_mseg_lean-bustw = space AND
 3613          rc                  = 0.                            "147374
 3614        MOVE : it156-bustm     TO  g_s_mseg_lean-bustm,       "147374
 3615               it156-bustw     TO  g_s_mseg_lean-bustw.       "147374

 3623        ELSE.

 3628      ENDIF.                                                  "147374

 3635  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3636  *&      Form  SUMMEN_BILDEN
 3637  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3638  *       Bestandssummen zur Berechnung der Bestände                     *
 3639  *       zu 'datum-low' und 'datum-high'                                *
 3640  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3641  FORM summen_bilden.
 3642  * Some explanatory words on the strategy of material
 3643  * counting/valuation:
 3644  * ======================================================
 3645  * 1) Stock overview (no valuation):
 3646  *    The material document is accepted, if is has not been created
 3647  *    automatically or if it is not related to movements out of
 3648  *    the stock. For example, if a stock transfer is posted, the
 3649  *    system creates a material document with two lines: Out of
 3650  *    the old stock (accepted) and into the transfer stock (rejected,
 3651  *    because the material is not yet visible in the target location).
 3652  *    When the movement into the stock is posted, this is accepted.
 3653  * 2) Valuated stock:
 3654  *    a) Movements within a single plant (MA05, MA06 =
 3655  *       movement types 313-316) are ignored.
 3656  *    b) The moving of material out of a plant (303/304)
 3657  *       is counted and valuated in the emitting plant and
 3658  *       the target plant. The moving in
 3659  *       (305/306) is ignored, because
 3660  *       the valuated stock appears in the target at the
 3661  *       very moment of leaving the emitter.
 3662  *    c) Material documents without valuation string are ignored.
 3663  *------------- Summen von 'datum-high' bis Gegenwart ------------------*
 3664  * Performance Optimization:                                 "1784986
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     63
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3665  * Form is called from FORM create_table_for_detail!         "1784986
 3666    IF gv_newdb = abap_true.                                  "1784986
 3667      DELETE g_t_mseg_lean WHERE                              "1784986
 3668               ( xauto IS NOT INITIAL ) AND                   "1784986
 3669               ( bustm = 'MA02' OR                            "1784986
 3670                 bustm = 'MA05' OR                            "1784986

 4847
 4848  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4849  *    F0410_FIELDCAT
 4850  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4851
 4852  FORM f0410_fieldcat
 4853           USING  l_f_check
 4854                  l_f_no_out   TYPE      slis_fieldcat_main-no_out.
 4855
 4856    DATA : l_f_continue(01) TYPE c,
 4857           l_f_type(01)     TYPE c,
 4858           l_f_fieldname    TYPE      stype_fields.
 4859
 4860    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs>.
 4861
 4862    IF  l_f_check = c_take.
 4863  *   take this entry without check
 4864      MOVE  'X'                TO  l_f_continue.
 4865    ELSE.
 4866  *   create key and look for fieldname
 4867      CONCATENATE              g_s_fieldcat-ref_tabname
 4868                               '~'
 4869                               g_s_fieldcat-fieldname
 4870                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 4871
 4872      READ TABLE g_t_mseg_fields         INTO g_s_mseg_fields
 4873                               WITH KEY
 4874                               fieldname = l_f_fieldname
 4875                               BINARY SEARCH.
 4876
 4877      IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 4878        MOVE  'X'              TO  l_f_continue.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     83
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4879      ELSE.
 4880  *     additional fields are displayed in wrong format :     "n480130
 4881  *     clear the working area for the field catalog when     "n480130
 4882  *     the current field should not be processed             "n480130
 4883        CLEAR                  g_s_fieldcat.                  "n480130
 4884        CLEAR                  l_f_continue.
 4885      ENDIF.
 4886    ENDIF.
 4887
 4888  * append entry to field catalog if field is in structure
 4889  * else leave this routine
 4890    IF l_f_continue IS INITIAL.
 4891      CLEAR                    g_s_fieldcat.
 4892      EXIT.
 4893    ENDIF.
 4894
 4895    IF  NOT l_f_no_out IS INITIAL.
 4896      MOVE  l_f_no_out         TO  g_s_fieldcat-no_out.
 4897    ENDIF.
 4898
 4899    ADD  : 1                   TO  g_f_col_pos.
 4900    MOVE : g_f_col_pos         TO  g_s_fieldcat-col_pos,
 4901           g_f_tabname         TO  g_s_fieldcat-tabname.
 4902    APPEND g_s_fieldcat        TO  fieldcat.
 4903
 4904  * create the table with the fields who will be enriched with colors
 4905  * and sign
 4906    IF  g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'MENGE'  OR
 4907        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'MEINS'  OR
 4908        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'DMBTR'  OR
 4909        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'WAERS'  OR
 4910        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'ERFMG'  OR
 4911        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'ERFME'  OR
 4912
 4913        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'BPMNG'  OR
 4914        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'BPRME'  OR
 4915        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'BSTMG'  OR
 4916        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'BSTME'  OR
 4917        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'EXBWR'  OR
 4918        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'VKWRT'  OR
 4919
 4920        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'EXVKW'  OR
 4921        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'VKWRA'  OR
 4922        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'LSMNG'  OR
 4923        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'LSMEH'  OR
 4924        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  'SHKZG'.
 4925
 4926  *   look for the type of this field
 4927      CONCATENATE              g_s_fieldcat-ref_tabname
 4928                               '-'
 4929                               g_s_fieldcat-fieldname
 4930                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 4931
 4932      ASSIGN  (l_f_fieldname)  TO <l_fs>.
 4933
 4934      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 4935        DESCRIBE FIELD <l_fs>    TYPE  l_f_type.
 4936        MOVE : g_s_fieldcat-fieldname
 4937                               TO  g_t_color_fields-fieldname,
 4938             l_f_type          TO  g_t_color_fields-type.
 4939        APPEND                 g_t_color_fields.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     84
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4940      ENDIF.
 4941    ENDIF.
 4942    LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07
       MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_16\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer=>get_fi
       eld( ).
 4943  *
 4944    IF  g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  '/CWM/MENGE'  OR
 4945        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  '/CWM/MEINS'  OR
 4946        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  '/CWM/ERFMG'  OR
 4947        g_s_fieldcat-fieldname  =  '/CWM/ERFME'.
 4948  *   look for the type of this field
 4949      CONCATENATE              g_s_fieldcat-ref_tabname
 4950                               '-'
 4951                               g_s_fieldcat-fieldname
 4952                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 4953
 4954      ASSIGN  (l_f_fieldname)  TO <l_fs>.
 4955
 4956      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 4957        DESCRIBE FIELD <l_fs>    TYPE  l_f_type.
 4958        MOVE : g_s_fieldcat-fieldname
 4959                               TO  g_t_color_fields-fieldname,
 4960             l_f_type          TO  g_t_color_fields-type.
 4961        APPEND                 g_t_color_fields.
 4962      ENDIF.
 4963    ENDIF.
 4964
 4965    ENHANCEMENT-POINT ehp605_rm07mlbd_16 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 4966
 4967    CLEAR                      g_s_fieldcat.
 4968
 4969  ENDFORM.                     "F0410_FIELDCAT

 4980    DATA: lv_bsim_key(5) TYPE c.                              "2936002
 4981
 4982  * control break : process the entries from a group          "n443935

       eld( ).

 5372  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 5373  *&      Form  USER_COMMAND                                             *
 5374  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 5375
 5376  FORM user_command                                           "#EC CALLED
 5377                     USING     r_ucomm      LIKE  sy-ucomm
 5378                               rs_selfield  TYPE  slis_selfield.
 5379
 5380    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_s_sel,
 5381             mblnr LIKE  mseg-mblnr,
 5382             mjahr LIKE  mseg-mjahr,
 5383             zeile LIKE  mseg-zeile,
 5384             bukrs LIKE  mseg-bukrs,
 5385             belnr LIKE  mseg-belnr,
 5386             gjahr LIKE  mseg-gjahr,
 5387           END OF ty_s_sel,
 5388
 5389           ty_t_sel TYPE ty_s_sel OCCURS 0.
 5390
 5391    DATA: l_value(10) TYPE c,                                 "n1583816
 5392          ls_sel      TYPE ty_s_sel,
 5393          lt_sel      TYPE ty_t_sel,
 5394          l_lines     LIKE sy-tabix,
 5395          ls_fc       TYPE slis_fieldcat_alv,
 5396          lt_fc       TYPE slis_t_fieldcat_alv,
 5397          ls_selfield TYPE slis_selfield,
 5398          l_fi_doc    TYPE c  LENGTH 1.                       "n1511550
 5399
 5400  * Unfortunately the output list of this report consists
 5401  * of several ALVs, one started at the end-event of the other.
 5402  * This abstrucse programming style was chosen to create a list
 5403  * layout similar to the one in release 3.1. Now this causes a severe
 5404  * problem: When selecting a line, we do not know which ALV (and there-
 5405  * for which line in table IMSEG) has been selected. We can only use
 5406  * the value of the selected field to access the data-table.
 5407  * In case of ambiguities, a popup has to be transmitted where the
 5408  * user has to reselect the document he wants to see. This is
 5409  * difficult to understand, if you do not know the problems of
 5410  * programming ABAP.
 5411
 5412    CASE r_ucomm.
 5413      WHEN '9PBP'.
 5414  *     Get line of IMSEG which "look" like the one selected
 5415        l_value = rs_selfield-value.
 5416        CHECK NOT l_value IS INITIAL.                         "204872
 5417        CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'              "n1604106
 5418          EXPORTING                                              "n1604106
 5419            input  = l_value                                     "n1604106
 5420          IMPORTING                                              "n1604106
 5421            output = l_value.                                    "n1604106
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     92
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 5422        IF rs_selfield-sel_tab_field = 'G_T_BELEGE-MBLNR' OR
 5423           rs_selfield-sel_tab_field = 'G_T_BELEGE1-MBLNR'.
 5424          LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean          INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 5425                                         WHERE mblnr = l_value.
 5426            ls_sel-mblnr = g_s_mseg_lean-mblnr.
 5427            ls_sel-mjahr = g_s_mseg_lean-mjahr.
 5428            ls_sel-zeile = g_s_mseg_lean-zeile.
 5429            COLLECT ls_sel INTO lt_sel.
 5430          ENDLOOP.
 5431
 5432        ELSEIF rs_selfield-sel_tab_field = 'G_T_BELEGE-BELNR' OR
 5433               rs_selfield-sel_tab_field = 'G_T_BELEGE1-BELNR'.
 5434          l_fi_doc = 'X'.
 5435          LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean          INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 5436                                         WHERE belnr = l_value.
 5437            ls_sel-belnr = g_s_mseg_lean-belnr.
 5438            ls_sel-gjahr = g_s_mseg_lean-gjahr.
 5439            ls_sel-bukrs = g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs.
 5440            COLLECT ls_sel INTO lt_sel.
 5441          ENDLOOP.
 5442
 5443        ENDIF.
 5444        SORT lt_sel BY mjahr mblnr zeile bukrs belnr gjahr.
 5445  *     Read first line. If L_LINES = 1, LS_SEL is filled properly.
 5446        READ TABLE lt_sel INTO ls_sel INDEX 1.
 5447        DESCRIBE TABLE lt_sel LINES l_lines.
 5448  *     If no line found, the cursor was not on a useful value.
 5449        IF l_lines = 0.
 5450          MESSAGE s270.
 5451          EXIT.
 5452        ENDIF.
 5453  *     If more than one line found, it gets difficult. We send a popup
 5454  *     where the user may select a single line.
 5455        IF l_lines > 1.
 5456  *       Create fieldcatalog
 5457          DEFINE fc_add.
 5458            ls_fc-fieldname     = &1.
 5459            ls_fc-ref_tabname   = &2.
 5460            ls_fc-ref_fieldname = &3.
 5461            APPEND ls_fc TO lt_fc.
 5462          END-OF-DEFINITION.
 5463          CLEAR ls_sel.
 5464          IF l_fi_doc IS INITIAL.
 5465            fc_add 'MBLNR' 'MKPF' 'MBLNR'.
 5466            fc_add 'MJAHR' 'MKPF' 'MJAHR'.
 5467            fc_add 'ZEILE' 'MSEG' 'ZEILE'.
 5468          ELSE.
 5469            fc_add 'BUKRS' 'BKPF' 'BUKRS'.
 5470            fc_add 'BELNR' 'BKPF' 'BELNR'.
 5471            fc_add 'GJAHR' 'BKPF' 'GJAHR'.
 5472          ENDIF.
 5473
 5474          CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_POPUP_TO_SELECT'
 5475            EXPORTING
 5476              i_zebra     = 'X'
 5477              i_tabname   = 'LT_SEL'
 5478              it_fieldcat = lt_fc
 5479            IMPORTING
 5480              es_selfield = ls_selfield
 5481            TABLES
 5482              t_outtab    = lt_sel.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     93
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 5483  *       Read table with the unique index.
 5484          READ TABLE lt_sel INTO ls_sel INDEX ls_selfield-tabindex.
 5485          IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 5486            EXIT.
 5487          ENDIF.
 5488        ENDIF.
 5489
 5490  *     read and save the user parameters before calling
 5491  *     transaction MIGO or FB03
 5492        PERFORM                user_parameters_save.
 5493
 5494  *     Now call the corresponding application. LS_SEL is always filled
 5495  *     correctly.
 5496        IF l_fi_doc IS INITIAL.
 5497
 5498  *     call the display transcation MIGO for the MM document "TEST
 5499          CALL FUNCTION 'MIGO_DIALOG'                       "n547170
 5500            EXPORTING                                       "n547170
 5501              i_action            = 'A04'                   "n547170
 5502              i_refdoc            = 'R02'                   "n547170
 5503              i_notree            = 'X'                     "n547170
 5504              i_no_auth_check     = ' '                     "n547170
 5505              i_deadend           = 'X'                     "n547170
 5506              i_skip_first_screen = 'X'                     "n547170
 5507              i_okcode            = 'OK_GO'                 "n547170
 5508              i_mblnr             = ls_sel-mblnr            "n547170
 5509              i_mjahr             = ls_sel-mjahr            "n547170
 5510              i_zeile             = ls_sel-zeile.           "n547170
 5511        ELSE.
 5512          SET PARAMETER ID 'BLN' FIELD ls_sel-belnr.
 5513          SET PARAMETER ID 'BUK' FIELD ls_sel-bukrs.
 5514          SET PARAMETER ID 'GJR' FIELD ls_sel-gjahr.
 5515          CALL TRANSACTION 'FB03'               "#EC CI_CALLTA  "n1511550
 5516                               AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.         "n1511550
 5517        ENDIF.
 5518
 5519  *     restore the former user parameters
 5520        PERFORM                user_parameters_restore.
 5521
 5522    ENDCASE.
 5523
 5524  ENDFORM.                               " USER_COMMAND

 5740  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 5741  *  calculate_offsets.
 5742  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 5743
 5744  * calculate the offsets for the list header
 5745
 5746  FORM calculate_offsets.
 5747
 5748  *  working area
 5749    DATA : l_text(132)         TYPE c.
 5750
 5751  * get the maximal length of the text elements to be used
 5752    PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  TEXT-020.
 5753    PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  TEXT-021.
 5754    PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  TEXT-022.
 5755    PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  TEXT-023.
 5756    PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  TEXT-025.
 5757
 5758    g_offset_header            =  g_f_length_max + 3.
 5759
 5760    CLEAR                      g_f_length_max.
 5761
 5762    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 5763  *     stocks and quantities only
 5764      MOVE   TEXT-007          TO  g_date_line_from-text.
 5765      WRITE : datum-low        TO  g_date_line_from-datum DD/MM/YYYY.
 5766      CONDENSE                 g_date_line_from.
 5767      PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  g_date_line_from.
 5768
 5769      MOVE  TEXT-005           TO  g_text_line-text.
 5770      PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  g_text_line.
 5771
 5772      MOVE  TEXT-006           TO  g_text_line.
 5773      PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  g_text_line.
 5774
 5775      MOVE   TEXT-007          TO  g_date_line_to-text.
 5776      WRITE : datum-high       TO  g_date_line_to-datum DD/MM/YYYY.
 5777      CONDENSE                 g_date_line_to.
 5778    ELSE.
 5779  *     stocks, quantities, and values
 5780      MOVE   TEXT-008          TO  g_date_line_from-text.
 5781      WRITE : datum-low        TO  g_date_line_from-datum DD/MM/YYYY.
 5782      CONDENSE                 g_date_line_from.
 5783
 5784  *     the start and end dates were shown incorrectly in the "n856424
 5785  *     headlines in the mode valuated stock                  "n856424
 5786      PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  g_date_line_from.   "n856424
 5787
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page     98
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 5788      MOVE  TEXT-030           TO  g_text_line-text.
 5789      PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  g_text_line.
 5790
 5791      MOVE  TEXT-031           TO  g_text_line-text.
 5792      PERFORM  get_max_text_length USING  g_text_line.
 5793
 5794      MOVE   TEXT-008          TO  g_date_line_to-text.
 5795      WRITE : datum-high       TO  g_date_line_to-datum DD/MM/YYYY.
 5796      CONDENSE                 g_date_line_to.
 5797    ENDIF.
 5798
 5799  * calculate the offsets for the following columns
 5800    g_offset_qty               =  g_f_length_max +  2.
 5801    g_offset_unit              =  g_offset_qty   + 25.
 5802    g_offset_value             =  g_offset_unit  +  8.
 5803    g_offset_curr              =  g_offset_value + 25.
 5804    LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07
       MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_19\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer=>get_fi
       eld( ).
 5805  * Offset for quantities in PUM
 5806    gv_/cwm/offset_qty          =  g_offset_unit       +  8.
 5807    gv_/cwm/offset_unit         =  gv_/cwm/offset_qty  + 25.
 5808
 5809    ENHANCEMENT-POINT ehp605_rm07mlbd_19 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 5810
 5811  ENDFORM.                     " calculate_offsets.

 5813  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 5814  *    get_max_text_length
 5815  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 5816
 5817  FORM get_max_text_length         USING l_text TYPE any.
 5818
 5819    g_f_length = strlen( l_text ).
 5820
 5821    IF  g_f_length > g_f_length_max.
 5822      MOVE  g_f_length         TO  g_f_length_max.
 5823    ENDIF.
 5824
 5825  ENDFORM.                     " get_max_text_length

 5884  *&      Form  NEW_DB_RUN

 5887  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*

 5891  FORM new_db_run .
 5892
 5893    REFRESH datum.  "delete existing entries because ...
 5894    APPEND datum.   ".. relevant data is appended here
 5895    TRY.
 5896        CALL BADI gr_badi_rm07mlbd_dbsys_opt->calculate_stocks
 5897          EXPORTING
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Program RM07MLBD                              Page    100
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 5898            it_material          = matnr[]
 5899            it_company_code      = bukrs[]
 5900            it_plant             = g_ra_werks[]                 "2053423
 5901            it_storage_location  = lgort[]
 5902            it_batch             = charg[]
 5903            it_valuation_type    = bwtar[]
 5904            it_movement_type     = bwart[]
 5905            it_posting_date      = datum[]
 5906            iv_special_stock_ind = sobkz
 5907            iv_batch_stock       = lgbst
 5908            iv_valuated_stock    = bwbst
 5909            iv_special_stock     = sbbst
 5910            iv_batch_mat_only    = xchar
 5911            iv_batch_no_mchb     = xnomchb
 5912            iv_no_reversals      = nosto
 5913          IMPORTING
 5914            et_stock_inventory   = gt_stock_inventory
 5915            ev_no_dbsys_opt      = gv_no_dbsys_opt.
 5916      CATCH cx_badi.
 5917        IF p_aut EQ space.
 5918  * Code injection for ABAP UNIT TEST
 5919  * see local class of CL_IM_RM07MLBD_DBSYS_OPT
 5920  * The Unittest shall result in an error in case of error in BADI
 5921          gv_newdb = abap_false.
 5922        ENDIF.
 5923    ENDTRY.
 5924    IF gv_no_dbsys_opt = abap_true.
 5925      IF p_aut EQ space.
 5926  * Code injection for ABAP UNIT TEST
 5927  * see local class of CL_IM_RM07MLBD_DBSYS_OPT
 5928  * The Unittest shall result in an error in case of error in BADI
 5929        gv_newdb = abap_false.
 5930      ENDIF.
 5931    ELSE.
 5932      LOOP AT gt_stock_inventory ASSIGNING <gs_stock_inventory>.
 5933        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <gs_stock_inventory> TO bestand.
 5934        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <gs_stock_inventory> TO g_s_makt.
 5935        APPEND bestand.
 5936        APPEND g_s_makt TO g_t_makt.
 5937        CLEAR <gs_stock_inventory>-maktx. "to compare it to bestand in AUT
 5938      ENDLOOP.
 5939  * if result is empty, call subroutines to get the detailed error message
       s "1784986
 5940      IF gv_newdb = abap_true AND sy-subrc NE 0.              "1784986
 5941        gv_newdb = abap_false.                                "1784986
 5942        PERFORM aktuelle_bestaende.                           "1784986
 5943        PERFORM f1000_select_mseg_mkpf.                       "1784986
 5944        gv_newdb = abap_true.                                 "1784986
 5945      ENDIF.                                                  "1784986
 5946      SORT g_t_makt BY matnr.
 5947      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_makt.
 5948    ENDIF.
 5949
 5950  ENDFORM.                    " new_db_run             "^ hana_20120802

   23  * RM07MLBD ( transaction MB5B )
   24

   26  * RM07MLBD

   28  * hidden fields delete the '*' in the type definition.
   29  *
   30  * There are only fields from database table MSEG possible
   31  * Please use only the following fields, because these fields
   32  * are considered during the creation of the field catalog;
   33  * plaese consider, that each active field will cost performance

   53  FORM initialisierung.
   54
   55    repid = sy-repid.

   57    CLEAR variante.
   58    variante-report = repid.
   59  * Default-Variante holen:
   60    def_variante = variante.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    134
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

   62    CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_VARIANT_DEFAULT_GET'
   63      EXPORTING
   64        i_save     = variant_save
   65      CHANGING
   66        cs_variant = def_variante
   67      EXCEPTIONS
   68        not_found  = 2.
   69    IF sy-subrc = 0.
   70  *   save the initial, e.g. default variant                  "n599218
   71      MOVE  def_variante-variant  TO  alv_default_variant.    "n599218

   77  * access depending on the database system                   "n921165
   78    MOVE  sy-dbsys+0(03)       TO  g_f_database.              "n921165
   79                                                              "n921165
   80    BREAK-POINT                ID mmim_rep_mb5b.              "n921164
   81  * dynamic break-point : check installed database system     "n921165
   82                                                              "n921165
   83    IF  g_f_database = 'INF'   OR                             "n921165
   84        g_f_database = 'DB6'   OR                             "n921165
   85        g_f_database = 'MSS'   OR   " consider MSSQL, too     "n921165
   86        g_f_database = 'ADA'.                                 "n921165
   87  *   show the 3 parameters                                   "n921165
   88      MOVE : 'X'               TO  g_flag_db_parameters.      "n921165
   89    ELSE.                                                     "n921165
   90  *   ORACLE and DB2 work hist histograms                     "n921165
   91  *   do not show the 3 parameters on the selection screen    "n921165
   92      CLEAR                    g_flag_db_parameters.          "n921165
   93  *   set hidden parameters                                   "n921165
   94      MOVE  'X'                TO  pa_dbstd.                  "n921165
   95      CLEAR :                  pa_dbmat, pa_dbdat.            "n921165
   96    ENDIF.                                                    "n921165

  100        e_conversion_done = g_f_msegex_act.             "n1558298

  104  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

  107  *      Ermittlung der aktuellen eigenen Bestände,

       ks

       e)

  166        SELECT DISTINCT werks FROM mcha INTO TABLE lt_plant CONNECTION (db
       con)
  167                                                   WHERE werks IN g_ra_wer
       ks
  168                                                   AND NOT (gv_where_claus
       e)
  169                                                   AND matnr IN matnr

  170                                                   AND charg IN charg.
  171      ELSEIF sbbst = 'X'.
  172        CASE    sobkz.
  173          WHEN  'O'.
  174            PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSLB' ''.
  175  *         MMACCESS_2015W2_ADJUSTED
  176            SELECT DISTINCT werks FROM v_mslb_md INTO TABLE lt_plant CONNE
       CTION (dbcon) "sLog
  177                                                       WHERE werks IN g_ra
       _werks
  178                                                       AND NOT (gv_where_c
       lause)
  179                                                       AND matnr IN matnr
  180                                                       AND charg IN charg
  181                                                       AND sobkz = sobkz.

  183            PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSKU' ''.

       CTION (dbcon) "sLog
  186                                                       WHERE werks IN g_ra
       _werks

       lause)

       _werks

       CTION (dbcon) "sLog
  205                                                       WHERE werks IN g_ra
       _werks
  206                                                       AND NOT (gv_where_c
       lause)
  207                                                       AND lgort IN g_ra_l

  209                                                       AND charg IN charg

  211          WHEN  'E' OR 'T'.

       CTION (dbcon) "sLog
  215                                                       WHERE werks IN g_ra

       _werks
  216                                                       AND NOT (gv_where_c
       lause) "n_1899544
  217                                                       AND lgort IN g_ra_l
       gort
  218                                                       AND matnr IN matnr
  219                                                       AND charg IN charg
  220                                                       AND sobkz = sobkz.
  221          WHEN  OTHERS.
  222        ENDCASE.
  223      ENDIF.
  224      LOOP AT lt_plant ASSIGNING <lv_plant>.
  225        PERFORM f9000_auth_plant_check USING <lv_plant>.
  226      ENDLOOP.
  227    ENDIF.
  228  * End of correction 1916359
  229
  230    IF      bwbst = 'X'.
  231  *   select the valuated stocks
  232      PERFORM                  aktuelle_bst_bwbst.

  242    ELSEIF   sbbst = 'X'.
  243  *    special stocks
  244  ENHANCEMENT-SECTION     aktuelle_bestaende_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd.

  246  "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_01 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
  247  * DI A&D SSP
  248  CASE    sobkz.
  249    WHEN  'O'.
  250      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_o.
  251    WHEN  'V' OR  'W'.
  252      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_v_w.
  253    WHEN  'K' OR  'M'.
  254      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_k_m.
  255    WHEN  'Q'.
  256      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_q.
  257    WHEN  'E'.
  258      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_e.
  259  ** DI IS-ADEC-SSP Customer Stock
  260    WHEN  'B'.
  261      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_b.
  262  ** A&D IS-ADEC-SUB Customer Stock with Vendor               "v_GA1551829
  263    WHEN  cl_adsub_constants=>c.
  264      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_c.
  265  ** A&D IS-ADEC-SUB Sales Order Stock with Vendor
  266    WHEN  cl_adsub_constants=>f.
  267      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_f.
  268  ** A&D IS-ADEC-SUB Project Stock with Vendor
  269    WHEN  cl_adsub_constants=>r.
  270      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_r.
  271  ** A&D IS-ADEC-SUB Vendor Consignment / RTP Stock with Vendor

  273      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_i_j.       "^_GA1551829
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    138
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  274    WHEN  cl_adsub_constants=>t.                            "SIT SPAU
  275      PERFORM              aktuelle_bst_sbbst_t.            "SIT SPAU
  276    WHEN  OTHERS.
  277  *       Angegebener Sonderbestand nicht vorhanden.
  278      MESSAGE s290.
  279      PERFORM              anforderungsbild.
  280  ENDCASE.
  281  "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_01 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
  282
  283  END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.
  284    ENDIF.

  480  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*

  482  FORM aktuelle_bst_sbbst_o.
  483
  484  * process Special Stocks with Vendor
  485  * Bemerkung: Im Gegensatz zu den anderen Sonderbeständen existieren
  486  *            der Lohnbearbeitungs- und Kundenkonsignationsbestand
  487  *            nur auf Werksebene.
  488    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSLB' ''.                  "n1710850
  489    IF gv_not_authorized = abap_false.                        "n_1899544
  490      SELECT * FROM mslb INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE xmslb CONNECTI
       ON (dbcon) "n1710850
  491                                 WHERE  werks  IN  g_ra_werks
  492                                   AND  (gv_where_clause)     "n_1899544
  493                                 AND  matnr  IN  matnr
  494                                 AND  charg  IN  charg
  495                                 AND  sobkz  =   'O'.
  496    ELSE.                                                     "n_1899544
  497      sy-subrc = 4.                                           "n_1899544
  498    ENDIF.                                                    "n_1899544
  499
  500    IF sy-subrc <> 0.                     "no records found ?
  501      MESSAGE s289.
  502  *    Kein Material in Selektion vorhanden.
  503      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
  504    ENDIF.
  505
  506  * process the found records special stock vendor
  507    LOOP AT xmslb.                                            "v2195175
  508  *   check the authority
  509      PERFORM  f9000_auth_plant_check
  510                               USING      xmslb-werks.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    142
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  511
  512      IF  g_flag_authority IS INITIAL.
  513        DELETE                 xmslb.
  514      ELSE.
  515  *     fill range table g_0000_ra_werks if it is still empty
  516        PERFORM  f9200_collect_plant     USING  xmslb-werks.
  517
  518        PERFORM  f9400_material_key      USING  xmslb-matnr.
  519      ENDIF.
  520    ENDLOOP.                                                  "^2195175
  521
  522  * error, if no records are left
  523    DESCRIBE TABLE xmslb       LINES g_f_cnt_lines.
  524    IF  g_f_cnt_lines IS INITIAL.
  525      MESSAGE s289.
  526  *   Kein Material in Selektion vorhanden.
  527      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
  528    ENDIF.
  529
  530    SORT xmslb.
  531    LOOP AT xmslb.
  532      MOVE-CORRESPONDING xmslb TO imslb.
  533      COLLECT imslb.
  534    ENDLOOP.
  535    FREE xmslb. REFRESH xmslb.
  536
  537    IF xchar = ' '.
  538      LOOP AT imslb.
  539        MOVE-CORRESPONDING imslb TO imslbx.
  540        COLLECT imslbx.
  541      ENDLOOP.
  542      SORT imslbx.
  543    ELSEIF xchar = 'X'.
  544      LOOP AT imslb.
  545        CHECK imslb-charg IS INITIAL.
  546        DELETE imslb.
  547      ENDLOOP.
  548    ENDIF.
  549
  550  ENDFORM.                     "aktuelle_bst_sbbst_o.

 1128  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1129  *&      Form  BELEGE_SORTIEREN
 1130  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1131  *    Die Materialbelege werden anhand des Buchungsdatums sortiert.
 1132  *    Die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum zwischen 'datum-high'
 1133  *    und dem aktuellen Datum werden in der internen Tabelle IMSWEG
 1134  *    gesammelt, während die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum
 1135  *    zwischen 'datum-low' und 'datum-high' in der internen Tabelle
 1136  *    IMSEG verbleiben.
 1137  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1138
 1139  FORM belege_sortieren.
 1140
 1141    DATA: lv_zaehler TYPE i,
 1142          lv_limit TYPE limit_records.
 1143
 1144    aktdat = sy-datlo + 365.                                  "1227437
 1145    IF NOT ( datum-high IS INITIAL OR datum-high > aktdat ).
 1146  * Get record limit for table  to avoid memory overflow
 1147      SELECT SINGLE limit INTO lv_limit
 1148        FROM mmim_rep_ln_lim
 1149        WHERE report = 'RM07MLBD'
 1150          AND tabname = 'MSEG_LEAN'.
 1151
 1152      CLEAR lv_zaehler.
 1153      LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean    INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1154                               WHERE budat > datum-high.
 1155        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean TO imsweg.
 1156        IF lv_limit > 0.
 1157  * Check entries before the memory for internal table is to small
 1158          ADD 1 TO lv_zaehler.
 1159          IF lv_zaehler > lv_limit.
 1160            MESSAGE i555(m7).
 1161  * Too many records selected. Not enough memory. Restrict your selection
 1162            SUBMIT rm07mlbd VIA SELECTION-SCREEN .
 1163          ENDIF.
 1164        ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    153
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1165        APPEND imsweg.
 1166        DELETE                 g_t_mseg_lean.
 1167      ENDLOOP.
 1168    ENDIF.
 1169
 1170    DESCRIBE TABLE imsweg LINES index_2.
 1171
 1172  ENDFORM.                               " BELEGE_SORTIEREN

 1174  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1175  *&      Form  KONTIERT_AUSSORTIEREN
 1176  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1177  *       Aussortierung der kontierten Belegpositionen,                  *
 1178  *       da diese Mengen nicht bestandsrelevant sind                    *
 1179  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1180
 1181  FORM kontiert_aussortieren.
 1182
 1183  * process table g_t_mseg_lean
 1184  * loop at imseg where kzvbr <> space and                         "144845
 1185  *     ( kzbew = 'B' or kzbew = 'F' ).                            "144845
 1186  *     read table imara with key matnr = imseg-matnr.
 1187  *     read table it134m with key mtart = imara-mtart.
 1188  *     if not it134m-mengu is initial and not it134m-wertu is initial.
 1189  *  Die Felder 'mengu' und 'wertu' (Mengen- bzw. Wertfortschreibung)
 1190  *  sind ab Release 3.0 D auch in die Tabelle MSEG aufgenommen.
 1191  *  Die Einträge in der Tabelle T134M stellen nach wie vor die generelle
 1192  *  Einstellung dar; auf Positionsebene sind jedoch Abänderungen möglich,
 1193  *  die anhand der Einträge in der Tabelle MSEG nachverfolgt werden
 1194  *  können.
 1195  *       delete imseg.
 1196  *     endif.
 1197  * endloop.
 1198
 1199    DATA : l_f_bwkey           LIKE  t001k-bwkey.             "n497992
 1200
 1201    SORT  it134m               BY  bwkey  mtart.              "n497992
 1202
 1203    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1204                               WHERE  kzvbr <> space
 1205                                 AND ( kzbew = 'B' OR kzbew = 'F' ).
 1206
 1207  *   get the valuation area                                  "n497992
 1208      IF  curm = '3'.                                         "n497992
 1209  *     valuation level is company code                       "n497992
 1210        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs IS INITIAL.                   "n497992
 1211  *       get the valuation area for this plant               "n497992
 1212          PERFORM  f9300_read_organ                           "n497992
 1213                     USING     c_werks   g_s_mseg_lean-werks. "n497992
 1214                                                              "n497992
 1215          MOVE  g_s_organ-bwkey     TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1216        ELSE.                                                 "n497992
 1217          MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1218        ENDIF.                                                "n497992
 1219      ELSE.                                                   "n497992
 1220  *     valuation level is plant                              "n497992
 1221        MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-werks   TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1222      ENDIF.                                                  "n497992
 1223
 1224      READ TABLE imara WITH KEY matnr = g_s_mseg_lean-matnr
 1225                               BINARY SEARCH.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    154
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1226
 1227      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1228        READ TABLE it134m      WITH KEY  bwkey = l_f_bwkey    "n497992
 1229                                         mtart = imara-mtart  "n497992
 1230                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1231
 1232        IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1233          IF NOT it134m-mengu IS INITIAL AND
 1234             NOT it134m-wertu IS INITIAL.
 1235            IF LGBST = abap_true.                             "3164181

 1237                       g_s_mseg_lean-wertu = abap_false ).
 1238                DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 1239              ENDIF.
 1240            ELSE.
 1241              DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 1242            ENDIF.
 1243          ENDIF.
 1244        ENDIF.
 1245      ELSE.

 1252  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1253  *&      Form  BELEGE_ERGAENZEN (engl. enrich documents)
 1254  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1255  * Material documents and FI documents from BSIM are merged together.
 1256  * Complications:
 1257  * - A material document can have more than one FI document.
 1258  * - There are FI documents without material documnts
 1259  * - There are material documents without FI documents
 1260  * - The document type is customizeable
 1261  * - There is no link from the materia document position to
 1262  *   the FI document entry in BSIM (except URZEILE, but this
 1263  *   can be filled incorrectly)
 1264  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1265
 1266  FORM belege_ergaenzen.                         "Version from note 204872
 1267
 1268  * - show the current activity and the progress              "n599218
 1269    CALL FUNCTION 'SAPGUI_PROGRESS_INDICATOR'                 "n599218
 1270      EXPORTING                                               "n599218
 1271        text = TEXT-061.       "Reading FI documents          "n599218
 1272
 1273  * Eliminate material documents with valuation string, but without
 1274  * relevance to the valuated stock. IT156W contains all valuation
 1275  * strings with posting key BSX. XBGBB says: "I am an accrural posting".
 1276  * For more details please ask Big-G.
 1277
 1278    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO  g_s_mseg_lean.
 1279  *   special processing for tied empties active ?            "n497992
 1280      IF  NOT g_cust_tied_empties IS INITIAL.                 "n497992
 1281  *     look for MM documents with xauto = L and change       "n497992
 1282  *     indicators                                            "n497992
 1283        CASE  g_s_mseg_lean-xauto.                            "n497992
 1284          WHEN  'X'.                                          "n497992
 1285          WHEN  space.                                        "n497992
 1286
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    155
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1287          WHEN  OTHERS.                                       "n547170
 1288  *         range table g_ra_xauto contains the special       "n547170
 1289  *         indicators for the transfer movements of the      "n547170
 1290  *         tied empties                                      "n547170

 3280        ENDIF.

 3282    ENDIF.

 3420  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3421  *    create_headline                                        "n599218
 3422  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3423                                                              "n599218
 3424  FORM create_headline.                                       "n599218
 3425                                                              "n599218
 3426    DATA : l_offset TYPE i,                                   "n599218
 3427           l_strlen TYPE i.                                   "n599218
 3428                                                              "n599218
 3429  * get the length of the title                               "n599218
 3430    COMPUTE  l_strlen          = strlen( sy-title ).          "n599218
 3431                                                              "n599218
 3432    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.                                     "n599218
 3433  *   stocks only --> small line with 77 bytes                "n599218
 3434      IF      l_strlen   =  59.                               "n599218
 3435        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title.       "n599218
 3436      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  59.                               "n599218
 3437        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title,       "n599218
 3438               '...'          TO  g_s_header_77-title+56(03). "n599218
 3439      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3440        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 59 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3441        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_77-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3442      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3443                                                              "n599218
 3444      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_77-date.   "n599218
 3445    ELSE.                                                     "n599218
 3446  *   stocks and values --> wide line with 91 bytes           "n599218
 3447      IF      l_strlen   =  73.                               "n599218
 3448        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title.       "n599218
 3449      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  73.                               "n599218
 3450        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title,       "n599218
 3451               '...'          TO  g_s_header_91-title+70(03). "n599218
 3452      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3453        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 73 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3454        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_91-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3455      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3456                                                              "n599218
 3457      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_91-date.   "n599218
 3458    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218
 3459                                                              "n599218
 3460  * create the end lines, too                                 "n599218
 3461    CONCATENATE  TEXT-062      "End of List                   "n599218
 3462                 ':'           sy-title                       "n599218
 3463                               INTO  g_end_line_77            "n599218
 3464                               SEPARATED BY space.            "n599218
 3465    MOVE : g_end_line_77       TO  g_end_line_91.             "n599218
 3466                                                              "n599218
 3467  ENDFORM.                     "create_headline               "n599218

 3756  *---- begin of note 921165 ---------------------------------"n921165

 3759  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165

 3761  * - improve performance processing internal tables          "n921165
 3762
 3763  FORM fill_data_table
 3764           TABLES    l_t_belege      TYPE  stab_belege
 3765           USING     l_matnr         TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3766                     l_werks         TYPE  mseg-werks
 3767                     l_charg         TYPE  mseg-charg.
 3768
 3769  * define local data fields
 3770    DATA : l_s_belege          TYPE  stype_belege.
 3771
 3772  * sort table with the MM docs only once
 3773    IF  g_flag_sorted  IS INITIAL.
 3774      MOVE  'X'                TO  g_flag_sorted.
 3775      SORT  g_t_mseg_lean      BY  matnr  werks  charg.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    199
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3776    ENDIF.
 3777
 3778  * read the first matching line depending on the batch
 3779    IF  l_charg IS INITIAL.
 3780      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3781        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3782                 werks = l_werks    BINARY SEARCH.
 3783    ELSE.
 3784      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3785        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3786                 werks = l_werks
 3787                 charg = l_charg    BINARY SEARCH.
 3788    ENDIF.
 3789
 3790  * the first entry found ? -> go on
 3791    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3792
 3793    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  g_tabix_set.
 3794
 3795  * go on with sequential reading
 3796    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean     INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 3797      FROM g_tabix_set.
 3798
 3799  *   take this entry when the key fields match
 3800      IF  g_s_mseg_lean-matnr = l_matnr   AND
 3801          g_s_mseg_lean-werks = l_werks.
 3802
 3803  *     cnsider the batches when this report runs in mode
 3804  *     "storage loc/batches" or "special stock"
 3805        IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3806          CHECK : xchar               IS INITIAL       OR
 3807                  g_s_mseg_lean-charg = l_charg.
 3808        ENDIF.
 3809
 3810        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean
 3811                               TO  l_s_belege.
 3812
 3813  *     enrich some fields with color and numeric fields with sign
 3814  *     the negative sign was not set for GI postings         "n944522
 3815        PERFORM  f9500_set_color_and_sign                     "n944522
 3816                         USING  l_s_belege  'L_S_BELEGE'.     "n944522
 3817
 3818        APPEND  l_s_belege     TO  l_t_belege.
 3819      ELSE.
 3820        EXIT.
 3821      ENDIF.
 3822    ENDLOOP.
 3823
 3824  ENDFORM.                    " fill_data_table
 3825
 3826  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3827  *&      Form  process_plants_of_bwkey                       "n921165
 3828  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3829
 3830  FORM process_plants_of_bwkey
 3831           TABLES    l2_t_belege  TYPE  stab_belege
 3832           USING     l2_matnr     TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3833                     l2_bwkey     TYPE  mbew-bwkey.
 3834
 3835  * define local working fields
 3836    FIELD-SYMBOLS :
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    200
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3837      <l_fs_organ>             TYPE  stype_organ.
 3838    DATA : l_tabix_start       TYPE  sy-tabix.
 3839
 3840
 3841    IF  curm = '1'.
 3842  *   valuation level is plant / process the MM docs
 3843      PERFORM  fill_data_table TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3844                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3845                                         l2_bwkey             "n921165
 3846                                         space.               "n921165
 3847      EXIT.                    " leave this routine
 3848    ENDIF.
 3849
 3850  * valuation leve = company code : plenty of plants could
 3851  * be assigned to the valuation area, look for the assigned
 3852  * plants and look for the MM doc per plant
 3853
 3854  * look for the first valuation area
 3855    READ TABLE g_t_organ       ASSIGNING  <l_fs_organ>
 3856      WITH KEY keytype  = c_bwkey
 3857               keyfield = l2_bwkey
 3858                               BINARY SEARCH.
 3859
 3860  * go on when a valuation area was found
 3861    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3862
 3863    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  l_tabix_start.
 3864
 3865  * seq. read of all matching entries
 3866    LOOP AT g_t_organ          ASSIGNING <l_fs_organ>
 3867      FROM l_tabix_start.
 3868
 3869      IF  <l_fs_organ>-keytype   = c_bwkey      AND
 3870          <l_fs_organ>-keyfield  = l2_bwkey.
 3871  *     process the MM docs from this plant
 3872        PERFORM  fill_data_table                              "n921165
 3873                               TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3874                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3875                                         <l_fs_organ>-werks   "n921165
 3876                                         space.               "n921165
 3877      ELSE.
 3878        EXIT.
 3879      ENDIF.
 3880    ENDLOOP.
 3881
 3882  ENDFORM.                    " process_plants_of_bwkey       "n921165
 3883                                                              "n921165
