 1128  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1129  *&      Form  BELEGE_SORTIEREN
 1130  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1131  *    Die Materialbelege werden anhand des Buchungsdatums sortiert.
 1132  *    Die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum zwischen 'datum-high'
 1133  *    und dem aktuellen Datum werden in der internen Tabelle IMSWEG
 1134  *    gesammelt, während die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum
 1135  *    zwischen 'datum-low' und 'datum-high' in der internen Tabelle
 1136  *    IMSEG verbleiben.
 1137  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1138
 1139  FORM belege_sortieren.
 1140
 1141    DATA: lv_zaehler TYPE i,
 1142          lv_limit TYPE limit_records.
 1143
 1144    aktdat = sy-datlo + 365.                                  "1227437
 1145    IF NOT ( datum-high IS INITIAL OR datum-high > aktdat ).
 1146  * Get record limit for table  to avoid memory overflow
 1147      SELECT SINGLE limit INTO lv_limit
 1148        FROM mmim_rep_ln_lim
 1149        WHERE report = 'RM07MLBD'
 1150          AND tabname = 'MSEG_LEAN'.
 1151
 1152      CLEAR lv_zaehler.
 1153      LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean    INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1154                               WHERE budat > datum-high.
 1155        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean TO imsweg.
 1156        IF lv_limit > 0.
 1157  * Check entries before the memory for internal table is to small
 1158          ADD 1 TO lv_zaehler.
 1159          IF lv_zaehler > lv_limit.
 1160            MESSAGE i555(m7).
 1161  * Too many records selected. Not enough memory. Restrict your selection
 1162            SUBMIT rm07mlbd VIA SELECTION-SCREEN .
 1163          ENDIF.
 1164        ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    302
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1165        APPEND imsweg.
 1166        DELETE                 g_t_mseg_lean.
 1167      ENDLOOP.
 1168    ENDIF.
 1169
 1170    DESCRIBE TABLE imsweg LINES index_2.
 1171
 1172  ENDFORM.                               " BELEGE_SORTIEREN
 1173
 1174  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1175  *&      Form  KONTIERT_AUSSORTIEREN
 1176  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1177  *       Aussortierung der kontierten Belegpositionen,                  *
 1178  *       da diese Mengen nicht bestandsrelevant sind                    *
 1179  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1180
 1181  FORM kontiert_aussortieren.
 1182
 1183  * process table g_t_mseg_lean
 1184  * loop at imseg where kzvbr <> space and                         "144845
 1185  *     ( kzbew = 'B' or kzbew = 'F' ).                            "144845
 1186  *     read table imara with key matnr = imseg-matnr.
 1187  *     read table it134m with key mtart = imara-mtart.
 1188  *     if not it134m-mengu is initial and not it134m-wertu is initial.
 1189  *  Die Felder 'mengu' und 'wertu' (Mengen- bzw. Wertfortschreibung)
 1190  *  sind ab Release 3.0 D auch in die Tabelle MSEG aufgenommen.
 1191  *  Die Einträge in der Tabelle T134M stellen nach wie vor die generelle
 1192  *  Einstellung dar; auf Positionsebene sind jedoch Abänderungen möglich,
 1193  *  die anhand der Einträge in der Tabelle MSEG nachverfolgt werden
 1194  *  können.
 1195  *       delete imseg.
 1196  *     endif.
 1197  * endloop.
 1198
 1199    DATA : l_f_bwkey           LIKE  t001k-bwkey.             "n497992
 1200
 1201    SORT  it134m               BY  bwkey  mtart.              "n497992
 1202
 1203    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1204                               WHERE  kzvbr <> space
 1205                                 AND ( kzbew = 'B' OR kzbew = 'F' ).
 1206
 1207  *   get the valuation area                                  "n497992
 1208      IF  curm = '3'.                                         "n497992
 1209  *     valuation level is company code                       "n497992
 1210        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs IS INITIAL.                   "n497992
 1211  *       get the valuation area for this plant               "n497992
 1212          PERFORM  f9300_read_organ                           "n497992
 1213                     USING     c_werks   g_s_mseg_lean-werks. "n497992
 1214                                                              "n497992
 1215          MOVE  g_s_organ-bwkey     TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1216        ELSE.                                                 "n497992
 1217          MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1218        ENDIF.                                                "n497992
 1219      ELSE.                                                   "n497992
 1220  *     valuation level is plant                              "n497992
 1221        MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-werks   TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1222      ENDIF.                                                  "n497992
 1223
 1224      READ TABLE imara WITH KEY matnr = g_s_mseg_lean-matnr
 1225                               BINARY SEARCH.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    303
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1226
 1227      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1228        READ TABLE it134m      WITH KEY  bwkey = l_f_bwkey    "n497992
 1229                                         mtart = imara-mtart  "n497992
 1230                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1231
 1232        IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1233          IF NOT it134m-mengu IS INITIAL AND
 1234             NOT it134m-wertu IS INITIAL.
 1235            IF LGBST = abap_true.                             "3164181
 1236              IF NOT ( g_s_mseg_lean-mengu = abap_true AND
 1237                       g_s_mseg_lean-wertu = abap_false ).
 1238                DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 1239              ENDIF.
 1240            ELSE.
 1241              DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 1242            ENDIF.
 1243          ENDIF.
 1244        ENDIF.
 1245      ELSE.
 1246        DELETE                  g_t_mseg_lean.
 1247      ENDIF.
 1248    ENDLOOP.

 1250  ENDFORM.                               " KONTIERT_AUSSORTIEREN

 1252  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1253  *&      Form  BELEGE_ERGAENZEN (engl. enrich documents)
 1254  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1255  * Material documents and FI documents from BSIM are merged together.
 1256  * Complications:
 1257  * - A material document can have more than one FI document.
 1258  * - There are FI documents without material documnts
 1259  * - There are material documents without FI documents
 1260  * - The document type is customizeable
 1261  * - There is no link from the materia document position to
 1262  *   the FI document entry in BSIM (except URZEILE, but this
 1263  *   can be filled incorrectly)
 1264  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*

 1563  * add G/L account data to G_T_MSEG_LEAN

 1574          FOR ALL ENTRIES IN g_t_bseg_key
 1575            WHERE bukrs = g_t_bseg_key-bukrs
 1576              AND belnr = g_t_bseg_key-belnr
 1577              AND gjahr = g_t_bseg_key-gjahr
 1578              AND buzei = g_t_bseg_key-buzei

 1580      ENDIF.

 1601    ENDIF.

 3369                                                              "n599218
 3370  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3371  *     print_end_of_list_render
 3372  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3373
 3374  FORM  print_end_of_list_render
 3375           CHANGING cr_content TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_element.
 3376
 3377    DATA: lr_grid     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_layout_grid,
 3378          lr_flow     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_layout_flow,
 3379          l_text(500) TYPE c,
 3380          l_char(500) TYPE c.
 3381
 3382  *... create a grid
 3383    CREATE OBJECT lr_grid.
 3384
 3385    lr_flow = lr_grid->create_flow( row = 1  column = 1 ).
 3386
 3387    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3388  *     stocks only
 3389      MOVE  : g_end_line_77       TO  l_text.
 3390    ELSE.
 3391  *     stocks and values
 3392      MOVE  : g_end_line_91       TO  l_text.
 3393    ENDIF.
 3394
 3395  *   add line to object
 3396    lr_flow->create_text( text = l_text ).
 3397
 3398  * copy whole header object

 3402
 3403  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3404  *    create_headline                                        "n599218
 3405  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3406                                                              "n599218
 3407  FORM create_headline.                                       "n599218
 3408                                                              "n599218
 3409    DATA : l_offset TYPE i,                                   "n599218
 3410           l_strlen TYPE i.                                   "n599218
 3411                                                              "n599218
 3412  * get the length of the title                               "n599218
 3413    COMPUTE  l_strlen          = strlen( sy-title ).          "n599218
 3414                                                              "n599218
 3415    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.                                     "n599218
 3416  *   stocks only --> small line with 77 bytes                "n599218
 3417      IF      l_strlen   =  59.                               "n599218
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    342
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3418        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title.       "n599218
 3419      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  59.                               "n599218
 3420        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title,       "n599218
 3421               '...'          TO  g_s_header_77-title+56(03). "n599218
 3422      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3423        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 59 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3424        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_77-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3425      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3426                                                              "n599218
 3427      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_77-date.   "n599218
 3428    ELSE.                                                     "n599218
 3429  *   stocks and values --> wide line with 91 bytes           "n599218
 3430      IF      l_strlen   =  73.                               "n599218
 3431        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title.       "n599218
 3432      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  73.                               "n599218
 3433        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title,       "n599218
 3434               '...'          TO  g_s_header_91-title+70(03). "n599218
 3435      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3436        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 73 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3437        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_91-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3438      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3439                                                              "n599218
 3440      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_91-date.   "n599218
 3441    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218
 3442                                                              "n599218
 3443  * create the end lines, too                                 "n599218
 3444    CONCATENATE  TEXT-062      "End of List                   "n599218
 3445                 ':'           sy-title                       "n599218
 3446                               INTO  g_end_line_77            "n599218
 3447                               SEPARATED BY space.            "n599218
 3448    MOVE : g_end_line_77       TO  g_end_line_91.             "n599218
 3449                                                              "n599218
 3450  ENDFORM.                     "create_headline               "n599218

 3744  * - improve performance processing internal tables          "n921165
 3745
 3746  FORM fill_data_table
 3747           TABLES    l_t_belege      TYPE  stab_belege
 3748           USING     l_matnr         TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3749                     l_werks         TYPE  mseg-werks
 3750                     l_charg         TYPE  mseg-charg.
 3751
 3752  * define local data fields
 3753    DATA : l_s_belege          TYPE  stype_belege.
 3754
 3755  * sort table with the MM docs only once
 3756    IF  g_flag_sorted  IS INITIAL.
 3757      MOVE  'X'                TO  g_flag_sorted.
 3758      SORT  g_t_mseg_lean      BY  matnr  werks  charg.
 3759    ENDIF.
 3760
 3761  * read the first matching line depending on the batch
 3762    IF  l_charg IS INITIAL.
 3763      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3764        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3765                 werks = l_werks    BINARY SEARCH.
 3766    ELSE.
 3767      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3768        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3769                 werks = l_werks
 3770                 charg = l_charg    BINARY SEARCH.
 3771    ENDIF.
 3772
 3773  * the first entry found ? -> go on
 3774    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3775
 3776    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  g_tabix_set.
 3777
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    348
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3778  * go on with sequential reading
 3779    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean     INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 3780      FROM g_tabix_set.
 3781
 3782  *   take this entry when the key fields match
 3783      IF  g_s_mseg_lean-matnr = l_matnr   AND
 3784          g_s_mseg_lean-werks = l_werks.
 3785
 3786  *     cnsider the batches when this report runs in mode
 3787  *     "storage loc/batches" or "special stock"
 3788        IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3789          CHECK : xchar               IS INITIAL       OR
 3790                  g_s_mseg_lean-charg = l_charg.
 3791        ENDIF.
 3792
 3793        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean
 3794                               TO  l_s_belege.
 3795
 3796  *     enrich some fields with color and numeric fields with sign
 3797  *     the negative sign was not set for GI postings         "n944522
 3798        PERFORM  f9500_set_color_and_sign                     "n944522
 3799                         USING  l_s_belege  'L_S_BELEGE'.     "n944522
 3800
 3801        APPEND  l_s_belege     TO  l_t_belege.
 3802      ELSE.
 3803        EXIT.
 3804      ENDIF.
 3805    ENDLOOP.
 3806
 3807  ENDFORM.                    " fill_data_table
 3808
 3809  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3810  *&      Form  process_plants_of_bwkey                       "n921165
 3811  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3812
 3813  FORM process_plants_of_bwkey
 3814           TABLES    l2_t_belege  TYPE  stab_belege
 3815           USING     l2_matnr     TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3816                     l2_bwkey     TYPE  mbew-bwkey.
 3817
 3818  * define local working fields
 3819    FIELD-SYMBOLS :
 3820      <l_fs_organ>             TYPE  stype_organ.
 3821    DATA : l_tabix_start       TYPE  sy-tabix.
 3822
 3823
 3824    IF  curm = '1'.
 3825  *   valuation level is plant / process the MM docs
 3826      PERFORM  fill_data_table TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3827                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3828                                         l2_bwkey             "n921165
 3829                                         space.               "n921165
 3830      EXIT.                    " leave this routine
 3831    ENDIF.
 3832
 3833  * valuation leve = company code : plenty of plants could
 3834  * be assigned to the valuation area, look for the assigned
 3835  * plants and look for the MM doc per plant
 3836
 3837  * look for the first valuation area
 3838    READ TABLE g_t_organ       ASSIGNING  <l_fs_organ>
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    349
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3839      WITH KEY keytype  = c_bwkey
 3840               keyfield = l2_bwkey
 3841                               BINARY SEARCH.
 3842
 3843  * go on when a valuation area was found
 3844    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3845
 3846    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  l_tabix_start.
 3847
 3848  * seq. read of all matching entries
 3849    LOOP AT g_t_organ          ASSIGNING <l_fs_organ>
 3850      FROM l_tabix_start.
 3851
 3852      IF  <l_fs_organ>-keytype   = c_bwkey      AND
 3853          <l_fs_organ>-keyfield  = l2_bwkey.
 3854  *     process the MM docs from this plant
 3855        PERFORM  fill_data_table                              "n921165
 3856                               TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3857                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3858                                         <l_fs_organ>-werks   "n921165
 3859                                         space.               "n921165
 3860      ELSE.
 3861        EXIT.
 3862      ENDIF.
 3863    ENDLOOP.
 3864
 3865  ENDFORM.                    " process_plants_of_bwkey       "n921165
 3866                                                              "n921165

 3869  *&      Form  NACHRICHTENAUSGABE
 3870  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3871  FORM nachrichtenausgabe .
 3872  * Report errors if found                                    "n1481757
 3873    IF  NOT archive_messages[] IS INITIAL.                    "n1481757
 3874      SORT archive_messages                                   "n1481757
 3875         BY msgid msgno msgv1 msgv2 msgv3 msgv4.              "n1481757
 3876                                                              "n1481757
 3877      TYPES: BEGIN OF slis_fieldcat,                          "n1481757
 3878               row_pos     LIKE sy-curow, " output in row      "n1481757
 3879               col_pos     LIKE sy-cucol, " position of the column "n14817
       57
 3880               fieldname   TYPE slis_fieldname,               "n1481757
 3881               ref_tabname TYPE slis_tabname,                 "n1481757
 3882               msgid       LIKE sy-msgid,                     "n1481757
 3883               msgno       LIKE sy-msgno,                     "n1481757
 3884               msgv1       LIKE sy-msgv1,                     "n1481757
 3885               msgv2       LIKE sy-msgv2,                     "n1481757
 3886               msgv3       LIKE sy-msgv3,                     "n1481757
 3887               msgv4       LIKE sy-msgv4,                     "n1481757
 3888             END OF slis_fieldcat.                            "n1481757
 3889  *                                                           "n1481757
 3890      DATA: BEGIN OF outtab OCCURS 0,                         "n1481757
 3891              msgid    LIKE sy-msgid,                         "n1481757
 3892              msgno    LIKE sy-msgno,                         "n1481757
 3893              text(80),                                       "n1481757
 3894            END OF outtab.                                    "n1481757
 3895      DATA: fc TYPE slis_fieldcat_alv OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE. "n1481757
 3896      DATA: souttab LIKE LINE OF outtab.                      "n1481757
 3897      REFRESH outtab.                                         "n1481757
 3898  *                                                           "n1481757
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    350
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3899      LOOP AT archive_messages.                               "n1481757
 3900        MOVE-CORRESPONDING archive_messages TO outtab.        "n1481757
 3901        MESSAGE ID     archive_messages-msgid                 "n1481757
 3902                TYPE   'E'                                    "n1481757
 3903                NUMBER archive_messages-msgno                 "n1481757
 3904                WITH   archive_messages-msgv1                 "n1481757
 3905                       archive_messages-msgv2                 "n1481757
 3906                       archive_messages-msgv3                 "n1481757
 3907                       archive_messages-msgv4                 "n1481757
 3908                INTO   outtab-text.                           "n1481757
 3909        APPEND outtab.                                        "n1481757
 3910      ENDLOOP.                                                "n1481757
 3911  *                                                           "n1481757
 3912      REFRESH fc.                                             "n1481757
 3913      fc-fieldname = 'MSGID'.                                 "n1481757
 3914      fc-ref_tabname = 'SYST'.                                "n1481757
 3915      APPEND fc.                                              "n1481757
 3916      fc-fieldname = 'MSGNO'.                                 "n1481757
 3917      fc-ref_tabname = 'SYST'.                                "n1481757
 3918      APPEND fc.                                              "n1481757
 3919      fc-fieldname = 'TEXT'.                                  "n1481757
 3920      fc-ref_tabname = 'T100'.                                "n1481757
 3921      APPEND fc.                                              "n1481757
 3922                                                              "n1481757
 3923
 3924      DATA: it_commentary TYPE slis_t_listheader.
 3925      DATA: is_commentary LIKE LINE OF it_commentary.
 3926
 3927      LOOP AT outtab INTO souttab.
 3928        is_commentary-typ = 'H'.
 3929        is_commentary-info = souttab-text.
 3930        APPEND is_commentary TO it_commentary.
 3931      ENDLOOP.
 3932
 3933      CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_COMMENTARY_WRITE'
 3934        EXPORTING
 3935          it_list_commentary = it_commentary.         "n1481757
 3936                                                              "n1481757
 3937    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757

 3941  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3942  *&      Form  BUILD_BKLAS_SELECTION
 3943  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3944  *       Build internal selection options for Valuation Class
 3945  *       restriction, in case G/L account is restricted
 3946  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3947  *  -->  HKONT       Selection screen options
 3948  *  <--  iBKLAS      Internal selection options
 3949  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3950  FORM build_bklas_selection
 3951      USING
 3952            et_mbew TYPE stab_mbew.
 3953
 3954    TYPES:
 3955      BEGIN OF lts_valuation_area,
 3956        bwkey TYPE bwkey,
 3957        bukrs TYPE bukrs,
 3958        bwmod TYPE bwmod,
 3959      END OF lts_valuation_area,
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    351
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3960
 3961      BEGIN OF lts_account,
 3962        ktopl TYPE t030r-ktopl,
 3963
 3964      bwmod TYPE t030-bwmod,
 3965        bklas TYPE t030-bklas,
 3966
 3967        saknr TYPE t030-konts,
 3968      END OF lts_account,
 3969
 3970      ltt_account TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_account.
 3971
 3972
 3973
 3974    DATA:
 3975      lt_organ       LIKE g_t_organ[].
 3976
 3977
 3978  * table G_T_ORGAN should be already filled in; otherwise settings for al
       l
 3979  * charts of accounts need to be read which is very time consuming
 3980    lt_organ = g_t_organ[].
 3981    SORT lt_organ BY ktopl bwmod.
 3982    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_organ COMPARING ktopl bwmod.
 3983    IF lt_organ IS INITIAL.
 3984      MESSAGE s480.
 3985      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 3986    ENDIF.
 3987
 3988  * read Valuation Areas with Valuation Grouping Code
 3989    DATA:
 3990      lt_valuation_areas TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_valuation_area,
 3991      ls_valuation_area  TYPE lts_valuation_area.
 3992
 3993    SELECT
 3994      valuation_area~bwkey
 3995      valuation_area~bukrs
 3996      valuation_area~bwmod
 3997    FROM
 3998      t001k AS valuation_area
 3999    INTO
 4000      CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_valuation_areas
 4001    WHERE
 4002      valuation_area~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey.
 4003
 4004
 4005  **********************************************************************
 4006  * Read accounts and account determination rules for specified accounts a
       nd organizations
 4007    DATA:
 4008      lt_rules    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t030r,
 4009      lt_accounts TYPE ltt_account.
 4010
 4011    SELECT
 4012      account~ktopl
 4013
 4014      account~bwmod
 4015      account~bklas
 4016
 4017      account~konts AS saknr
 4018
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    352
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4019    FROM
 4020      t030 AS account
 4021    INTO
 4022      CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_accounts
 4023
 4024    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN
 4025      lt_organ
 4026    WHERE
 4027          account~ktopl = lt_organ-ktopl
 4028      AND account~ktosl = 'BSX'
 4029      AND account~komok = ''
 4030      AND account~konts IN hkont.
 4031
 4032
 4033    SELECT *
 4034    FROM
 4035      t030r AS standart_account_rule
 4036    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE
 4037      lt_rules
 4038    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN
 4039      lt_organ
 4040    WHERE
 4041          standart_account_rule~ktopl = lt_organ-ktopl
 4042      AND standart_account_rule~ktosl EQ 'BSX'
 4043    ORDER BY
 4044      PRIMARY KEY.
 4045
 4046
 4047  * determine if rules restrict selection by valuation grouping codes or v
       aluation classes
 4048    DATA:
 4049      lv_bklas_restricted TYPE abap_bool,
 4050      lv_bwmod_restricted TYPE abap_bool.
 4051    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
 4052      <fs_valuation_area>   TYPE lts_valuation_area,
 4053      <fs_selected_account> TYPE lts_account,
 4054      <fs_standart_account_rule> TYPE t030r.
 4055
 4056    READ TABLE lt_rules WITH KEY xbwmo = 'X' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4057    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4058      lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4059    ELSE.
 4060      lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4061    ENDIF.
 4062
 4063    READ TABLE lt_rules WITH KEY xbkla = 'X' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4064    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4065      lv_bklas_restricted = 'X'.
 4066    ELSE.
 4067      lv_bklas_restricted = ''.
 4068    ENDIF.
 4069
 4070    g_ra_bwkey-sign = 'I'.
 4071    g_ra_bwkey-option = 'EQ'.
 4072
 4073  * if selection is restricted by valuation grouping code(BWMOD) also rest
       rict valuation area selection
 4074    IF lv_bwmod_restricted = abap_true.
 4075      CLEAR g_ra_bwkey-low.
 4076      LOOP AT lt_rules ASSIGNING <fs_standart_account_rule> WHERE XBWMO =
       'X'.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    353
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4077          LOOP AT lt_accounts ASSIGNING <fs_selected_account> WHERE ktopl
       = <fs_standart_account_rule>-ktopl.
 4078            LOOP AT lt_valuation_areas ASSIGNING <fs_valuation_area> WHERE
        bwmod = <fs_selected_account>-bwmod.
 4079              g_ra_bwkey-low = <fs_valuation_area>-bwkey.
 4080              APPEND g_ra_bwkey TO g_ra_bwkey.
 4081          ENDLOOP.
 4082          ENDLOOP.
 4083      ENDLOOP.
 4084    ENDIF.
 4085    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bwkey.
 4086
 4087
 4088    IF lt_accounts IS INITIAL.
 4089      MESSAGE s289.
 4090  *   no data contained in the selection
 4091      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 4092    ENDIF.
 4093
 4094
 4095  **********************************************************************
 4096
 4097    TYPES: BEGIN OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4098             INCLUDE TYPE stype_mbew.
 4099
 4100    TYPES:   bklas TYPE bklas.
 4101    TYPES: bwmod TYPE bwmod.
 4102    TYPES: END OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4103
 4104    DATA:
 4105          lt_mbew TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4106
 4107    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MBEW' ''.
 4108    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'T001K' ''.
 4109
 4110    IF ( lt_accounts IS NOT INITIAL ).
 4111
 4112  * if selection is restricted either by valuation grouping code (BWMOD) o
       r by valuation class (BKLAS)
 4113  * use corresponding condition in WHERE clause
 4114      IF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4115        SELECT
 4116          bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4117          bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4118          bewertung~lbkum
 4119          bewertung~salk3
 4120

 4122

       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN

       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN

 4195          (dbcon)

 4205  *   special stock sales order
 4206    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'EBEW' ''.
 4207    SELECT

 4280      AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4281    GROUP BY
 4282      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4283      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod.
 4284
 4285
 4286    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
 4287      <fs_full_mbew> TYPE lts_stype_mbew,
 4288      <fs_mbew>      TYPE stype_mbew.
 4289    DATA:
 4290          lv_bklas TYPE t030-bklas,
 4291          lv_bwmod TYPE t030-bwmod.
 4292
 4293  * Restrict selection from QBEW, EBEW, OBEW
 4294    LOOP AT lt_mbew ASSIGNING <fs_full_mbew>.
 4295      IF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4296
 4297        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4298          WITH KEY bklas = <fs_full_mbew>-bklas
 4299                   bwmod = <fs_full_mbew>-bwmod TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4300
 4301    ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4302
 4303        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4304          WITH KEY bklas = <fs_full_mbew>-bklas TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4305
 4306    ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = '' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4307
 4308        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4309          WITH KEY bwmod = <fs_full_mbew>-bwmod TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4310
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    357
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4311      ELSE.
 4312
 4313        LOOP AT lt_accounts TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS
 4314          WHERE bklas = '' AND bwmod = ''.
 4315        ENDLOOP.
 4316      ENDIF.
 4317
 4318      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 4319        CONTINUE.
 4320      ENDIF.
 4321
 4322      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO et_mbew ASSIGNING <fs_mbew>.
 4323      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_full_mbew> TO <fs_mbew>.
 4324    ENDLOOP.
 4325
 4326  ENDFORM.                    " BUILD_BKLAS_SELECTION
 4327
 4328
 4329
 4330  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4331  *&      Form  GET_ACC_DET
 4332  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4333  *       Get G/L account from current account determination settings
 4334  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4335  FORM get_acc_det  CHANGING cs_accdet  TYPE stype_accdet.
 4336
 4337    TYPES:
 4338      BEGIN OF ltt_acc,
 4339        bklas LIKE t030-bklas,
 4340        bwmod LIKE t030-bwmod,
 4341        ktopl LIKE t030-ktopl,
 4342        hkont LIKE t030-konts,
 4343      END OF ltt_acc.
 4344
 4345    STATICS:
 4346      lt_acc TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ltt_acc WITH UNIQUE KEY bklas bwmod ktop
       l.
 4347    DATA:
 4348      ls_acc TYPE ltt_acc.
 4349
 4350  * get organizational data
 4351    PERFORM f9300_read_organ
 4352      USING c_werks cs_accdet-werks.
 4353    CHECK g_s_organ-bukrs = cs_accdet-bukrs.
 4354    cs_accdet-bwkey = g_s_organ-bwkey.
 4355    cs_accdet-ktopl = g_s_organ-ktopl.
 4356    cs_accdet-bwmod = g_s_organ-bwmod.
 4357
 4358  * check for special stock that is valuated in MBEW
 4359    IF ( cs_accdet-sobkz = 'Q' OR cs_accdet-sobkz = 'E' ) AND
 4360       cs_accdet-kzbws = 'A'.
 4361      CLEAR: cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4362    ENDIF.
 4363    IF cs_accdet-sobkz = 'O' AND cs_accdet-xobew IS INITIAL.
 4364      CLEAR: cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4365    ENDIF.
 4366
 4367  * get special stock data
 4368  * (if not filled yet via customer's enhancement of type STYPE_MB5B_ADD)
 4369    CASE cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4370      WHEN 'Q'.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    358
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4371        IF cs_accdet-mat_pspnr IS INITIAL.
 4372          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4373          SELECT SINGLE mat_pspnr FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (dbcon) "n17
       10850
 4374            INTO cs_accdet-mat_pspnr
 4375            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4376              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4377              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4378        ENDIF.
 4379        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4380      WHEN 'E'.
 4381        IF cs_accdet-mat_kdauf IS INITIAL OR cs_accdet-mat_kdpos IS INITIA
       L.
 4382          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4383          SELECT SINGLE mat_kdauf mat_kdpos FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (d
       bcon) "n1710850
 4384            INTO (cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos)
 4385            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4386              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4387              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4388        ENDIF.
 4389        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_pspnr, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4390      WHEN 'O'.
 4391        IF cs_accdet-lifnr IS INITIAL.
 4392          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4393          SELECT SINGLE lifnr FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (dbcon) "n171085
       0
 4394            INTO cs_accdet-lifnr
 4395            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4396              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4397              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4398        ENDIF.
 4399        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos, cs_accdet-mat_psp
       nr.
 4400      WHEN OTHERS.
 4401        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos,
 4402               cs_accdet-mat_pspnr, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4403    ENDCASE.
 4404
 4405  * get valuation class
 4406    PERFORM get_bklas CHANGING cs_accdet.
 4407
 4408  * get G/L account
 4409    READ TABLE lt_acc INTO ls_acc
 4410      WITH TABLE KEY bklas = cs_accdet-bklas
 4411                     bwmod = cs_accdet-bwmod
 4412                     ktopl = cs_accdet-ktopl.
 4413    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4414      cs_accdet-hkont = ls_acc-hkont.
 4415    ELSE.
 4416      CALL FUNCTION 'MR_ACCOUNT_ASSIGNMENT'
 4417        EXPORTING
 4418          bewertungsklasse       = cs_accdet-bklas
 4419          bewertung_modif        = cs_accdet-bwmod
 4420          kontenplan             = cs_accdet-ktopl
 4421          soll_haben_kennzeichen = 'S'
 4422          vorgangsschluessel     = 'BSX'
 4423        IMPORTING
 4424          konto                  = cs_accdet-hkont
 4425        EXCEPTIONS
 4426          OTHERS                 = 5.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    359
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4427      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 4428        CLEAR cs_accdet-hkont.
 4429      ENDIF.
 4430      ls_acc-bklas = cs_accdet-bklas.
 4431      ls_acc-bwmod = cs_accdet-bwmod.
 4432      ls_acc-ktopl = cs_accdet-ktopl.
 4433      ls_acc-hkont = cs_accdet-hkont.
 4434      INSERT ls_acc INTO TABLE lt_acc.
 4435    ENDIF.
 4436
 4437  ENDFORM.                    " GET_ACC_DET
 4438  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4439  *&      Form  GET_BKLAS
 4440  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4441  *      Get valuation class from current settings
 4442  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4443  FORM get_bklas  CHANGING cs_accdet  TYPE stype_accdet.
 4444
 4445    TYPES:
 4446      BEGIN OF ltt_bklas,
 4447        matnr     LIKE mbew-matnr,
 4448        bwkey     LIKE mbew-bwkey,
 4449        bwtar     LIKE mbew-bwtar,
 4450        sobkz     LIKE qbew-sobkz,
 4451        mat_pspnr LIKE qbew-pspnr,
 4452        mat_kdauf LIKE ebew-vbeln,
 4453        mat_kdpos LIKE ebew-posnr,
 4454        lifnr     LIKE obew-lifnr,
 4455        bklas     LIKE mbew-bklas,
 4456      END OF ltt_bklas.
 4457
 4458    STATICS:
 4459      lt_bklas TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ltt_bklas WITH UNIQUE KEY matnr bwkey
 4460        bwtar sobkz mat_pspnr mat_kdauf mat_kdpos lifnr.
 4461    DATA:
 4462      ls_bklas TYPE ltt_bklas.
 4463
 4464    READ TABLE lt_bklas INTO ls_bklas
 4465      WITH TABLE KEY matnr     = cs_accdet-matnr
 4466                     bwkey     = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4467                     bwtar     = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4468                     sobkz     = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4469                     mat_pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr
 4470                     mat_kdauf = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf
 4471                     mat_kdpos = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos
 4472                     lifnr     = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4473    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4474      cs_accdet-bklas = ls_bklas-bklas.
 4475    ELSE.
 4476      CASE cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4477        WHEN 'Q'.
 4478          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'QBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4479          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM qbew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4480            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4481            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4482              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4483              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4484              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4485              AND pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr.
 4486        WHEN 'E'.
 4487          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'EBEW' ''.            "n1710850
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    360
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4488          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM ebew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4489            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4490            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4491              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4492              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4493              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4494              AND vbeln = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf
 4495              AND posnr = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos.
 4496        WHEN 'O'.
 4497          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'OBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4498          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM obew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4499            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4500            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4501              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4502              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4503              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4504              AND lifnr = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4505        WHEN OTHERS.
 4506          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4507          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM v_mbew_md CONNECTION (dbcon) "n1710850
 4508            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4509            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4510              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4511              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar.
 4512      ENDCASE.
 4513      ls_bklas-matnr     = cs_accdet-matnr.
 4514      ls_bklas-bwkey     = cs_accdet-bwkey.
 4515      ls_bklas-bwtar     = cs_accdet-bwtar.
 4516      ls_bklas-sobkz     = cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4517      ls_bklas-mat_pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr.
 4518      ls_bklas-mat_kdauf = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf.
 4519      ls_bklas-mat_kdpos = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos.
 4520      ls_bklas-lifnr     = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4521      ls_bklas-bklas     = cs_accdet-bklas.
 4522      INSERT ls_bklas INTO TABLE lt_bklas.
 4523    ENDIF.
 4524
 4525  ENDFORM.                    " GET_BKLAS
 4526
 4527  FORM hdb_check_table  USING                                 "n1710850
 4528                        lv_tab1 TYPE tabname
 4529                        lv_tab2 TYPE tabname.
 4530
 4531  * clear dbcon, set only at the end if OK
 4532    CLEAR dbcon.
 4533
 4534    IF dbcon_active IS INITIAL.
 4535      RETURN.
 4536    ENDIF.
 4537
 4538    DATA: lt_chk_tab TYPE typ_t_tablename.
 4539
 4540    IF lv_tab1 IS NOT INITIAL.
 4541      APPEND lv_tab1 TO lt_chk_tab.
 4542    ENDIF.
 4543    IF lv_tab2 IS NOT INITIAL.
 4544      APPEND lv_tab2 TO lt_chk_tab.
 4545    ENDIF.
 4546
 4547    CALL FUNCTION c_hdb_dbcon_get
 4548      EXPORTING
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    361
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4549        i_subappl  = c_hdb_subappl
 4550  *     I_ACT_CHECK_ONLY       =
 4551        it_req_tab = lt_chk_tab
 4552      IMPORTING
 4553        e_dbcon    = dbcon.
 4554
 4555  ENDFORM.                                                    "n1710850
 4556  * begin of note 2120566                                        "v2120566
 4557  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4558  *&      Form  wesperr_aussortieren
 4559  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4560  *       Delete the non-valuated GR blocked stock for special stock OVW *
 4561  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4562  FORM wesperr_aussortieren.
 4563
 4564    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO   g_s_mseg_lean
 4565                                WHERE sobkz CA 'OVW'
 4566                                AND   bustm EQ 'ME11'.
 4567      DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 4568    ENDLOOP.
 4569
 4570  ENDFORM.                            "wesperr_aussortieren
 4571  * end of note 2120566                                          "^2120566

  176
  177  FORM listumfang.
  178
  179    DATA : l_category(08)      TYPE c.                        "n599218
  180    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs>.                                   "n599218
  181                                                              "n599218
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    365
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  182  * carry out the check according the list categories in the  "n599218
  183  * case at least one category is not active                  "n599218
  184    CHECK : NOT g_cnt_empty_parameter IS INITIAL.             "n599218
  185  *                                                           "n599218
  186  * cat. I docs I stock on   I    I stock on I Parameter      "n599218
  187  *      I      I start date I    I end date I                "n599218
  188  * -----+------+------------+----+----------+----------      "n599218
  189  *  1   I yes  I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_wdzer       "n599218
  190  *  2   I yes  I =  zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdzew       "n599218
  191  *  3   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I =  zero  I pa_wdwiz       "n599218
  192  *  4   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdwuw       "n599218
  193  *  5   I yes  I <> zero    I =  I <> zero  I pa_wdwew       "n599218
  194  *      I      I            I    I          I                "n599218
  195  *  6   I no   I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_ndzer       "n599218
  196  *  7   I no   I <> zero    I =  I <> zero  I pa_ndsto       "n599218
  197    LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07
       MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_FORM_02_01\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer
       =>get_field( ).
  198                                                              "n599218
  199  * process table BESTAND                                     "n599218
  200    LOOP AT bestand.                                          "n599218
  201      CLEAR                    l_category.                    "n599218
  202                                                              "n599218
  203  *   determine the category of each entry                    "n599218
  204
  205      IF  bestand-soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  206          bestand-haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  207          bestand-/cwm/soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  208          bestand-/cwm/haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  209          bestand-sollwert  IS INITIAL    AND
  210          bestand-habenwert IS INITIAL.
  211  *     material without movements
  212
  213        IF  bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  214            bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  215            bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  216            bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  217            bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL  AND
  218            bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  219  *       material without movements / no stocks
  220          MOVE  'PA_NDZER'     TO  l_category.
  221        ELSE.
  222  *       material without movements / with stocks
  223          MOVE  'PA_NDSTO'     TO  l_category.
  224        ENDIF.
  225      ELSE.
  226  *     material with movements
  227  *
  228        IF      bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  229                bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  230                bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL.
  231  *       stock and value on start date are zero
  232          IF   bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  233               bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  234               bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  235  *         stock and value on end date are zero, too
  236            MOVE  'PA_WDZER'     TO  l_category.
  237          ELSE.
  238  *         stock and value on end date <> zero
  239            MOVE  'PA_WDZEW'     TO  l_category.
  240          ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    366
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  241        ELSE.
  242  *       stock and value on start date <> zero
  243          IF     bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  244                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  245                 bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  246  *         stock and value on end date are zero
  247            MOVE  'PA_WDWIZ'   TO  l_category.
  248          ELSEIF bestand-endmenge = bestand-anfmenge  AND
  249                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge = bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  AND
  250                 bestand-anfwert  = bestand-endwert.
  251  *         stock and value on end date are equal
  252            MOVE  'PA_WDWEW'   TO  l_category.
  253          ELSE.
  254  *         stock and values on end date are differnt
  255            MOVE  'PA_WDWUW'   TO  l_category.
  256          ENDIF.
  257        ENDIF.
  258      ENDIF.
  259  ENHANCEMENT-POINT ehp605_rm07mlbd_form_02_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
  260
  261  *   evaluate category and corresponding parameter settings  "n599218
  262      CHECK : NOT l_category IS INITIAL.                      "n599218
  263      ASSIGN (l_category)      TO  <l_fs>.                    "n599218
  264                                                              "n599218
  265      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  266        IF  <l_fs> IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  267          DELETE               bestand.                       "n599218
  268        ENDIF.                                                "n599218
  269      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
  270    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n599218
  271  ENDFORM.                               " LISTUMFANG

  340  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  341  *    F0000_CREATE_TABLE_G_T_ORGAN
  342  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  343
  344  FORM f0000_create_table_g_t_organ
  345                     USING     l_f_error TYPE stype_organ-keytype.
  346
  347    DATA: l_ra_bukrs TYPE RANGE OF bukrs,                      "3116194
  348          l_bukrs    TYPE bukrs.                               "3116194
  349
  350  * at least on of these 3 range tables must be filled for the creation
  351  * of table g_t_organ
  352  * field  description         range table
  353  * -----  -----------         -----------
  354  * werks  plant               g_0000_ra_plant
  355  * bwkey  valuation area      g_0000_ra_bwkey
  356  * bukrs  company code        g_0000_ra_plant
  357
  358  * table g_t_organ must be empty
  359    CHECK : g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                           "n433765
  360
  361  * START OF CHANGE for note 1049935                         "n1049935
  362  * First check if there was a selection for company code    "n1049935
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    368
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  363  * then do the F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK only for necessary    "n1049935
  364  * selected items..                                         "n1049935
  365
  366  * select all plant from table t001w
  367    SELECT * FROM t001w        WHERE  werks  IN  g_0000_ra_werks.
  368
  369  *   check the valuation area
  370      CHECK : t001w-bwkey IN g_0000_ra_bwkey.
  371
  372  *   read the valuation area
  373      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001k
  374                               WHERE  bwkey  =  t001w-bwkey.
  375
  376      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  377
  378  *   company code is required ?
  379      CHECK : t001k-bukrs IN g_0000_ra_bukrs.
  380
  381      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001  WHERE  bukrs  =  t001k-bukrs.
  382
  383      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  384
  385
  386      PERFORM  f9000_auth_plant_check    USING  t001w-werks.
  387
  388  *   go on if the user has authority for this plant
  389      CHECK : g_flag_authority = 'X'.
  390  * END OF CHANGE for note 1049935                           "n1049935
  391
  392  *   create table g_t_organ_lean
  393      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_s_organ-werks,
  394             t001w-bwkey       TO  g_s_organ-bwkey,
  395             t001-bukrs        TO  g_s_organ-bukrs,
  396             t001-ktopl        TO  g_s_organ-ktopl,
  397             t001k-bwmod       TO  g_s_organ-bwmod,
  398             t001-waers        TO  g_s_organ-waers.
  399
  400  *   write 2 entries for the both search methods _
  401  *   1. with key   valuation area
  402  *   2. with key   plant
  403      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  g_s_organ
  404                               TO  g_t_organ.
  405      MOVE : c_bwkey           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  406             g_s_organ-bwkey   TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  407      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  408
  409      MOVE : c_werks           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  410           g_s_organ-werks     TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  411      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  412      CLEAR                    g_s_organ.
  413
  414  *   create the range tables for plants
  415      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_ra_werks-low,
  416             'I'               TO  g_ra_werks-sign,
  417             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_werks-option.
  418      APPEND                   g_ra_werks.
  419
  420  *   create the range tables for plants and valuation areas
  421      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  g_ra_bwkey-low,
  422             'I'               TO  g_ra_bwkey-sign,
  423             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_bwkey-option.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    369
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  424      APPEND                   g_ra_bwkey.
  425
  426  *   create the range table for company codes                "3116194
  427      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO l_ra_bukrs ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ra_bukr
       s>).
  428      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-low,
  429             'I'               TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-sign,
  430             'EQ'              TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-option.
  431    ENDSELECT.
  432
  433  * is table g_t_organ empty ?
  434    IF  g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                               "n433765
  435  *   no plants for selection found / process error message ?
  436      IF  l_f_error = c_error.
  437        MESSAGE e281.
  438  *     Kein Eintrag zur Selektion Buchungskreis Werk Lagerort vorhanden
  439      ENDIF.
  440    ELSE.
  441      SORT  g_t_organ          BY  keytype  keyfield  bwkey  werks.
  442      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_organ.
  443
  444      SORT                     g_ra_werks.
  445      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_werks.
  446
  447      SORT                     g_ra_bwkey.
  448      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bwkey.
  449    ENDIF.
  450
  451  ENDFORM.                     "f0000_create_table_g_t_organ

  453  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  454  *    F0300_GET_FIELDS
  455  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  456
  457  FORM f0300_get_fields.
  458
  459    DATA : l_f_type(01)        TYPE c.
  460
  461  * find out the fields of structure g_s_mseg_lean
  462    DESCRIBE FIELD g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_td.
  463
  464    LOOP AT g_t_td-names       INTO  g_s_nameinfo.
  465  *   select all entries who contain 'MSEG-' oder 'MKPF-'
  466      CASE  g_s_nameinfo-name(05).
  467        WHEN  'MKPF-'.
  468          MOVE    c_tilde      TO  g_s_nameinfo-name+4(01).
  469          MOVE    'MSEG'       TO  g_s_nameinfo-name(04).     "2963312
  470          APPEND  g_s_nameinfo-name
  471                               TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  472
  473        WHEN  'MSEG-'.
  474          MOVE  : g_s_nameinfo-name
  475                               TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname,
  476                  c_tilde      TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname+4(01).
  477          APPEND  g_s_mseg_fields        TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  478
  479        WHEN  OTHERS.
  480      ENDCASE.
  481    ENDLOOP.
  482                                                              "n1784874
  483                                                              "n599218 A
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    370
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  484    IF  g_flag_is_oil_active = 'X'.           "IS-OIL ?       "n599218 A
  485  *   the 2 IS-OIL specific data fields will be inserted into "n599218 A
  486  *   working table G_T_MSEG_FIELDS. Then these fields will   "n599218 A
  487  *   transported from database table MSEG, too               "n599218 A
  488      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLCALC'  TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  489      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLSKU'   TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  490    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218 A
  491                                                              "n1784874
  492
  493  * serious error if table g_t_mseg_field does not contain fields
  494    IF  g_t_mseg_fields[] IS INITIAL.                         "n599218
  495      MESSAGE e895                                     "#EC *    "n599218
  496        WITH 'Error, contact system administrator'.    "#EC *    "n599218
  497    ELSE.
  498      SORT                     g_t_mseg_fields.
  499      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM  g_t_mseg_fields.
  500    ENDIF.
  501
  502  ENDFORM.                     "f0300_get_fields.

  508  FORM f0500_append_ra_sobkz
  509                     USING     l_f_sobkz LIKE      mseg-sobkz.

  514           'I'                 TO  g_ra_sobkz-sign,

  520  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  521  *    F0600_CREATE_RANGE_LGORT
  522  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  523
  524  FORM f0600_create_range_lgort.
  525
  526    REFRESH                    g_ra_lgort.
  527    CLEAR                      g_ra_lgort.
  528
  529    IF      lgbst = 'X'.       "only Storage loc./batch stock
  530  *   copy the existing select-options
  531      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  532
  533  *   add an exclusion for storage location = space
  534      MOVE : 'E'               TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  535             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  536      APPEND                   g_ra_lgort.
  537
  538    ELSEIF  bwbst = 'X'.       "only valuated stocks
  539  *   copy the existing select-options
  540      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  541
  542    ELSEIF  sbbst = 'X'.       "only special stocks
  543      IF      sobkz  =  'O'  OR
  544              sobkz  =  'V'  OR
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    371
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  545              sobkz  =  'W'.
  546        MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  547  **     only records with storage location = space allowed
  548  *      MOVE : 'I'             TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  549  *             'EQ'            TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  550  *      APPEND                 g_ra_lgort.
  551      ELSE.
  552  *     Copy the existing select-options
  553        MOVE lgort[]             TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  554      ENDIF.
  555    ENDIF.
  556
  557  ENDFORM.                     "f0600_create_range_lgort

  911  * selection of material docs in database tables MKPF and MSEG

  937            AND mseg~werks       IN  g_ra_werks

  950      cl_abap_stack_temperature=>set_hot( ).
  951    ENDIF.

 1033           imchb-cinsm < 0 OR imchb-ceinm < 0 OR              "n1928950

 1053      APPEND LINES OF lt_imchb_tmp TO imchb.
 1054  *   due to the merge of mchb batches and mseg batches there will be
 1055  *   duplicate entries in imchb by now. They will be deleted. The
 1056  *   following sort makes sure that only lines without a quantity are
 1057  *   deleted by the 'delete adjacent duplicates' command.

 1059                               clabs cumlm cinsm ceinm cspem cretm.

 1278  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1279  *    F1100_CHECK_LGORT_SOKZG
 1280  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1281
 1282  FORM f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.
 1283    CLEAR                      g_flag_delete.
 1284  *   c) additional checks if valuated stock is required
 1285    IF  bwbst = 'X'.
 1286  *     check fields sobkz and kzwbs for valuated stocks
 1287      IF      g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  c_space  OR
 1288              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'O'      OR
 1289              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'V'      OR
 1290              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'W'.                    "n435403
 1291  *       OK : special stock indicator = ' ', 'O', 'W' or 'V'
 1292      ELSEIF  g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'A'  OR
 1293              g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'M'.
 1294  *       ok : document with valuated special stock
 1295      ELSE.
 1296        MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1297      ENDIF.
 1298
 1299      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1300  * GA1551829
 1301  *     A&D subcontracting valuated stock = 'F' or 'R'
 1302      IF g_flag_delete IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1303         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1304           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1305        IF g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws IS NOT INITIAL.
 1306          CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1307        ELSE.
 1308  *         before note 1592894, automatic 541 line has empty KZBWS
 1309          CALL FUNCTION 'GET_BUSTR_FROM_MOVEMENT_TYPE'
 1310            EXPORTING
 1311              bwart    = g_s_mseg_lean-bwart
 1312            IMPORTING
 1313              bustr    = gv_bustr_tp
 1314            EXCEPTIONS
 1315              no_entry = 1
 1316              OTHERS   = 2.
 1317          IF gv_bustr_tp EQ cl_adsub_constants=>bustr_tp.
 1318            CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1319          ENDIF.
 1320        ENDIF.
 1321      ENDIF.
 1322      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1323
 1324  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1325
 1326    ELSE.
 1327  *   b) check the combination of special stock indicator and
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    384
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1328  *      storage location
 1329      IF       g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'O'  OR
 1330               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'V'  OR
 1331               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'W'.
 1332        "do nothing allow entries with a storage location
 1333      ELSEIF   g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'T'.               "SIT
 1334  *     these entries must not have a storage location
 1335        IF  NOT g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1336          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1337        ENDIF.
 1338      ELSE.
 1339  *     the others entries should have a storage location
 1340        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1341          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1342        ENDIF.
 1343      ENDIF.
 1344
 1345      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1346  * GA1551829
 1347  * A&D subcontracting stock: 'C', 'F', 'I', 'J' or 'R'
 1348  * these entries must not have a storage location
 1349      IF g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL AND
 1350         g_flag_delete       IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1351         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>c OR
 1352           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1353           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>i OR
 1354           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>j OR
 1355           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1356        CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1357      ENDIF.
 1358      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1359
 1360  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_02 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1361
 1362    ENDIF.
 1363
 1364  ENDFORM.                     "f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.

 1416  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1417  *    F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK
 1418  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1419
 1420  FORM f9000_auth_plant_check
 1421                     USING     l_f_werks LIKE marc-werks.
 1422
 1423    CLEAR                      g_flag_authority.
 1424    ADD  1                     TO  g_f_cnt_before.
 1425
 1426    READ TABLE g_t_auth_plant  WITH KEY
 1427                               werks = l_f_werks BINARY SEARCH.
 1428
 1429    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1430  *   plant found in buffer; take the result from the buffer
 1431      MOVE  g_t_auth_plant-ok            TO  g_flag_authority.
 1432    ELSE.
 1433  *   new plant / do the authority check / save result in buffer table
 1434      AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'M_MSEG_WMB'
 1435                      ID 'ACTVT' FIELD actvt03
 1436                      ID 'WERKS' FIELD  l_f_werks.
 1437
 1438      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1439        MOVE : 'X'             TO  g_t_auth_plant-ok,
 1440               'X'             TO  g_flag_authority.
 1441      ELSE.
 1442        CLEAR : g_t_auth_plant-ok, g_flag_authority.
 1443      ENDIF.
 1444
 1445      MOVE  l_f_werks          TO  g_t_auth_plant-werks.
 1446      APPEND                   g_t_auth_plant.
 1447      SORT                     g_t_auth_plant.
 1448    ENDIF.
 1449
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    386
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1450    IF  g_flag_authority = 'X'.
 1451      ADD  1                   TO  g_f_cnt_after.
 1452    ENDIF.
 1453
 1454  ENDFORM.                     "f9000_authority_check_plant

 1472        MESSAGE s124.   "Wegen fehlender Berechtigung ist ...
 1473    ENDCASE.
 1474

 1500
 1501  FORM f9300_read_organ
 1502                     USING     l_f_keytype   LIKE g_s_organ-keytype
 1503                               l_f_keyfield  LIKE g_s_organ-keyfield.
 1504
 1505  * buffer
 1506    STATICS : l_s_old      TYPE      stype_organ,
 1507              l_9300_subrc LIKE      sy-subrc.
 1508
 1509    IF  l_f_keytype   =  l_s_old-keytype  AND
 1510        l_f_keyfield  =  l_s_old-keyfield.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    387
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1511  *   the same key : take the data from the buffer
 1512      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  l_s_old        TO  g_s_organ.
 1513      MOVE  l_9300_subrc                 TO  sy-subrc.
 1514    ELSE.
 1515  *   the key has changed : read in table g_t_organ
 1516      READ TABLE g_t_organ     WITH KEY
 1517                               keytype   =  l_f_keytype
 1518                               keyfield  =  l_f_keyfield
 1519                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1520
 1521      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1522  *     entry found
 1523        MOVE-CORRESPONDING : g_t_organ   TO  g_s_organ,
 1524                             g_t_organ   TO  l_s_old.
 1525        CLEAR                            l_9300_subrc.
 1526      ELSE.
 1527  *     entry not found / fill the buffer
 1528        CLEAR : l_s_old,       g_s_organ.
 1529        MOVE  : sy-subrc       TO  l_9300_subrc,
 1530                l_f_keytype    TO  l_s_old-keytype,
 1531                l_f_keyfield   TO  l_s_old-keyfield.
 1532      ENDIF.
 1533    ENDIF.
 1534
 1535  ENDFORM.                     "f9300_read_organ

 1550  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1551  *    f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1552  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1553
 1554  FORM f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1555           USING  l_s_belege   TYPE  stype_belege
 1556                  l_f_tabname  TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1557
 1558    DATA : l_f_fieldname       TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1559    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs_field>.
 1560
 1561  * clear the table with the color information
 1562    REFRESH color. CLEAR color.
 1563
 1564    LOOP AT g_t_color_fields.
 1565      CONCATENATE  l_f_tabname
 1566                   '-'
 1567                   g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1568                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 1569      ASSIGN (l_f_fieldname)   TO  <l_fs_field>.
 1570
 1571      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    388
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1572
 1573      MOVE : g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1574                               TO  color-fieldname,
 1575             0                 TO  color-color-int.
 1576
 1577  *   the color and the sign of this numeric field depend on the
 1578  *   debit/credit-indicator
 1579      CASE    l_s_belege-shkzg.
 1580        WHEN  'H'.
 1581          color-color-col = '6'.         "red
 1582          APPEND color.
 1583
 1584          IF  g_t_color_fields-type  <>  'C'.
 1585            COMPUTE : <l_fs_field> = <l_fs_field> * -1.
 1586          ENDIF.
 1587
 1588        WHEN  'S'.
 1589          color-color-col = '5'.         "green
 1590          APPEND color.
 1591      ENDCASE.
 1592    ENDLOOP.
 1593
 1594  * customizing : set the color information
 1595    IF  g_cust_color  = 'X'.
 1596  *   default : colorize the numeric fields
 1597      MOVE  color[]            TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_feld.
 1598    ELSE.
 1599  *   the performant way : colorize the line on when GI
 1600      IF  l_s_belege-shkzg = 'H'.
 1601        MOVE  'C21'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "grey
 1602      ELSE.
 1603        MOVE  'C20'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "light grey
 1604      ENDIF.
 1605    ENDIF.
 1606
 1607  ENDFORM.                     "f9500_set_color_and_sign

 1765  FORM tpc_check_get_all_cc.                                  "n486477
 1766                                                              "n486477
 1767  * select the matching plants from T001W                     "n486477
 1768    SELECT werks bwkey         FROM  t001w                    "n486477
 1769           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_t001w       "n486477
 1770           WHERE  werks IN werks.                             "n486477
 1771                                                              "n486477
 1772    IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                  "n486477
 1773      SORT  g_t_t001w          BY  werks bwkey.               "n486477
 1774    ELSE.                                                     "n486477
 1775      SET CURSOR               FIELD  'WERKS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1776  *   Plant & does not exist                                  "n486477
 1777      MESSAGE e892             WITH   werks-low.              "n486477
 1778    ENDIF.                                                    "n486477
 1779                                                              "n486477

 1781  *   select the matching valuation areas and comany codes    "n486477
 1782      SELECT SINGLE bwkey bukrs FROM  t001k                   "n486477
 1783           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF g_s_t001k             "n486477
 1784           WHERE  bwkey  =  g_s_t001w-bwkey                   "n486477
 1785             AND  bukrs  IN bukrs.                            "n486477
 1786                                                              "n486477
 1787      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n486477
 1788        MOVE  g_s_t001k-bukrs  TO  g_s_bukrs-bukrs.           "n486477
 1789        COLLECT  g_s_bukrs     INTO  g_t_bukrs.               "n486477
 1790      ELSE.                                                   "n486477
 1791        SET CURSOR             FIELD  'WERKS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1792        MESSAGE  e283          WITH   g_s_t001w-werks.        "n486477
 1793      ENDIF.                                                  "n486477
 1794    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n486477
 1795                                                              "n486477
 1796  ENDFORM.                     "tpc_check_get_all_cc          "n486477

 1948  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1949  FORM add_aridx_doc_to_g_t_mseg_lean .
 1950  * Eliminate dublettes from the archive and tranfer data       "n1481757
 1951  * into working ITAB                                           "n1481757
 1952    READ TABLE g_t_mseg_lean   INTO g_s_mseg_lean             "n1481757
 1953                               WITH KEY mblnr = xmseg-mblnr   "n1481757
 1954                               mjahr = xmseg-mjahr            "n1481757
 1955                               zeile = xmseg-zeile            "n1481757
 1956                               BINARY SEARCH.                 "n1481757
 1957                                                              "n1481757
 1958    CASE  sy-subrc.                                           "n1481757
 1959      WHEN  0.                                                "n1481757
 1960  *       MM doc is available from database -> ignore it        "n1481757
 1961                                                              "n1481757
 1962      WHEN  4.                                                "n1481757
 1963  *       MM doc not found -> insert entry                      "n1481757
 1964        MOVE  sy-tabix       TO  g_f_tabix.                   "n1481757
 1965        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1966          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1967          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1968                                                              "n1481757
 1969        INSERT g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_mseg_lean INDEX  g_f_tabix. "n148175
       7
 1970        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1971                                                              "n1481757
 1972      WHEN  8.                                                "n1481757
 1973  *       MM doc not found / key to high -> append entry        "n1481757
 1974        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1975          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1976          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1977                                                              "n1481757
 1978        APPEND g_s_mseg_lean TO g_t_mseg_lean.                "n1481757
 1979        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1980                                                              "n1481757
 1981    ENDCASE.                                                  "n1481757
 1982                                                              "n1481757
 1983                                                              "n1481757

 2225         aind_str1~itype                                      "n1481757

 2231             AND aind_str1~archindex = pa_aistr               "n1481757
 2232             AND object = 'MM_MATBEL'                         "n1481757
 2233             AND active = 'X'.                                "n1481757
 2234  * there must be one entry                                   "n1481757

 2247  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

 2250  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or                                 "n1481757
 2251              USING    uht_mmdocs_arch
 2252              CHANGING ct_mseg_key TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2253                       ct_mseg_or TYPE stab_mseg_xauto.
 2254    " c_ra_xauto.
 2255
 2256    DATA: lt_mseg_key       TYPE stab_mseg_xauto,
 2257          lt_mseg_key_group LIKE lt_mseg_key.
 2258
 2259    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_group,
 2260             mblnr LIKE mkpf-mblnr,
 2261             mjahr LIKE mkpf-mjahr,
 2262           END OF ts_group.
 2263
 2264    DATA: ls_group_new TYPE ts_group,
 2265          ls_group_old TYPE ts_group.
 2266
 2267  *data: lt_ra_xauto like gt_ra_xauto.
 2268
 2269    FIELD-SYMBOLS  <ls_mseg_key> LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key.
 2270
 2271  *-----------------------------------------------------------------------
       *
 2272
 2273    MOVE ct_mseg_key[] TO lt_mseg_key[].
 2274    REFRESH ct_mseg_key.
 2275
 2276  *APPEND c_ra_xauto to lt_ra_xauto.
 2277
 2278    SORT lt_mseg_key BY mblnr mjahr zeile.
 2279
 2280    LOOP AT lt_mseg_key ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_key>.
 2281      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_key> TO ls_group_new.
 2282
 2283      IF ls_group_new <> ls_group_old.
 2284        PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2285  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2286                CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
 2287                          lt_mseg_key
 2288                          ct_mseg_or.
 2289
 2290        MOVE ls_group_new TO ls_group_old.
 2291        REFRESH lt_mseg_key_group.
 2292      ENDIF.
 2293
 2294      APPEND <ls_mseg_key>  TO lt_mseg_key_group.
 2295
 2296    ENDLOOP.
 2297
 2298    PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2299  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2300               CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
