 4573  * begin of note 2120566                                        "v2120566
 4574  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4575  *&      Form  wesperr_aussortieren
 4576  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4577  *       Delete the non-valuated GR blocked stock for special stock OVW *
 4578  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*

  177  FORM listumfang.
  178
  179    DATA : l_category(08)      TYPE c.                        "n599218
  180    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs>.                                   "n599218
  181                                                              "n599218
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    665
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  182  * carry out the check according the list categories in the  "n599218
  183  * case at least one category is not active                  "n599218
  184    CHECK : NOT g_cnt_empty_parameter IS INITIAL.             "n599218
  185  *                                                           "n599218
  186  * cat. I docs I stock on   I    I stock on I Parameter      "n599218
  187  *      I      I start date I    I end date I                "n599218
  188  * -----+------+------------+----+----------+----------      "n599218
  189  *  1   I yes  I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_wdzer       "n599218
  190  *  2   I yes  I =  zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdzew       "n599218
  191  *  3   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I =  zero  I pa_wdwiz       "n599218
  192  *  4   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdwuw       "n599218
  193  *  5   I yes  I <> zero    I =  I <> zero  I pa_wdwew       "n599218
  194  *      I      I            I    I          I                "n599218
  195  *  6   I no   I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_ndzer       "n599218
  196  *  7   I no   I <> zero    I =  I <> zero  I pa_ndsto       "n599218
  197    LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07
       MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_FORM_02_01\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer
       =>get_field( ).
  198                                                              "n599218
  199  * process table BESTAND                                     "n599218
  200    LOOP AT bestand.                                          "n599218
  201      CLEAR                    l_category.                    "n599218
  202                                                              "n599218
  203  *   determine the category of each entry                    "n599218
  204
  205      IF  bestand-soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  206          bestand-haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  207          bestand-/cwm/soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  208          bestand-/cwm/haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  209          bestand-sollwert  IS INITIAL    AND
  210          bestand-habenwert IS INITIAL.
  211  *     material without movements
  212
  213        IF  bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  214            bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  215            bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  216            bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  217            bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL  AND
  218            bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  219  *       material without movements / no stocks
  220          MOVE  'PA_NDZER'     TO  l_category.
  221        ELSE.
  222  *       material without movements / with stocks
  223          MOVE  'PA_NDSTO'     TO  l_category.
  224        ENDIF.
  225      ELSE.
  226  *     material with movements
  227  *
  228        IF      bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  229                bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  230                bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL.
  231  *       stock and value on start date are zero
  232          IF   bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  233               bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  234               bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  235  *         stock and value on end date are zero, too
  236            MOVE  'PA_WDZER'     TO  l_category.
  237          ELSE.
  238  *         stock and value on end date <> zero
  239            MOVE  'PA_WDZEW'     TO  l_category.
  240          ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    666
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  241        ELSE.
  242  *       stock and value on start date <> zero
  243          IF     bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  244                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  245                 bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  246  *         stock and value on end date are zero
  247            MOVE  'PA_WDWIZ'   TO  l_category.
  248          ELSEIF bestand-endmenge = bestand-anfmenge  AND
  249                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge = bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  AND
  250                 bestand-anfwert  = bestand-endwert.
  251  *         stock and value on end date are equal
  252            MOVE  'PA_WDWEW'   TO  l_category.
  253          ELSE.
  254  *         stock and values on end date are differnt
  255            MOVE  'PA_WDWUW'   TO  l_category.
  256          ENDIF.
  257        ENDIF.
  258      ENDIF.
  259  ENHANCEMENT-POINT ehp605_rm07mlbd_form_02_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
  260
  261  *   evaluate category and corresponding parameter settings  "n599218
  262      CHECK : NOT l_category IS INITIAL.                      "n599218
  263      ASSIGN (l_category)      TO  <l_fs>.                    "n599218
  264                                                              "n599218
  265      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  266        IF  <l_fs> IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  267          DELETE               bestand.                       "n599218
  268        ENDIF.                                                "n599218
  269      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
  270    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n599218
  271  ENDFORM.                               " LISTUMFANG

  340  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  341  *    F0000_CREATE_TABLE_G_T_ORGAN
  342  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  343
  344  FORM f0000_create_table_g_t_organ
  345                     USING     l_f_error TYPE stype_organ-keytype.
  346
  347    DATA: l_ra_bukrs TYPE RANGE OF bukrs,                      "3116194
  348          l_bukrs    TYPE bukrs.                               "3116194
  349
  350  * at least on of these 3 range tables must be filled for the creation
  351  * of table g_t_organ
  352  * field  description         range table
  353  * -----  -----------         -----------
  354  * werks  plant               g_0000_ra_plant
  355  * bwkey  valuation area      g_0000_ra_bwkey
  356  * bukrs  company code        g_0000_ra_plant
  357
  358  * table g_t_organ must be empty
  359    CHECK : g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                           "n433765
  360
  361  * START OF CHANGE for note 1049935                         "n1049935
  362  * First check if there was a selection for company code    "n1049935
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    668
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  363  * then do the F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK only for necessary    "n1049935
  364  * selected items..                                         "n1049935
  365
  366  * select all plant from table t001w
  367    SELECT * FROM t001w        WHERE  werks  IN  g_0000_ra_werks.
  368
  369  *   check the valuation area
  370      CHECK : t001w-bwkey IN g_0000_ra_bwkey.
  371
  372  *   read the valuation area
  373      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001k
  374                               WHERE  bwkey  =  t001w-bwkey.
  375
  376      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  377
  378  *   company code is required ?
  379      CHECK : t001k-bukrs IN g_0000_ra_bukrs.
  380
  381      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001  WHERE  bukrs  =  t001k-bukrs.
  382
  383      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  384
  385
  386      PERFORM  f9000_auth_plant_check    USING  t001w-werks.
  387
  388  *   go on if the user has authority for this plant
  389      CHECK : g_flag_authority = 'X'.
  390  * END OF CHANGE for note 1049935                           "n1049935
  391
  392  *   create table g_t_organ_lean
  393      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_s_organ-werks,
  394             t001w-bwkey       TO  g_s_organ-bwkey,
  395             t001-bukrs        TO  g_s_organ-bukrs,
  396             t001-ktopl        TO  g_s_organ-ktopl,
  397             t001k-bwmod       TO  g_s_organ-bwmod,
  398             t001-waers        TO  g_s_organ-waers.
  399
  400  *   write 2 entries for the both search methods _
  401  *   1. with key   valuation area
  402  *   2. with key   plant
  403      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  g_s_organ
  404                               TO  g_t_organ.
  405      MOVE : c_bwkey           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  406             g_s_organ-bwkey   TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  407      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  408
  409      MOVE : c_werks           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  410           g_s_organ-werks     TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  411      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  412      CLEAR                    g_s_organ.
  413
  414  *   create the range tables for plants
  415      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_ra_werks-low,
  416             'I'               TO  g_ra_werks-sign,
  417             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_werks-option.
  418      APPEND                   g_ra_werks.
  419
  420  *   create the range tables for plants and valuation areas
  421      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  g_ra_bwkey-low,
  422             'I'               TO  g_ra_bwkey-sign,
  423             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_bwkey-option.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  424      APPEND                   g_ra_bwkey.

  453  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  454  *    F0300_GET_FIELDS
  455  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  456
  457  FORM f0300_get_fields.
  458
  459    DATA : l_f_type(01)        TYPE c.
  460
  461  * find out the fields of structure g_s_mseg_lean
  462    DESCRIBE FIELD g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_td.
  463
  464    LOOP AT g_t_td-names       INTO  g_s_nameinfo.
  465  *   select all entries who contain 'MSEG-' oder 'MKPF-'
  466      CASE  g_s_nameinfo-name(05).
  467        WHEN  'MKPF-'.
  468          MOVE    c_tilde      TO  g_s_nameinfo-name+4(01).
  469          MOVE    'MSEG'       TO  g_s_nameinfo-name(04).     "2963312
  470          APPEND  g_s_nameinfo-name
  471                               TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  472
  473        WHEN  'MSEG-'.
  474          MOVE  : g_s_nameinfo-name
  475                               TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname,
  476                  c_tilde      TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname+4(01).
  477          APPEND  g_s_mseg_fields        TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  478
  479        WHEN  OTHERS.
  480      ENDCASE.
  481    ENDLOOP.
  482                                                              "n1784874
  483                                                              "n599218 A
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    670
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  484    IF  g_flag_is_oil_active = 'X'.           "IS-OIL ?       "n599218 A
  485  *   the 2 IS-OIL specific data fields will be inserted into "n599218 A
  486  *   working table G_T_MSEG_FIELDS. Then these fields will   "n599218 A
  487  *   transported from database table MSEG, too               "n599218 A
  488      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLCALC'  TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  489      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLSKU'   TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  490    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218 A
  491                                                              "n1784874
  492
  493  * serious error if table g_t_mseg_field does not contain fields
  494    IF  g_t_mseg_fields[] IS INITIAL.                         "n599218
  495      MESSAGE e895                                     "#EC *    "n599218
  496        WITH 'Error, contact system administrator'.    "#EC *    "n599218
  497    ELSE.
  498      SORT                     g_t_mseg_fields.
  499      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM  g_t_mseg_fields.
  500    ENDIF.
  501
  502  ENDFORM.                     "f0300_get_fields.

  520  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  521  *    F0600_CREATE_RANGE_LGORT
  522  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  523
  524  FORM f0600_create_range_lgort.
  525
  526    REFRESH                    g_ra_lgort.
  527    CLEAR                      g_ra_lgort.
  528
  529    IF      lgbst = 'X'.       "only Storage loc./batch stock
  530  *   copy the existing select-options
  531      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  532
  533  *   add an exclusion for storage location = space
  534      MOVE : 'E'               TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  535             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  536      APPEND                   g_ra_lgort.
  537
  538    ELSEIF  bwbst = 'X'.       "only valuated stocks
  539  *   copy the existing select-options
  540      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  541
  542    ELSEIF  sbbst = 'X'.       "only special stocks
  543      IF      sobkz  =  'O'  OR
  544              sobkz  =  'V'  OR
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    671
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  545              sobkz  =  'W'.
  546        MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  547  **     only records with storage location = space allowed
  548  *      MOVE : 'I'             TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  549  *             'EQ'            TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  550  *      APPEND                 g_ra_lgort.
  551      ELSE.
  552  *     Copy the existing select-options
  553        MOVE lgort[]             TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  554      ENDIF.
  555    ENDIF.
  556
  557  ENDFORM.                     "f0600_create_range_lgort

  884                                                              "n599218

  911  * selection of material docs in database tables MKPF and MSEG

  966    ENDIF.

 1278  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1279  *    F1100_CHECK_LGORT_SOKZG
 1280  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1281
 1282  FORM f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.
 1283    CLEAR                      g_flag_delete.
 1284  *   c) additional checks if valuated stock is required
 1285    IF  bwbst = 'X'.
 1286  *     check fields sobkz and kzwbs for valuated stocks
 1287      IF      g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  c_space  OR
 1288              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'O'      OR
 1289              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'V'      OR
 1290              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'W'.                    "n435403
 1291  *       OK : special stock indicator = ' ', 'O', 'W' or 'V'
 1292      ELSEIF  g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'A'  OR
 1293              g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'M'.
 1294  *       ok : document with valuated special stock
 1295      ELSE.
 1296        MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1297      ENDIF.
 1298
 1299      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1300  * GA1551829
 1301  *     A&D subcontracting valuated stock = 'F' or 'R'
 1302      IF g_flag_delete IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1303         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1304           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1305        IF g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws IS NOT INITIAL.
 1306          CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1307        ELSE.
 1308  *         before note 1592894, automatic 541 line has empty KZBWS
 1309          CALL FUNCTION 'GET_BUSTR_FROM_MOVEMENT_TYPE'
 1310            EXPORTING
 1311              bwart    = g_s_mseg_lean-bwart
 1312            IMPORTING
 1313              bustr    = gv_bustr_tp
 1314            EXCEPTIONS
 1315              no_entry = 1
 1316              OTHERS   = 2.
 1317          IF gv_bustr_tp EQ cl_adsub_constants=>bustr_tp.
 1318            CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1319          ENDIF.
 1320        ENDIF.
 1321      ENDIF.
 1322      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1323
 1324  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1325
 1326    ELSE.
 1327  *   b) check the combination of special stock indicator and
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    684
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1328  *      storage location
 1329      IF       g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'O'  OR
 1330               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'V'  OR
 1331               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'W'.
 1332        "do nothing allow entries with a storage location
 1333      ELSEIF   g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'T'.               "SIT
 1334  *     these entries must not have a storage location
 1335        IF  NOT g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1336          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1337        ENDIF.
 1338      ELSE.
 1339  *     the others entries should have a storage location
 1340        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1341          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1342        ENDIF.
 1343      ENDIF.
 1344
 1345      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1346  * GA1551829
 1347  * A&D subcontracting stock: 'C', 'F', 'I', 'J' or 'R'
 1348  * these entries must not have a storage location
 1349      IF g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL AND
 1350         g_flag_delete       IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1351         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>c OR
 1352           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1353           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>i OR
 1354           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>j OR
 1355           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1356        CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1357      ENDIF.
 1358      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1359
 1360  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_02 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1361
 1362    ENDIF.
 1363
 1364  ENDFORM.                     "f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.

 1416  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1417  *    F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK
 1418  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1419
 1420  FORM f9000_auth_plant_check
 1421                     USING     l_f_werks LIKE marc-werks.
 1422
 1423    CLEAR                      g_flag_authority.
 1424    ADD  1                     TO  g_f_cnt_before.
 1425
 1426    READ TABLE g_t_auth_plant  WITH KEY
 1427                               werks = l_f_werks BINARY SEARCH.
 1428
 1429    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1430  *   plant found in buffer; take the result from the buffer
 1431      MOVE  g_t_auth_plant-ok            TO  g_flag_authority.
 1432    ELSE.
 1433  *   new plant / do the authority check / save result in buffer table
 1434      AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'M_MSEG_WMB'
 1435                      ID 'ACTVT' FIELD actvt03
 1436                      ID 'WERKS' FIELD  l_f_werks.
 1437
 1438      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1439        MOVE : 'X'             TO  g_t_auth_plant-ok,
 1440               'X'             TO  g_flag_authority.
 1441      ELSE.
 1442        CLEAR : g_t_auth_plant-ok, g_flag_authority.
 1443      ENDIF.
 1444
 1445      MOVE  l_f_werks          TO  g_t_auth_plant-werks.
 1446      APPEND                   g_t_auth_plant.
 1447      SORT                     g_t_auth_plant.
 1448    ENDIF.
 1449
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    686
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1450    IF  g_flag_authority = 'X'.
 1451      ADD  1                   TO  g_f_cnt_after.
 1452    ENDIF.
 1453
 1454  ENDFORM.                     "f9000_authority_check_plant
 1455
 1456  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1457  *     F9100_AUTH_PLANT_RESULT
 1458  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1459
 1460  FORM  f9100_auth_plant_result.
 1461
 1462    CASE    g_f_cnt_after.     "results ?
 1463      WHEN  g_f_cnt_before.
 1464  *     user has authority for all plants in G_RA_WERKS
 1465      WHEN  0.
 1466  *     user has no authority for the plants in G_RA_WERKS
 1467        MESSAGE s124.   "Wegen fehlender Berechtigung ist ...
 1468  *     leave report to selection screen
 1469        PERFORM                 anforderungsbild.
 1470      WHEN  OTHERS.
 1471  *     user has authority for only a part of the plants
 1472        MESSAGE s124.   "Wegen fehlender Berechtigung ist ...
 1473    ENDCASE.
 1474
 1475  * clear the counter fields for the next check
 1476    CLEAR : g_f_cnt_after, g_f_cnt_before.
 1477
 1478  ENDFORM.                     "f9100_auth_plant_result

 1498  *    F9300_READ_ORGAN
 1499  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1500
 1501  FORM f9300_read_organ
 1502                     USING     l_f_keytype   LIKE g_s_organ-keytype
 1503                               l_f_keyfield  LIKE g_s_organ-keyfield.
 1504
 1505  * buffer
 1506    STATICS : l_s_old      TYPE      stype_organ,
 1507              l_9300_subrc LIKE      sy-subrc.
 1508
 1509    IF  l_f_keytype   =  l_s_old-keytype  AND
 1510        l_f_keyfield  =  l_s_old-keyfield.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    687
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1511  *   the same key : take the data from the buffer
 1512      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  l_s_old        TO  g_s_organ.
 1513      MOVE  l_9300_subrc                 TO  sy-subrc.
 1514    ELSE.
 1515  *   the key has changed : read in table g_t_organ
 1516      READ TABLE g_t_organ     WITH KEY
 1517                               keytype   =  l_f_keytype
 1518                               keyfield  =  l_f_keyfield
 1519                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1520
 1521      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1522  *     entry found
 1523        MOVE-CORRESPONDING : g_t_organ   TO  g_s_organ,
 1524                             g_t_organ   TO  l_s_old.
 1525        CLEAR                            l_9300_subrc.
 1526      ELSE.
 1527  *     entry not found / fill the buffer
 1528        CLEAR : l_s_old,       g_s_organ.
 1529        MOVE  : sy-subrc       TO  l_9300_subrc,
 1530                l_f_keytype    TO  l_s_old-keytype,
 1531                l_f_keyfield   TO  l_s_old-keyfield.
 1532      ENDIF.
 1533    ENDIF.
 1534
 1535  ENDFORM.                     "f9300_read_organ

 1550  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1551  *    f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1552  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1553
 1554  FORM f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1555           USING  l_s_belege   TYPE  stype_belege
 1556                  l_f_tabname  TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1557
 1558    DATA : l_f_fieldname       TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1559    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs_field>.
 1560
 1561  * clear the table with the color information
 1562    REFRESH color. CLEAR color.
 1563
 1564    LOOP AT g_t_color_fields.
 1565      CONCATENATE  l_f_tabname
 1566                   '-'
 1567                   g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1568                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 1569      ASSIGN (l_f_fieldname)   TO  <l_fs_field>.
 1570
 1571      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    688
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1572
 1573      MOVE : g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1574                               TO  color-fieldname,
 1575             0                 TO  color-color-int.
 1576
 1577  *   the color and the sign of this numeric field depend on the
 1578  *   debit/credit-indicator
 1579      CASE    l_s_belege-shkzg.
 1580        WHEN  'H'.
 1581          color-color-col = '6'.         "red
 1582          APPEND color.
 1583
 1584          IF  g_t_color_fields-type  <>  'C'.
 1585            COMPUTE : <l_fs_field> = <l_fs_field> * -1.
 1586          ENDIF.
 1587
 1588        WHEN  'S'.
 1589          color-color-col = '5'.         "green
 1590          APPEND color.
 1591      ENDCASE.
 1592    ENDLOOP.
 1593
 1594  * customizing : set the color information
 1595    IF  g_cust_color  = 'X'.
 1596  *   default : colorize the numeric fields
 1597      MOVE  color[]            TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_feld.
 1598    ELSE.
 1599  *   the performant way : colorize the line on when GI
 1600      IF  l_s_belege-shkzg = 'H'.
 1601        MOVE  'C21'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "grey
 1602      ELSE.
 1603        MOVE  'C20'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "light grey
 1604      ENDIF.
 1605    ENDIF.
 1606
 1607  ENDFORM.                     "f9500_set_color_and_sign

 1760  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

 1762  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1763  *       text
 1764  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1765  FORM tpc_check_get_all_cc.                                  "n486477
 1766                                                              "n486477
 1767  * select the matching plants from T001W                     "n486477
 1768    SELECT werks bwkey         FROM  t001w                    "n486477
 1769           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_t001w       "n486477
 1770           WHERE  werks IN werks.                             "n486477
 1771                                                              "n486477
 1772    IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                  "n486477
 1773      SORT  g_t_t001w          BY  werks bwkey.               "n486477
 1774    ELSE.                                                     "n486477
 1775      SET CURSOR               FIELD  'WERKS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1776  *   Plant & does not exist                                  "n486477
 1777      MESSAGE e892             WITH   werks-low.              "n486477
 1778    ENDIF.                                                    "n486477
 1779                                                              "n486477
 1780    LOOP AT g_t_t001w          INTO  g_s_t001w.               "n486477
 1781  *   select the matching valuation areas and comany codes    "n486477
 1782      SELECT SINGLE bwkey bukrs FROM  t001k                   "n486477
 1783           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF g_s_t001k             "n486477
 1784           WHERE  bwkey  =  g_s_t001w-bwkey                   "n486477
 1785             AND  bukrs  IN bukrs.                            "n486477
 1786                                                              "n486477
 1787      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n486477
 1788        MOVE  g_s_t001k-bukrs  TO  g_s_bukrs-bukrs.           "n486477
 1789        COLLECT  g_s_bukrs     INTO  g_t_bukrs.               "n486477
 1790      ELSE.                                                   "n486477
 1791        SET CURSOR             FIELD  'WERKS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1792        MESSAGE  e283          WITH   g_s_t001w-werks.        "n486477
 1793      ENDIF.                                                  "n486477
 1794    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n486477

 1840  FORM process_archive_mm_doc .
 1841    DATA: g_flag_ok_mkpf(01) TYPE c,                          "n1481757
 1842          g_flag_ok_mseg(01) TYPE c.                          "n1481757
 1843                                                              "n1481757
 1844    BREAK-POINT ID mmim_rep_mb5b.                             "n1481757
 1845  * the result of function module should be the keys for the  "n1481757
 1846  * archive                                                   "n1481757
 1847  * show the current activity and the progress                "n1481757
 1848    CALL FUNCTION 'SAPGUI_PROGRESS_INDICATOR'                 "n1481757
 1849      EXPORTING                                               "n1481757
 1850        text = TEXT-136.       "reading archive info records  "n1481757
 1851                                                              "n1481757
 1852    PERFORM  call_as_api_read_block_keys                      "n1481757
 1853                   TABLES    g_t_frange[]                     "n1481757
 1854                             g_t_as_key[].                    "n1481757
 1855                                                              "n1481757
 1856  * eliminate duplicates                                      "n1481757
 1857    SORT  g_t_as_key           BY  mblnr mjahr.               "n1481757
 1858    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_as_key                "n1481757
 1859                          COMPARING mblnr mjahr.              "n1481757
 1860                                                              "n1481757
 1861  * show the current activity and the progress                "n1481757
 1862    CALL FUNCTION 'SAPGUI_PROGRESS_INDICATOR'                 "n1481757
 1863      EXPORTING                                               "n1481757
 1864        text = TEXT-135.       "Reading MM docs in archive    "n1481757
 1865                                                              "n1481757
 1866  * get the full data of the MM documents from the AS archiv  "n1481757
 1867    LOOP AT g_t_as_key         INTO  g_s_as_key.              "n1481757
 1868                                                              "n1481757
 1869      REFRESH : xmkpf, xmseg.                                 "n1481757
 1870                                                              "n1481757
 1871      CALL FUNCTION 'ASH_MM_MATBEL_READ'                      "n1481757
 1872        EXPORTING                                             "n1481757
 1873          i_archivekey           = g_s_as_key-archivekey       "n1481757
 1874          i_offset               = g_s_as_key-archiveofs       "n1481757
 1875        TABLES                                                "n1481757
 1876          et_mkpf                = xmkpf                       "n1481757
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    693
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1877          et_mseg                = xmseg                       "n1481757
 1878        EXCEPTIONS                                            "n1481757
 1879          not_in_infostructure   = 1                          "n1481757
 1880          not_in_archive         = 2                          "n1481757
 1881          no_instructure_defined = 3                          "n1481757
 1882          OTHERS                 = 4.                         "n1481757
 1883                                                              "n1481757
 1884      CASE  sy-subrc.                                         "n1481757
 1885        WHEN  0.               " MM document found            "n1481757
 1886                                                              "n1481757
 1887        WHEN  1 OR 2.                                         "n1481757
 1888  *       this message will never be send here, it is only    "n1481757
 1889  *       here for the where-use list of the messages         "n1481757
 1890  *       using transcation SE91                              "n1481757
 1891          IF 'A' = 'B'.                                       "n1481757
 1892  *         BA 109 : No data object found for key &           "n1481757
 1893            MESSAGE e109(ba)   WITH  space.                   "n1481757
 1894          ENDIF.                                              "n1481757
 1895                                                              "n1481757
 1896          CLEAR                archive_messages.              "n1481757
 1897          MOVE : 'BA'          TO  archive_messages-msgid,    "n1481757
 1898                 '109'         TO  archive_messages-msgno.    "n1481757
 1899
 1900          DATA offset TYPE string.
 1901          offset = g_s_as_key-archiveofs.
 1902                                                              "n1481757
 1903          CONCATENATE g_s_as_key-mblnr                        "n1481757
 1904                      g_s_as_key-mjahr                        "n1481757
 1905                      g_s_as_key-archivekey                   "n1481757
 1906                               INTO  archive_messages-msgv1   "n1481757
 1907                               SEPARATED BY space.            "n1481757
 1908          APPEND               archive_messages.              "n1481757
 1909          CONTINUE.            " take the next entry          "n1481757
 1910                                                              "n1481757
 1911        WHEN OTHERS.                                          "n1481757
 1912          MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno   "n1481757
 1913            WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.         "n1481757
 1914      ENDCASE.                                                "n1481757
 1915                                                              "n1481757
 1916  *   process table with MM doc header                        "n1481757
 1917      LOOP AT xmkpf.                                          "n1481757
 1918  *      CHECK: xmkpf-budat IN datum.                         "n2110304
 1919  **     process the corresponding items                      "n1481757
 1920        LOOP AT xmseg                                         "n1481757
 1921          WHERE  mblnr = xmkpf-mblnr                          "n1481757
 1922            AND  mjahr = xmkpf-mjahr.                         "n1481757
 1923          CHECK: xmseg-bwart IN bwart.                        "n1481757
 1924          CHECK: xmseg-charg IN charg.                        "n1481757
 1925          CHECK: xmseg-lgort IN lgort.                        "n1481757
 1926          CHECK: xmseg-matnr IN matnr.                        "n1481757
 1927          IF bwbst IS INITIAL.                                "n1995040
 1928            CHECK: xmseg-sobkz = sobkz.                       "n1481757
 1929          ENDIF.                                              "n1995040
 1930          CHECK: xmseg-bukrs IN bukrs.                        "n1481757
 1931          CHECK: xmseg-bwart IN bwart.                        "n1481757
 1932
 1933          wa_hashtable-mblnr = xmseg-mblnr.                   "n1481757
 1934          wa_hashtable-mjahr = xmseg-mjahr.                   "n1481757
 1935                                                              "n1481757
 1936          INSERT wa_hashtable INTO TABLE ht_mmdocs_arch.      "n1481757
 1937                                                              "n1481757

 1938          PERFORM add_aridx_doc_to_g_t_mseg_lean.             "n1481757
 1939                                                              "n1481757

 1941      ENDLOOP.                                                "n1481757

 1949  FORM add_aridx_doc_to_g_t_mseg_lean .
 1950  * Eliminate dublettes from the archive and tranfer data       "n1481757
 1951  * into working ITAB                                           "n1481757
 1952    READ TABLE g_t_mseg_lean   INTO g_s_mseg_lean             "n1481757
 1953                               WITH KEY mblnr = xmseg-mblnr   "n1481757
 1954                               mjahr = xmseg-mjahr            "n1481757
 1955                               zeile = xmseg-zeile            "n1481757
 1956                               BINARY SEARCH.                 "n1481757
 1957                                                              "n1481757
 1958    CASE  sy-subrc.                                           "n1481757
 1959      WHEN  0.                                                "n1481757
 1960  *       MM doc is available from database -> ignore it        "n1481757
 1961                                                              "n1481757
 1962      WHEN  4.                                                "n1481757
 1963  *       MM doc not found -> insert entry                      "n1481757
 1964        MOVE  sy-tabix       TO  g_f_tabix.                   "n1481757
 1965        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1966          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1967          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1968                                                              "n1481757
 1969        INSERT g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_mseg_lean INDEX  g_f_tabix. "n148175
       7
 1970        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1971                                                              "n1481757
 1972      WHEN  8.                                                "n1481757
 1973  *       MM doc not found / key to high -> append entry        "n1481757
 1974        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1975          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1976          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1977                                                              "n1481757
 1978        APPEND g_s_mseg_lean TO g_t_mseg_lean.                "n1481757
 1979        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1980                                                              "n1481757
 1981    ENDCASE.                                                  "n1481757
 1982                                                              "n1481757
 1983                                                              "n1481757
 1984  ENDFORM.                    " ADD_ARIDX_DOC_TO_G_T_MSEG_LEAN

 2100                                                              "n1481757

 2110    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
 2111                                                              "n1481757

 2183  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2184  *&      Form  CALL_AS_API_READ_BLOCK_KEYS
 2185  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2186  FORM call_as_api_read_block_keys
 2187                  TABLES l_t_frange   TYPE  stab_frange       "n1481757
 2188                         l_t_as_key   TYPE  stab_as_key.      "n1481757
 2189                                                              "n1481757
 2190    PERFORM get_archive_field_catalogs.                       "n1481757
 2191                                                              "n1481757
 2192    MOVE   g_s_aind_str1_ais-skey   TO  g_f_afcat.            "n1481757
 2193                                                              "n1481757
 2194  * get the keys for the archive only                         "n1481757
 2195  * the type of the assigned table for "E_RESULTS" determines "n1481757
 2196  * the results                                               "n1481757
 2197  * AS_API_READ replaced with AS_API_SYSTEM_SELECT to         "v2244652
 2198  * select the archive directly via entered infostructure
 2199    CALL FUNCTION 'AS_API_SYSTEM_SELECT'
 2200      EXPORTING
 2201        i_infostruc         = pa_aistr
 2202        i_selections        = l_t_frange[]
 2203      IMPORTING
 2204        e_result            = l_t_as_key[]
 2205      EXCEPTIONS
 2206        parameters_invalid  = 1
 2207        infostruc_not_found = 2
 2208        OTHERS              = 3.                         "^2244652

 2221                                                              "n1481757
 2222  *   look for active archive info structures from the        "n1481757
 2223  *   customizing tables aind_str1 and aind_str2              "n1481757
 2224    SELECT aind_str1~archindex                  "#EC CI_BYPASS  "n1511550
 2225         aind_str1~itype                                      "n1481757
 2226         aind_str1~skey                                       "n1481757
 2227    INTO TABLE g_t_aind_str1_ais                              "n1481757

 2229      ON aind_str1~archindex = aind_str2~archindex            "n1481757
 2230           WHERE itype  = 'I'                                 "n1481757
 2231             AND aind_str1~archindex = pa_aistr               "n1481757
 2232             AND object = 'MM_MATBEL'                         "n1481757
 2233             AND active = 'X'.                                "n1481757
 2234  * there must be one entry                                   "n1481757
 2235    IF sy-dbcnt <> 1.                                         "n1481757

 2241    READ TABLE g_t_aind_str1_ais                              "n1481757

 2247  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2248  *&      Form  FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR
 2249  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2250  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or                                 "n1481757
 2251              USING    uht_mmdocs_arch
 2252              CHANGING ct_mseg_key TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2253                       ct_mseg_or TYPE stab_mseg_xauto.
 2254    " c_ra_xauto.
 2255
 2256    DATA: lt_mseg_key       TYPE stab_mseg_xauto,
 2257          lt_mseg_key_group LIKE lt_mseg_key.
 2258
 2259    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_group,
 2260             mblnr LIKE mkpf-mblnr,
 2261             mjahr LIKE mkpf-mjahr,
 2262           END OF ts_group.
 2263
 2264    DATA: ls_group_new TYPE ts_group,
 2265          ls_group_old TYPE ts_group.
 2266
 2267  *data: lt_ra_xauto like gt_ra_xauto.
 2268
 2269    FIELD-SYMBOLS  <ls_mseg_key> LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key.
 2270
 2271  *-----------------------------------------------------------------------
       *
 2272
 2273    MOVE ct_mseg_key[] TO lt_mseg_key[].
 2274    REFRESH ct_mseg_key.
 2275
 2276  *APPEND c_ra_xauto to lt_ra_xauto.
 2277
 2278    SORT lt_mseg_key BY mblnr mjahr zeile.
 2279
 2280    LOOP AT lt_mseg_key ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_key>.
 2281      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_key> TO ls_group_new.
 2282
 2283      IF ls_group_new <> ls_group_old.
 2284        PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2285  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2286                CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
 2287                          lt_mseg_key
 2288                          ct_mseg_or.
 2289
 2290        MOVE ls_group_new TO ls_group_old.
 2291        REFRESH lt_mseg_key_group.
 2292      ENDIF.
 2293
 2294      APPEND <ls_mseg_key>  TO lt_mseg_key_group.
 2295
 2296    ENDLOOP.
 2297
 2298    PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2299  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2300               CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    700
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2301                         lt_mseg_key
 2302                         ct_mseg_or.
 2303  ENDFORM.                    " FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR         "n1481757
 2304  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2305  *&      Form  FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR_GROUP
 2306  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2307  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group                           "n1481757
 2308  *            using    ut_ra_xauto       like gt_ra_xauto
 2309              CHANGING ct_mseg_key_group TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2310                       ct_mseg_key       TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2311                       ct_mseg_or        TYPE stab_mseg_xauto.
 2312
 2313  *--------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2314    DATA: ls_mseg_key_group LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key_group,
 2315          ls_mseg_or        LIKE LINE OF  ct_mseg_or.
 2316  *      lt_mseg_archiv Like mseg.
 2317
 2318    DATA : BEGIN OF lt_mseg_archiv  OCCURS 0.
 2319             INCLUDE STRUCTURE   mseg.
 2320    DATA : END OF lt_mseg_archiv.
 2321
 2322    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <ls_mseg_archiv> LIKE LINE OF lt_mseg_archiv.
 2323
 2324  *--------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2325
 2326    READ TABLE ct_mseg_key_group INTO ls_mseg_key_group
 2327        INDEX 1.
 2328
 2329    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2330      RETURN.
 2331    ENDIF.
 2332
 2333    READ TABLE  ht_mmdocs_arch INTO wa_hashtable
 2334       WITH TABLE KEY mblnr = ls_mseg_key_group-mblnr
 2335                      mjahr = ls_mseg_key_group-mjahr.
 2336
 2337  * check if there are mm docs from the archive
 2338
 2339    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2340      APPEND LINES OF ct_mseg_key_group TO g_t_mseg_key_te.
 2341      RETURN.
 2342    ENDIF.
 2343
 2344    CALL FUNCTION 'ASH_MM_MATBEL_READ'
 2345      EXPORTING
 2346        i_archivekey   = wa_hashtable-archivekey
 2347        i_offset       = wa_hashtable-offset
 2348      TABLES
 2349        et_mseg        = lt_mseg_archiv
 2350      EXCEPTIONS
 2351        not_in_archive = 1
 2352        OTHERS         = 2.
 2353    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2354      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
 2355              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
 2356    ENDIF.
 2357
 2358    LOOP AT lt_mseg_archiv ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_archiv>.
 2359
 2360      READ TABLE ct_mseg_key_group INTO ls_mseg_key_group
 2361        WITH KEY mblnr = <ls_mseg_archiv>-mblnr
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    701
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2362                 mjahr = <ls_mseg_archiv>-mjahr
 2363                 zeile = <ls_mseg_archiv>-zeile BINARY SEARCH.
 2364
 2365      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 2366  *  delete ct_mseg_key_group.
 2367
 2368      IF ls_mseg_key_group-xauto IN g_ra_xauto.
 2369        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_archiv> TO ls_mseg_or.
 2370        APPEND ls_mseg_or TO ct_mseg_or.
 2371      ENDIF.
 2372
 2373      IF ct_mseg_key_group IS INITIAL.
 2374        EXIT.
 2375      ENDIF.
 2376
 2377    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n1481757
 2378  ENDFORM.             " FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR_GROUP          "n1481757

   24

   26  * RM07MLBD

   28  * hidden fields delete the '*' in the type definition.
   29  *
   30  * There are only fields from database table MSEG possible
   31  * Please use only the following fields, because these fields
   32  * are considered during the creation of the field catalog;
   33  * plaese consider, that each active field will cost performance

  274  *             transaction key ( KTOSL ) 'BSX'               "n497992
  275  *             this mode will cost performance               "n497992

  482  FORM aktuelle_bst_sbbst_o.
  483
  484  * process Special Stocks with Vendor
  485  * Bemerkung: Im Gegensatz zu den anderen Sonderbeständen existieren
  486  *            der Lohnbearbeitungs- und Kundenkonsignationsbestand
  487  *            nur auf Werksebene.
  488    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSLB' ''.                  "n1710850
  489    IF gv_not_authorized = abap_false.                        "n_1899544
  490      SELECT * FROM mslb INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE xmslb CONNECTI
       ON (dbcon) "n1710850
  491                                 WHERE  werks  IN  g_ra_werks
  492                                   AND  (gv_where_clause)     "n_1899544
  493                                 AND  matnr  IN  matnr
  494                                 AND  charg  IN  charg
  495                                 AND  sobkz  =   'O'.
  496    ELSE.                                                     "n_1899544
  497      sy-subrc = 4.                                           "n_1899544
  498    ENDIF.                                                    "n_1899544
  499
  500    IF sy-subrc <> 0.                     "no records found ?
  501      MESSAGE s289.
  502  *    Kein Material in Selektion vorhanden.
  503      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
  504    ENDIF.
  505
  506  * process the found records special stock vendor
  507    LOOP AT xmslb.                                            "v2195175
  508  *   check the authority
  509      PERFORM  f9000_auth_plant_check
  510                               USING      xmslb-werks.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    717
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  511
  512      IF  g_flag_authority IS INITIAL.
  513        DELETE                 xmslb.
  514      ELSE.
  515  *     fill range table g_0000_ra_werks if it is still empty
  516        PERFORM  f9200_collect_plant     USING  xmslb-werks.
  517
  518        PERFORM  f9400_material_key      USING  xmslb-matnr.
  519      ENDIF.
  520    ENDLOOP.                                                  "^2195175
  521
  522  * error, if no records are left
  523    DESCRIBE TABLE xmslb       LINES g_f_cnt_lines.
  524    IF  g_f_cnt_lines IS INITIAL.
  525      MESSAGE s289.
  526  *   Kein Material in Selektion vorhanden.
  527      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
  528    ENDIF.
  529
  530    SORT xmslb.
  531    LOOP AT xmslb.
  532      MOVE-CORRESPONDING xmslb TO imslb.
  533      COLLECT imslb.
  534    ENDLOOP.
  535    FREE xmslb. REFRESH xmslb.
  536
  537    IF xchar = ' '.
  538      LOOP AT imslb.
  539        MOVE-CORRESPONDING imslb TO imslbx.
  540        COLLECT imslbx.
  541      ENDLOOP.
  542      SORT imslbx.
  543    ELSEIF xchar = 'X'.
  544      LOOP AT imslb.
  545        CHECK imslb-charg IS INITIAL.
  546        DELETE imslb.
  547      ENDLOOP.
  548    ENDIF.
  549

  901  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
  902  *&      Form  TABELLEN_LESEN
  903  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
  904  *       Lesen der Materialkurztexte (Tabelle MAKT),                    *
  905  *       der Mengeneinheiten (Tabelle MARA) und                         *
  906  *       Mengen- und Wertfortschreibung zum Material (Tabelle T134M)    *
  907  *       (Letzteres ist zum Aussortieren der unbewerteten bzw.          *
  908  *       kontierten Warenbewegungen notwendig)                          *
  909  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  910
  911  FORM tabellen_lesen.
  912

 1128  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1129  *&      Form  BELEGE_SORTIEREN
 1130  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1131  *    Die Materialbelege werden anhand des Buchungsdatums sortiert.
 1132  *    Die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum zwischen 'datum-high'
 1133  *    und dem aktuellen Datum werden in der internen Tabelle IMSWEG
 1134  *    gesammelt, während die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum
 1135  *    zwischen 'datum-low' und 'datum-high' in der internen Tabelle
 1136  *    IMSEG verbleiben.
 1137  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1138
 1139  FORM belege_sortieren.
 1140
 1141    DATA: lv_zaehler TYPE i,
 1142          lv_limit TYPE limit_records.
 1143
 1144    aktdat = sy-datlo + 365.                                  "1227437
 1145    IF NOT ( datum-high IS INITIAL OR datum-high > aktdat ).
 1146  * Get record limit for table  to avoid memory overflow
 1147      SELECT SINGLE limit INTO lv_limit
 1148        FROM mmim_rep_ln_lim
 1149        WHERE report = 'RM07MLBD'
 1150          AND tabname = 'MSEG_LEAN'.
 1151
 1152      CLEAR lv_zaehler.
 1153      LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean    INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1154                               WHERE budat > datum-high.
 1155        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean TO imsweg.
 1156        IF lv_limit > 0.
 1157  * Check entries before the memory for internal table is to small
 1158          ADD 1 TO lv_zaehler.
 1159          IF lv_zaehler > lv_limit.
 1160            MESSAGE i555(m7).
 1161  * Too many records selected. Not enough memory. Restrict your selection
 1162            SUBMIT rm07mlbd VIA SELECTION-SCREEN .
 1163          ENDIF.
 1164        ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    728
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1165        APPEND imsweg.
 1166        DELETE                 g_t_mseg_lean.
 1167      ENDLOOP.
 1168    ENDIF.
 1169
 1170    DESCRIBE TABLE imsweg LINES index_2.
 1171
 1172  ENDFORM.                               " BELEGE_SORTIEREN

 1194  *  können.

 1196  *     endif.

 1218        ENDIF.                                                "n497992

 1222      ENDIF.                                                  "n497992

 1253  *&      Form  BELEGE_ERGAENZEN (engl. enrich documents)
 1254  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1255  * Material documents and FI documents from BSIM are merged together.
 1256  * Complications:
 1257  * - A material document can have more than one FI document.
 1258  * - There are FI documents without material documnts
 1259  * - There are material documents without FI documents
 1260  * - The document type is customizeable
 1261  * - There is no link from the materia document position to
 1262  *   the FI document entry in BSIM (except URZEILE, but this
 1263  *   can be filled incorrectly)
 1264  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*

 1272

 1274  * relevance to the valuated stock. IT156W contains all valuation
 1275  * strings with posting key BSX. XBGBB says: "I am an accrural posting".

 1587  *   save result from database selection into hashed table
 1588      IF NOT g_t_bseg_key[] IS INITIAL.
 1589        SELECT bukrs belnr gjahr buzei hkont FROM bseg
 1590          INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_bseg
 1591          FOR ALL ENTRIES IN g_t_bseg_key
 1592            WHERE bukrs = g_t_bseg_key-bukrs
 1593              AND belnr = g_t_bseg_key-belnr
 1594              AND gjahr = g_t_bseg_key-gjahr
 1595              AND buzei = g_t_bseg_key-buzei
 1596          ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.
 1597      ENDIF.
 1598

 1600  *     look for the matching FI document item

 1602          WITH KEY bukrs = <fs_mseg_lean>-bukrs
 1603                   belnr = <fs_mseg_lean>-belnr
 1604                   gjahr = <fs_mseg_lean>-gjahr
 1605                   buzei = <fs_mseg_lean>-buzei.

 1607  *       enrich table G_T_MSEG_LEAN with the G/L account

 1609        ELSE.
 1610  *       get G/L account from current account determination settings
 1611          CLEAR ls_accdet.

 1613          PERFORM get_acc_det CHANGING ls_accdet.
 1614          <fs_mseg_lean>-hkont = ls_accdet-hkont.
 1615        ENDIF.
 1616      ENDLOOP.
 1617      FREE: g_t_bseg_key, g_t_bseg.
 1618    ENDIF.

 3365      cl_salv_form_content=>clear( ).
 3366      RETURN.
 3367    ENDIF.                                                    "^3111752
 3368
 3369    DATA: lr_content TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_element.
 3370
 3371  *... (1) create the information to be displayed by using
 3372  *        the ALV Form elements
 3373    PERFORM print_end_of_list_render  CHANGING lr_content.
 3374
 3375  *... (2) Sending the information to the ALV
 3376  *        Once the inforation to be displayed has been
 3377  *        created the information has to be sent to the ALV
 3378  *        This is done by calling the static method
 3379  *        CL_SALV_FORM_CONTENT=>SET( <content> ) with the content
 3380  *        which is to be displayed.
 3381  *        Alternativly the function module REUSE_ALV_COMMENTARY_WRITE
 3382  *        can still be used.
 3383    cl_salv_form_content=>set( lr_content ).
 3384                                                              "n599218
 3385  ENDFORM.                     "print_end_of_list             "n599218
 3386                                                              "n599218
 3387  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3388  *     print_end_of_list_render
 3389  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3390
 3391  FORM  print_end_of_list_render
 3392           CHANGING cr_content TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_element.
 3393
 3394    DATA: lr_grid     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_layout_grid,
 3395          lr_flow     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_form_layout_flow,
 3396          l_text(500) TYPE c,
 3397          l_char(500) TYPE c.
 3398
 3399  *... create a grid
 3400    CREATE OBJECT lr_grid.
 3401
 3402    lr_flow = lr_grid->create_flow( row = 1  column = 1 ).
 3403
 3404    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3405  *     stocks only
 3406      MOVE  : g_end_line_77       TO  l_text.
 3407    ELSE.
 3408  *     stocks and values
 3409      MOVE  : g_end_line_91       TO  l_text.
 3410    ENDIF.

 3412  *   add line to object
 3413    lr_flow->create_text( text = l_text ).

 3419
 3420  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3421  *    create_headline                                        "n599218
 3422  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3423                                                              "n599218
 3424  FORM create_headline.                                       "n599218
 3425                                                              "n599218
 3426    DATA : l_offset TYPE i,                                   "n599218
 3427           l_strlen TYPE i.                                   "n599218
 3428                                                              "n599218
 3429  * get the length of the title                               "n599218
 3430    COMPUTE  l_strlen          = strlen( sy-title ).          "n599218
 3431                                                              "n599218
 3432    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.                                     "n599218
 3433  *   stocks only --> small line with 77 bytes                "n599218
 3434      IF      l_strlen   =  59.                               "n599218
 3435        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title.       "n599218
 3436      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  59.                               "n599218
 3437        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title,       "n599218
 3438               '...'          TO  g_s_header_77-title+56(03). "n599218
 3439      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3440        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 59 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3441        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_77-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3442      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3443                                                              "n599218
 3444      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_77-date.   "n599218
 3445    ELSE.                                                     "n599218
 3446  *   stocks and values --> wide line with 91 bytes           "n599218
 3447      IF      l_strlen   =  73.                               "n599218
 3448        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title.       "n599218
 3449      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  73.                               "n599218
 3450        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title,       "n599218
 3451               '...'          TO  g_s_header_91-title+70(03). "n599218
 3452      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3453        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 73 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3454        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_91-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3455      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3456                                                              "n599218
 3457      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_91-date.   "n599218
 3458    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218
 3459                                                              "n599218
 3460  * create the end lines, too                                 "n599218
 3461    CONCATENATE  TEXT-062      "End of List                   "n599218
 3462                 ':'           sy-title                       "n599218
 3463                               INTO  g_end_line_77            "n599218
 3464                               SEPARATED BY space.            "n599218
 3465    MOVE : g_end_line_77       TO  g_end_line_91.             "n599218
 3466                                                              "n599218
 3467  ENDFORM.                     "create_headline               "n599218
 3468                                                              "n599218

 3754  ENHANCEMENT-POINT rm07mlbd_form_01_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd STATIC.
 3755
 3756  *---- begin of note 921165 ---------------------------------"n921165
 3757  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3758  *&      Form  fill_data_table                               "n921165
 3759  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3760                                                              "n921165
 3761  * - improve performance processing internal tables          "n921165
 3762
 3763  FORM fill_data_table
 3764           TABLES    l_t_belege      TYPE  stab_belege
 3765           USING     l_matnr         TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3766                     l_werks         TYPE  mseg-werks
 3767                     l_charg         TYPE  mseg-charg.
 3768
 3769  * define local data fields
 3770    DATA : l_s_belege          TYPE  stype_belege.
 3771
 3772  * sort table with the MM docs only once
 3773    IF  g_flag_sorted  IS INITIAL.
 3774      MOVE  'X'                TO  g_flag_sorted.
 3775      SORT  g_t_mseg_lean      BY  matnr  werks  charg.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    774
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3776    ENDIF.
 3777
 3778  * read the first matching line depending on the batch
 3779    IF  l_charg IS INITIAL.
 3780      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3781        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3782                 werks = l_werks    BINARY SEARCH.
 3783    ELSE.
 3784      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3785        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3786                 werks = l_werks
 3787                 charg = l_charg    BINARY SEARCH.
 3788    ENDIF.
 3789
 3790  * the first entry found ? -> go on
 3791    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3792
 3793    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  g_tabix_set.
 3794
 3795  * go on with sequential reading
 3796    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean     INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 3797      FROM g_tabix_set.
 3798
 3799  *   take this entry when the key fields match
 3800      IF  g_s_mseg_lean-matnr = l_matnr   AND
 3801          g_s_mseg_lean-werks = l_werks.
 3802
 3803  *     cnsider the batches when this report runs in mode
 3804  *     "storage loc/batches" or "special stock"
 3805        IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3806          CHECK : xchar               IS INITIAL       OR
 3807                  g_s_mseg_lean-charg = l_charg.
 3808        ENDIF.
 3809
 3810        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean
 3811                               TO  l_s_belege.
 3812
 3813  *     enrich some fields with color and numeric fields with sign
 3814  *     the negative sign was not set for GI postings         "n944522
 3815        PERFORM  f9500_set_color_and_sign                     "n944522
 3816                         USING  l_s_belege  'L_S_BELEGE'.     "n944522
 3817
 3818        APPEND  l_s_belege     TO  l_t_belege.
 3819      ELSE.
 3820        EXIT.
 3821      ENDIF.
 3822    ENDLOOP.
 3823
 3824  ENDFORM.                    " fill_data_table
 3825
 3826  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3827  *&      Form  process_plants_of_bwkey                       "n921165
 3828  *&----------------------------------------------------------"n921165
 3829
 3830  FORM process_plants_of_bwkey
 3831           TABLES    l2_t_belege  TYPE  stab_belege
 3832           USING     l2_matnr     TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3833                     l2_bwkey     TYPE  mbew-bwkey.
 3834
 3835  * define local working fields
 3836    FIELD-SYMBOLS :
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    775
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3837      <l_fs_organ>             TYPE  stype_organ.
 3838    DATA : l_tabix_start       TYPE  sy-tabix.
 3839
 3840
 3841    IF  curm = '1'.
 3842  *   valuation level is plant / process the MM docs
 3843      PERFORM  fill_data_table TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3844                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3845                                         l2_bwkey             "n921165
 3846                                         space.               "n921165
 3847      EXIT.                    " leave this routine
 3848    ENDIF.
 3849
 3850  * valuation leve = company code : plenty of plants could
 3851  * be assigned to the valuation area, look for the assigned
 3852  * plants and look for the MM doc per plant
 3853
 3854  * look for the first valuation area
 3855    READ TABLE g_t_organ       ASSIGNING  <l_fs_organ>
 3856      WITH KEY keytype  = c_bwkey
 3857               keyfield = l2_bwkey
 3858                               BINARY SEARCH.
 3859
 3860  * go on when a valuation area was found
 3861    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3862
 3863    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  l_tabix_start.
 3864
 3865  * seq. read of all matching entries
 3866    LOOP AT g_t_organ          ASSIGNING <l_fs_organ>
 3867      FROM l_tabix_start.
 3868
 3869      IF  <l_fs_organ>-keytype   = c_bwkey      AND
 3870          <l_fs_organ>-keyfield  = l2_bwkey.
 3871  *     process the MM docs from this plant
 3872        PERFORM  fill_data_table                              "n921165
 3873                               TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3874                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3875                                         <l_fs_organ>-werks   "n921165
 3876                                         space.               "n921165
 3877      ELSE.
 3878        EXIT.
 3879      ENDIF.
 3880    ENDLOOP.
 3881
 3882  ENDFORM.                    " process_plants_of_bwkey       "n921165
 3883                                                              "n921165
 3884  *---- end of note 921165 -----------------------------------"n921165

 3890    IF  NOT archive_messages[] IS INITIAL.                    "n1481757
 3891      SORT archive_messages                                   "n1481757
 3892         BY msgid msgno msgv1 msgv2 msgv3 msgv4.              "n1481757
 3893                                                              "n1481757
 3894      TYPES: BEGIN OF slis_fieldcat,                          "n1481757
 3895               row_pos     LIKE sy-curow, " output in row      "n1481757
 3896               col_pos     LIKE sy-cucol, " position of the column "n14817
       57
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    776
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3897               fieldname   TYPE slis_fieldname,               "n1481757
 3898               ref_tabname TYPE slis_tabname,                 "n1481757
 3899               msgid       LIKE sy-msgid,                     "n1481757
 3900               msgno       LIKE sy-msgno,                     "n1481757
 3901               msgv1       LIKE sy-msgv1,                     "n1481757
 3902               msgv2       LIKE sy-msgv2,                     "n1481757
 3903               msgv3       LIKE sy-msgv3,                     "n1481757
 3904               msgv4       LIKE sy-msgv4,                     "n1481757
 3905             END OF slis_fieldcat.                            "n1481757
 3906  *                                                           "n1481757
 3907      DATA: BEGIN OF outtab OCCURS 0,                         "n1481757
 3908              msgid    LIKE sy-msgid,                         "n1481757
 3909              msgno    LIKE sy-msgno,                         "n1481757
 3910              text(80),                                       "n1481757
 3911            END OF outtab.                                    "n1481757
 3912      DATA: fc TYPE slis_fieldcat_alv OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE. "n1481757
 3913      DATA: souttab LIKE LINE OF outtab.                      "n1481757
 3914      REFRESH outtab.                                         "n1481757
 3915  *                                                           "n1481757
 3916      LOOP AT archive_messages.                               "n1481757
 3917        MOVE-CORRESPONDING archive_messages TO outtab.        "n1481757
 3918        MESSAGE ID     archive_messages-msgid                 "n1481757
 3919                TYPE   'E'                                    "n1481757
 3920                NUMBER archive_messages-msgno                 "n1481757
 3921                WITH   archive_messages-msgv1                 "n1481757
 3922                       archive_messages-msgv2                 "n1481757
 3923                       archive_messages-msgv3                 "n1481757
 3924                       archive_messages-msgv4                 "n1481757
 3925                INTO   outtab-text.                           "n1481757
 3926        APPEND outtab.                                        "n1481757
 3927      ENDLOOP.                                                "n1481757
 3928  *                                                           "n1481757
 3929      REFRESH fc.                                             "n1481757
 3930      fc-fieldname = 'MSGID'.                                 "n1481757
 3931      fc-ref_tabname = 'SYST'.                                "n1481757
 3932      APPEND fc.                                              "n1481757
 3933      fc-fieldname = 'MSGNO'.                                 "n1481757
 3934      fc-ref_tabname = 'SYST'.                                "n1481757
 3935      APPEND fc.                                              "n1481757
 3936      fc-fieldname = 'TEXT'.                                  "n1481757
 3937      fc-ref_tabname = 'T100'.                                "n1481757
 3938      APPEND fc.                                              "n1481757
 3939                                                              "n1481757
 3940
 3941      DATA: it_commentary TYPE slis_t_listheader.
 3942      DATA: is_commentary LIKE LINE OF it_commentary.
 3943
 3944      LOOP AT outtab INTO souttab.
 3945        is_commentary-typ = 'H'.
 3946        is_commentary-info = souttab-text.
 3947        APPEND is_commentary TO it_commentary.
 3948      ENDLOOP.
 3949
 3950      CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_COMMENTARY_WRITE'
 3951        EXPORTING
 3952          it_list_commentary = it_commentary.         "n1481757
 3953                                                              "n1481757
 3954    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
 3955
 3956  ENDFORM.                    " NACHRICHTENAUSGABE

 3958  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3959  *&      Form  BUILD_BKLAS_SELECTION
 3960  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3961  *       Build internal selection options for Valuation Class
 3962  *       restriction, in case G/L account is restricted
 3963  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3964  *  -->  HKONT       Selection screen options
 3965  *  <--  iBKLAS      Internal selection options
 3966  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3967  FORM build_bklas_selection
 3968      USING
 3969            et_mbew TYPE stab_mbew.
 3970
 3971    TYPES:
 3972      BEGIN OF lts_valuation_area,
 3973        bwkey TYPE bwkey,
 3974        bukrs TYPE bukrs,
 3975        bwmod TYPE bwmod,
 3976      END OF lts_valuation_area,
 3977
 3978      BEGIN OF lts_account,
 3979        ktopl TYPE t030r-ktopl,
 3980
 3981      bwmod TYPE t030-bwmod,
 3982        bklas TYPE t030-bklas,
 3983
 3984        saknr TYPE t030-konts,
 3985      END OF lts_account,
 3986
 3987      ltt_account TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_account.
 3988
 3989
 3990
 3991    DATA:
 3992      lt_organ       LIKE g_t_organ[].
 3993
 3994
 3995  * table G_T_ORGAN should be already filled in; otherwise settings for al
       l
 3996  * charts of accounts need to be read which is very time consuming
 3997    lt_organ = g_t_organ[].
 3998    SORT lt_organ BY ktopl bwmod.
 3999    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_organ COMPARING ktopl bwmod.
 4000    IF lt_organ IS INITIAL.
 4001      MESSAGE s480.
 4002      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 4003    ENDIF.
 4004
 4005  * read Valuation Areas with Valuation Grouping Code
 4006    DATA:
 4007      lt_valuation_areas TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_valuation_area,
 4008      ls_valuation_area  TYPE lts_valuation_area.
 4009
 4010    SELECT
 4011      valuation_area~bwkey
 4012      valuation_area~bukrs
 4013      valuation_area~bwmod
 4014    FROM
 4015      t001k AS valuation_area
 4016    INTO
 4017      CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_valuation_areas
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    778
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4018    WHERE
 4019      valuation_area~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey.
 4020
 4021
 4022  **********************************************************************
 4023  * Read accounts and account determination rules for specified accounts a
       nd organizations
 4024    DATA:
 4025      lt_rules    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t030r,
 4026      lt_accounts TYPE ltt_account.
 4027
 4028    SELECT
 4029      account~ktopl
 4030
 4031      account~bwmod
 4032      account~bklas
 4033
 4034      account~konts AS saknr
 4035
 4036    FROM
 4037      t030 AS account
 4038    INTO
 4039      CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_accounts
 4040
 4041    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN
 4042      lt_organ
 4043    WHERE
 4044          account~ktopl = lt_organ-ktopl
 4045      AND account~ktosl = 'BSX'
 4046      AND account~komok = ''
 4047      AND account~konts IN hkont.
 4048
 4049
 4050    SELECT *
 4051    FROM
 4052      t030r AS standart_account_rule
 4053    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE
 4054      lt_rules
 4055    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN
 4056      lt_organ
 4057    WHERE
 4058          standart_account_rule~ktopl = lt_organ-ktopl
 4059      AND standart_account_rule~ktosl EQ 'BSX'
 4060    ORDER BY
 4061      PRIMARY KEY.
 4062
 4063
 4064  * determine if rules restrict selection by valuation grouping codes or v
       aluation classes
 4065    DATA:
 4066      lv_bklas_restricted TYPE abap_bool,
 4067      lv_bwmod_restricted TYPE abap_bool.
 4068    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
 4069      <fs_valuation_area>   TYPE lts_valuation_area,
 4070      <fs_selected_account> TYPE lts_account,
 4071      <fs_standart_account_rule> TYPE t030r.
 4072
 4073    READ TABLE lt_rules WITH KEY xbwmo = 'X' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4074    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4075      lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4076    ELSE.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    779
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4077      lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4078    ENDIF.
 4079
 4080    READ TABLE lt_rules WITH KEY xbkla = 'X' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4081    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4082      lv_bklas_restricted = 'X'.
 4083    ELSE.
 4084      lv_bklas_restricted = ''.
 4085    ENDIF.
 4086
 4087    g_ra_bwkey-sign = 'I'.
 4088    g_ra_bwkey-option = 'EQ'.
 4089
 4090  * if selection is restricted by valuation grouping code(BWMOD) also rest
       rict valuation area selection
 4091    IF lv_bwmod_restricted = abap_true.
 4092      CLEAR g_ra_bwkey-low.
 4093      LOOP AT lt_rules ASSIGNING <fs_standart_account_rule> WHERE XBWMO =
       'X'.
 4094          LOOP AT lt_accounts ASSIGNING <fs_selected_account> WHERE ktopl
       = <fs_standart_account_rule>-ktopl.
 4095            LOOP AT lt_valuation_areas ASSIGNING <fs_valuation_area> WHERE
        bwmod = <fs_selected_account>-bwmod.
 4096              g_ra_bwkey-low = <fs_valuation_area>-bwkey.
 4097              APPEND g_ra_bwkey TO g_ra_bwkey.
 4098          ENDLOOP.
 4099          ENDLOOP.
 4100      ENDLOOP.
 4101    ENDIF.
 4102    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bwkey.
 4103
 4104
 4105    IF lt_accounts IS INITIAL.
 4106      MESSAGE s289.
 4107  *   no data contained in the selection
 4108      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 4109    ENDIF.
 4110
 4111
 4112  **********************************************************************
 4113
 4114    TYPES: BEGIN OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4115             INCLUDE TYPE stype_mbew.
 4116
 4117    TYPES:   bklas TYPE bklas.
 4118    TYPES: bwmod TYPE bwmod.
 4119    TYPES: END OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4120
 4121    DATA:
 4122          lt_mbew TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4123

 4126

 4129  * if selection is restricted either by valuation grouping code (BWMOD) o
       r by valuation class (BKLAS)
 4130  * use corresponding condition in WHERE clause
 4131      IF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4132        SELECT

       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN

       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN

 4221

 4223    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'EBEW' ''.
 4224    SELECT

       bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN

 4246      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod.
 4247

 4279      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4280      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod

 4282      SUM( bewertung~salk3 ) AS salk3

       bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
