 4300      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod.
 4301

21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    783

 4309

 4311    LOOP AT lt_mbew ASSIGNING <fs_full_mbew>.
 4312      IF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4313

 4315          WITH KEY bklas = <fs_full_mbew>-bklas
 4316                   bwmod = <fs_full_mbew>-bwmod TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4317
 4318    ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4319
 4320        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4321          WITH KEY bklas = <fs_full_mbew>-bklas TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4322
 4323    ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = '' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4324
 4325        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4326          WITH KEY bwmod = <fs_full_mbew>-bwmod TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4327
 4328      ELSE.
 4329
 4330        LOOP AT lt_accounts TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS
 4331          WHERE bklas = '' AND bwmod = ''.
 4332        ENDLOOP.
 4333      ENDIF.
 4334
 4335      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 4336        CONTINUE.
 4337      ENDIF.
 4338
 4339      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO et_mbew ASSIGNING <fs_mbew>.
 4340      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_full_mbew> TO <fs_mbew>.
 4341    ENDLOOP.

 4346
 4347  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4348  *&      Form  GET_ACC_DET
 4349  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4350  *       Get G/L account from current account determination settings
 4351  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4352  FORM get_acc_det  CHANGING cs_accdet  TYPE stype_accdet.
 4353
 4354    TYPES:
 4355      BEGIN OF ltt_acc,
 4356        bklas LIKE t030-bklas,
 4357        bwmod LIKE t030-bwmod,
 4358        ktopl LIKE t030-ktopl,
 4359        hkont LIKE t030-konts,
 4360      END OF ltt_acc.
 4361
 4362    STATICS:
 4363      lt_acc TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ltt_acc WITH UNIQUE KEY bklas bwmod ktop
       l.
 4364    DATA:
 4365      ls_acc TYPE ltt_acc.
 4366
 4367  * get organizational data
 4368    PERFORM f9300_read_organ
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    784
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4369      USING c_werks cs_accdet-werks.
 4370    CHECK g_s_organ-bukrs = cs_accdet-bukrs.
 4371    cs_accdet-bwkey = g_s_organ-bwkey.
 4372    cs_accdet-ktopl = g_s_organ-ktopl.
 4373    cs_accdet-bwmod = g_s_organ-bwmod.
 4374
 4375  * check for special stock that is valuated in MBEW
 4376    IF ( cs_accdet-sobkz = 'Q' OR cs_accdet-sobkz = 'E' ) AND
 4377       cs_accdet-kzbws = 'A'.
 4378      CLEAR: cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4379    ENDIF.
 4380    IF cs_accdet-sobkz = 'O' AND cs_accdet-xobew IS INITIAL.
 4381      CLEAR: cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4382    ENDIF.
 4383
 4384  * get special stock data
 4385  * (if not filled yet via customer's enhancement of type STYPE_MB5B_ADD)
 4386    CASE cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4387      WHEN 'Q'.
 4388        IF cs_accdet-mat_pspnr IS INITIAL.
 4389          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4390          SELECT SINGLE mat_pspnr FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (dbcon) "n17
       10850
 4391            INTO cs_accdet-mat_pspnr
 4392            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4393              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4394              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4395        ENDIF.
 4396        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4397      WHEN 'E'.
 4398        IF cs_accdet-mat_kdauf IS INITIAL OR cs_accdet-mat_kdpos IS INITIA
       L.
 4399          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4400          SELECT SINGLE mat_kdauf mat_kdpos FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (d
       bcon) "n1710850
 4401            INTO (cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos)
 4402            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4403              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4404              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4405        ENDIF.
 4406        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_pspnr, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4407      WHEN 'O'.
 4408        IF cs_accdet-lifnr IS INITIAL.
 4409          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4410          SELECT SINGLE lifnr FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (dbcon) "n171085
       0
 4411            INTO cs_accdet-lifnr
 4412            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4413              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4414              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4415        ENDIF.
 4416        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos, cs_accdet-mat_psp
       nr.
 4417      WHEN OTHERS.
 4418        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos,
 4419               cs_accdet-mat_pspnr, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4420    ENDCASE.
 4421
 4422  * get valuation class
 4423    PERFORM get_bklas CHANGING cs_accdet.
 4424
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    785
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4425  * get G/L account
 4426    READ TABLE lt_acc INTO ls_acc
 4427      WITH TABLE KEY bklas = cs_accdet-bklas
 4428                     bwmod = cs_accdet-bwmod
 4429                     ktopl = cs_accdet-ktopl.
 4430    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4431      cs_accdet-hkont = ls_acc-hkont.
 4432    ELSE.
 4433      CALL FUNCTION 'MR_ACCOUNT_ASSIGNMENT'
 4434        EXPORTING
 4435          bewertungsklasse       = cs_accdet-bklas
 4436          bewertung_modif        = cs_accdet-bwmod
 4437          kontenplan             = cs_accdet-ktopl
 4438          soll_haben_kennzeichen = 'S'
 4439          vorgangsschluessel     = 'BSX'
 4440        IMPORTING
 4441          konto                  = cs_accdet-hkont
 4442        EXCEPTIONS
 4443          OTHERS                 = 5.
 4444      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 4445        CLEAR cs_accdet-hkont.
 4446      ENDIF.
 4447      ls_acc-bklas = cs_accdet-bklas.
 4448      ls_acc-bwmod = cs_accdet-bwmod.
 4449      ls_acc-ktopl = cs_accdet-ktopl.
 4450      ls_acc-hkont = cs_accdet-hkont.
 4451      INSERT ls_acc INTO TABLE lt_acc.
 4452    ENDIF.
 4453
 4454  ENDFORM.                    " GET_ACC_DET
 4455  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4456  *&      Form  GET_BKLAS
 4457  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4458  *      Get valuation class from current settings
 4459  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4460  FORM get_bklas  CHANGING cs_accdet  TYPE stype_accdet.
 4461
 4462    TYPES:
 4463      BEGIN OF ltt_bklas,
 4464        matnr     LIKE mbew-matnr,
 4465        bwkey     LIKE mbew-bwkey,
 4466        bwtar     LIKE mbew-bwtar,
 4467        sobkz     LIKE qbew-sobkz,
 4468        mat_pspnr LIKE qbew-pspnr,
 4469        mat_kdauf LIKE ebew-vbeln,
 4470        mat_kdpos LIKE ebew-posnr,
 4471        lifnr     LIKE obew-lifnr,
 4472        bklas     LIKE mbew-bklas,
 4473      END OF ltt_bklas.
 4474
 4475    STATICS:
 4476      lt_bklas TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ltt_bklas WITH UNIQUE KEY matnr bwkey
 4477        bwtar sobkz mat_pspnr mat_kdauf mat_kdpos lifnr.
 4478    DATA:
 4479      ls_bklas TYPE ltt_bklas.
 4480
 4481    READ TABLE lt_bklas INTO ls_bklas
 4482      WITH TABLE KEY matnr     = cs_accdet-matnr
 4483                     bwkey     = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4484                     bwtar     = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4485                     sobkz     = cs_accdet-sobkz
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    786
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4486                     mat_pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr
 4487                     mat_kdauf = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf
 4488                     mat_kdpos = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos
 4489                     lifnr     = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4490    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4491      cs_accdet-bklas = ls_bklas-bklas.
 4492    ELSE.
 4493      CASE cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4494        WHEN 'Q'.
 4495          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'QBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4496          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM qbew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4497            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4498            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4499              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4500              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4501              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4502              AND pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr.
 4503        WHEN 'E'.
 4504          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'EBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4505          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM ebew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4506            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4507            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4508              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4509              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4510              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4511              AND vbeln = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf
 4512              AND posnr = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos.
 4513        WHEN 'O'.
 4514          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'OBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4515          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM obew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4516            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4517            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4518              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4519              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4520              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4521              AND lifnr = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4522        WHEN OTHERS.
 4523          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4524          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM v_mbew_md CONNECTION (dbcon) "n1710850
 4525            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4526            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4527              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4528              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar.
 4529      ENDCASE.
 4530      ls_bklas-matnr     = cs_accdet-matnr.
 4531      ls_bklas-bwkey     = cs_accdet-bwkey.
 4532      ls_bklas-bwtar     = cs_accdet-bwtar.
 4533      ls_bklas-sobkz     = cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4534      ls_bklas-mat_pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr.
 4535      ls_bklas-mat_kdauf = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf.
 4536      ls_bklas-mat_kdpos = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos.
 4537      ls_bklas-lifnr     = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4538      ls_bklas-bklas     = cs_accdet-bklas.
 4539      INSERT ls_bklas INTO TABLE lt_bklas.
 4540    ENDIF.
 4541
 4542  ENDFORM.                    " GET_BKLAS
 4543
 4544  FORM hdb_check_table  USING                                 "n1710850
 4545                        lv_tab1 TYPE tabname
 4546                        lv_tab2 TYPE tabname.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    787
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4547
 4548  * clear dbcon, set only at the end if OK
 4549    CLEAR dbcon.
 4550
 4551    IF dbcon_active IS INITIAL.
 4552      RETURN.
 4553    ENDIF.
 4554
 4555    DATA: lt_chk_tab TYPE typ_t_tablename.
 4556
 4557    IF lv_tab1 IS NOT INITIAL.
 4558      APPEND lv_tab1 TO lt_chk_tab.
 4559    ENDIF.
 4560    IF lv_tab2 IS NOT INITIAL.
 4561      APPEND lv_tab2 TO lt_chk_tab.
 4562    ENDIF.
 4563
 4564    CALL FUNCTION c_hdb_dbcon_get
 4565      EXPORTING
 4566        i_subappl  = c_hdb_subappl
 4567  *     I_ACT_CHECK_ONLY       =
 4568        it_req_tab = lt_chk_tab
 4569      IMPORTING
 4570        e_dbcon    = dbcon.
 4571
 4572  ENDFORM.                                                    "n1710850
 4573  * begin of note 2120566                                        "v2120566
 4574  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4575  *&      Form  wesperr_aussortieren
 4576  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4577  *       Delete the non-valuated GR blocked stock for special stock OVW *
 4578  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4579  FORM wesperr_aussortieren.
 4580
 4581    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO   g_s_mseg_lean
 4582                                WHERE sobkz CA 'OVW'
 4583                                AND   bustm EQ 'ME11'.
 4584      DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 4585    ENDLOOP.
 4586
 4587  ENDFORM.                            "wesperr_aussortieren
 4588  * end of note 2120566                                          "^2120566

  173  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
  174  *       Prüfung gegen Listumfangsparameter auf Selektionsbild
  175  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  176
  177  FORM listumfang.
  178
  179    DATA : l_category(08)      TYPE c.                        "n599218
  180    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs>.                                   "n599218
  181                                                              "n599218
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    791
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  182  * carry out the check according the list categories in the  "n599218
  183  * case at least one category is not active                  "n599218
  184    CHECK : NOT g_cnt_empty_parameter IS INITIAL.             "n599218
  185  *                                                           "n599218
  186  * cat. I docs I stock on   I    I stock on I Parameter      "n599218
  187  *      I      I start date I    I end date I                "n599218
  188  * -----+------+------------+----+----------+----------      "n599218
  189  *  1   I yes  I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_wdzer       "n599218
  190  *  2   I yes  I =  zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdzew       "n599218
  191  *  3   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I =  zero  I pa_wdwiz       "n599218
  192  *  4   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdwuw       "n599218
  193  *  5   I yes  I <> zero    I =  I <> zero  I pa_wdwew       "n599218
  194  *      I      I            I    I          I                "n599218
  195  *  6   I no   I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_ndzer       "n599218
  196  *  7   I no   I <> zero    I =  I <> zero  I pa_ndsto       "n599218
  197    LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07
       MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_FORM_02_01\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer
       =>get_field( ).
  198                                                              "n599218
  199  * process table BESTAND                                     "n599218
  200    LOOP AT bestand.                                          "n599218
  201      CLEAR                    l_category.                    "n599218
  202                                                              "n599218
  203  *   determine the category of each entry                    "n599218
  204
  205      IF  bestand-soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  206          bestand-haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  207          bestand-/cwm/soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  208          bestand-/cwm/haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  209          bestand-sollwert  IS INITIAL    AND
  210          bestand-habenwert IS INITIAL.
  211  *     material without movements
  212
  213        IF  bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  214            bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  215            bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  216            bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  217            bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL  AND
  218            bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  219  *       material without movements / no stocks
  220          MOVE  'PA_NDZER'     TO  l_category.
  221        ELSE.
  222  *       material without movements / with stocks
  223          MOVE  'PA_NDSTO'     TO  l_category.
  224        ENDIF.
  225      ELSE.
  226  *     material with movements
  227  *
  228        IF      bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  229                bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  230                bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL.
  231  *       stock and value on start date are zero
  232          IF   bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  233               bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  234               bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  235  *         stock and value on end date are zero, too
  236            MOVE  'PA_WDZER'     TO  l_category.
  237          ELSE.
  238  *         stock and value on end date <> zero
  239            MOVE  'PA_WDZEW'     TO  l_category.
  240          ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    792
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  241        ELSE.
  242  *       stock and value on start date <> zero
  243          IF     bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  244                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  245                 bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  246  *         stock and value on end date are zero
  247            MOVE  'PA_WDWIZ'   TO  l_category.
  248          ELSEIF bestand-endmenge = bestand-anfmenge  AND
  249                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge = bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  AND
  250                 bestand-anfwert  = bestand-endwert.
  251  *         stock and value on end date are equal
  252            MOVE  'PA_WDWEW'   TO  l_category.
  253          ELSE.
  254  *         stock and values on end date are differnt
  255            MOVE  'PA_WDWUW'   TO  l_category.
  256          ENDIF.
  257        ENDIF.
  258      ENDIF.
  259  ENHANCEMENT-POINT ehp605_rm07mlbd_form_02_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
  260
  261  *   evaluate category and corresponding parameter settings  "n599218
  262      CHECK : NOT l_category IS INITIAL.                      "n599218
  263      ASSIGN (l_category)      TO  <l_fs>.                    "n599218
  264                                                              "n599218
  265      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  266        IF  <l_fs> IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  267          DELETE               bestand.                       "n599218
  268        ENDIF.                                                "n599218
  269      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
  270    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n599218
  271  ENDFORM.                               " LISTUMFANG

  277  FORM listausgabe1.
  278
  279    IF  g_cust_color = 'X'.              "colorize numeric fields ?

  340  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  341  *    F0000_CREATE_TABLE_G_T_ORGAN
  342  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  343
  344  FORM f0000_create_table_g_t_organ
  345                     USING     l_f_error TYPE stype_organ-keytype.
  346
  347    DATA: l_ra_bukrs TYPE RANGE OF bukrs,                      "3116194
  348          l_bukrs    TYPE bukrs.                               "3116194
  349
  350  * at least on of these 3 range tables must be filled for the creation
  351  * of table g_t_organ
  352  * field  description         range table
  353  * -----  -----------         -----------
  354  * werks  plant               g_0000_ra_plant
  355  * bwkey  valuation area      g_0000_ra_bwkey
  356  * bukrs  company code        g_0000_ra_plant
  357
  358  * table g_t_organ must be empty
  359    CHECK : g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                           "n433765
  360
  361  * START OF CHANGE for note 1049935                         "n1049935
  362  * First check if there was a selection for company code    "n1049935
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    794
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  363  * then do the F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK only for necessary    "n1049935
  364  * selected items..                                         "n1049935
  365
  366  * select all plant from table t001w
  367    SELECT * FROM t001w        WHERE  werks  IN  g_0000_ra_werks.
  368
  369  *   check the valuation area
  370      CHECK : t001w-bwkey IN g_0000_ra_bwkey.
  371
  372  *   read the valuation area
  373      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001k
  374                               WHERE  bwkey  =  t001w-bwkey.
  375
  376      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  377
  378  *   company code is required ?
  379      CHECK : t001k-bukrs IN g_0000_ra_bukrs.
  380
  381      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001  WHERE  bukrs  =  t001k-bukrs.
  382
  383      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  384
  385
  386      PERFORM  f9000_auth_plant_check    USING  t001w-werks.
  387
  388  *   go on if the user has authority for this plant
  389      CHECK : g_flag_authority = 'X'.
  390  * END OF CHANGE for note 1049935                           "n1049935
  391
  392  *   create table g_t_organ_lean
  393      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_s_organ-werks,
  394             t001w-bwkey       TO  g_s_organ-bwkey,
  395             t001-bukrs        TO  g_s_organ-bukrs,
  396             t001-ktopl        TO  g_s_organ-ktopl,
  397             t001k-bwmod       TO  g_s_organ-bwmod,
  398             t001-waers        TO  g_s_organ-waers.
  399
  400  *   write 2 entries for the both search methods _
  401  *   1. with key   valuation area
  402  *   2. with key   plant
  403      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  g_s_organ
  404                               TO  g_t_organ.
  405      MOVE : c_bwkey           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  406             g_s_organ-bwkey   TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  407      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  408
  409      MOVE : c_werks           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  410           g_s_organ-werks     TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  411      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  412      CLEAR                    g_s_organ.
  413
  414  *   create the range tables for plants
  415      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_ra_werks-low,
  416             'I'               TO  g_ra_werks-sign,
  417             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_werks-option.
  418      APPEND                   g_ra_werks.
  419
  420  *   create the range tables for plants and valuation areas
  421      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  g_ra_bwkey-low,
  422             'I'               TO  g_ra_bwkey-sign,
  423             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_bwkey-option.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    795
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  424      APPEND                   g_ra_bwkey.
  425
  426  *   create the range table for company codes                "3116194
  427      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO l_ra_bukrs ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ra_bukr
       s>).
  428      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-low,
  429             'I'               TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-sign,
  430             'EQ'              TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-option.
  431    ENDSELECT.
  432
  433  * is table g_t_organ empty ?
  434    IF  g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                               "n433765
  435  *   no plants for selection found / process error message ?
  436      IF  l_f_error = c_error.
  437        MESSAGE e281.
  438  *     Kein Eintrag zur Selektion Buchungskreis Werk Lagerort vorhanden
  439      ENDIF.
  440    ELSE.
  441      SORT  g_t_organ          BY  keytype  keyfield  bwkey  werks.
  442      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_organ.
  443
  444      SORT                     g_ra_werks.
  445      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_werks.
  446
  447      SORT                     g_ra_bwkey.
  448      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bwkey.
  449    ENDIF.
  450
  451  ENDFORM.                     "f0000_create_table_g_t_organ

  453  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  454  *    F0300_GET_FIELDS
  455  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  456
  457  FORM f0300_get_fields.
  458
  459    DATA : l_f_type(01)        TYPE c.
  460
  461  * find out the fields of structure g_s_mseg_lean
  462    DESCRIBE FIELD g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_td.
  463
  464    LOOP AT g_t_td-names       INTO  g_s_nameinfo.
  465  *   select all entries who contain 'MSEG-' oder 'MKPF-'
  466      CASE  g_s_nameinfo-name(05).
  467        WHEN  'MKPF-'.
  468          MOVE    c_tilde      TO  g_s_nameinfo-name+4(01).
  469          MOVE    'MSEG'       TO  g_s_nameinfo-name(04).     "2963312
  470          APPEND  g_s_nameinfo-name
  471                               TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  472
  473        WHEN  'MSEG-'.
  474          MOVE  : g_s_nameinfo-name
  475                               TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname,
  476                  c_tilde      TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname+4(01).
  477          APPEND  g_s_mseg_fields        TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  478
  479        WHEN  OTHERS.
  480      ENDCASE.
  481    ENDLOOP.
  482                                                              "n1784874
  483                                                              "n599218 A
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    796
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  484    IF  g_flag_is_oil_active = 'X'.           "IS-OIL ?       "n599218 A
  485  *   the 2 IS-OIL specific data fields will be inserted into "n599218 A
  486  *   working table G_T_MSEG_FIELDS. Then these fields will   "n599218 A
  487  *   transported from database table MSEG, too               "n599218 A
  488      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLCALC'  TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  489      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLSKU'   TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  490    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218 A
  491                                                              "n1784874
  492
  493  * serious error if table g_t_mseg_field does not contain fields
  494    IF  g_t_mseg_fields[] IS INITIAL.                         "n599218
  495      MESSAGE e895                                     "#EC *    "n599218
  496        WITH 'Error, contact system administrator'.    "#EC *    "n599218
  497    ELSE.
  498      SORT                     g_t_mseg_fields.
  499      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM  g_t_mseg_fields.
  500    ENDIF.
  501
  502  ENDFORM.                     "f0300_get_fields.

  520  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  521  *    F0600_CREATE_RANGE_LGORT
  522  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  523
  524  FORM f0600_create_range_lgort.
  525
  526    REFRESH                    g_ra_lgort.
  527    CLEAR                      g_ra_lgort.
  528
  529    IF      lgbst = 'X'.       "only Storage loc./batch stock
  530  *   copy the existing select-options
  531      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  532
  533  *   add an exclusion for storage location = space
  534      MOVE : 'E'               TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  535             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  536      APPEND                   g_ra_lgort.
  537
  538    ELSEIF  bwbst = 'X'.       "only valuated stocks
  539  *   copy the existing select-options
  540      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  541
  542    ELSEIF  sbbst = 'X'.       "only special stocks
  543      IF      sobkz  =  'O'  OR
  544              sobkz  =  'V'  OR
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    797
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  545              sobkz  =  'W'.
  546        MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  547  **     only records with storage location = space allowed
  548  *      MOVE : 'I'             TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  549  *             'EQ'            TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  550  *      APPEND                 g_ra_lgort.
  551      ELSE.
  552  *     Copy the existing select-options
  553        MOVE lgort[]             TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  554      ENDIF.
  555    ENDIF.
  556
  557  ENDFORM.                     "f0600_create_range_lgort

  708                                                              "n497992

  710           ttypv-fieldname = 'MATNR'.                         "n497992
  711  *       avoid error reported by the code inspector : to
  712  *       emerge this message during this SELECT - ENDSELECT
  713  *       loop will create a problem for the database cursor
  714          MOVE  'X'         TO  l_flag_m7390.
  715          EXIT.                                               "n497992
  716        ENDIF.                                                "n497992
  717      ENDSELECT.                                              "n497992

  719
  720      IF l_flag_m7390 IS INITIAL.                             "v_2197941

  728          APPEND                g_ra_bukrs.
  729        ELSEIF werks IS NOT INITIAL.

  731             FROM       t001k AS t001k
  732             INNER JOIN t001w AS t001w                   "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
  733             ON   t001w~bwkey EQ t001k~bwkey
  734            WHERE t001w~werks IN werks.

  737                     'I'        TO  g_ra_bukrs-sign.

  745          DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bukrs.
  746        ENDIF.

  751                 AND  tabname NE 'BSET'.
  752          IF ttypvx-awtyp = 'MKPF'.
  753            MOVE  'X'       TO  l_flag_m7390.
  754            EXIT.
  755          ENDIF.
  756          IF ttypvx-fieldname = '*'      OR
  757             ttypvx-fieldname = 'MATNR'.
  758            MOVE  'X'       TO  l_flag_m7390.
  759            EXIT.
  760          ENDIF.
  761        ENDSELECT.
  762
  763      ENDIF.                                                  "^_2197941
  764
  765  *   emerge message after this SELECT - ENDSELECT loop if    "3256747
  766  *   an error was detected                                   "3256747
  767      IF  l_flag_m7390 = 'X'.
  768  *       emerge warning ?                                    "n497992
  769        CALL FUNCTION 'ME_CHECK_T160M'                        "n497992
  770          EXPORTING                                           "n497992
  771            i_arbgb = 'M7'                           "n497992
  772            i_msgnr = '390'                          "n497992
  773          EXCEPTIONS                                          "n497992
  774            nothing = 0                              "n497992
  775            OTHERS  = 1.                             "n497992
  776                                                              "n497992
  777        IF sy-subrc <> 0.                                     "n497992
  778  *         FI summarization active / results could be wrong  "n497992
  779          MESSAGE            w390.                            "n497992

  781      ENDIF.
  782    ENDIF.                                                    "n497992

  816    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218

  833      ENDIF.

  843            OTHERS  = 1.

  846        ENDIF.
  847      ENDIF.
  848    ENDIF.

  868      WHEN  OTHERS.                                           "n599218
  869  *      process selection for scope of list                  "n599218

 1279  *    F1100_CHECK_LGORT_SOKZG
 1280  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1281
 1282  FORM f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.
 1283    CLEAR                      g_flag_delete.
 1284  *   c) additional checks if valuated stock is required
 1285    IF  bwbst = 'X'.
 1286  *     check fields sobkz and kzwbs for valuated stocks
 1287      IF      g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  c_space  OR
 1288              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'O'      OR
 1289              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'V'      OR
 1290              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'W'.                    "n435403
 1291  *       OK : special stock indicator = ' ', 'O', 'W' or 'V'
 1292      ELSEIF  g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'A'  OR
 1293              g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'M'.
 1294  *       ok : document with valuated special stock
 1295      ELSE.
 1296        MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1297      ENDIF.
 1298
 1299      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1300  * GA1551829
 1301  *     A&D subcontracting valuated stock = 'F' or 'R'
 1302      IF g_flag_delete IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1303         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1304           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1305        IF g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws IS NOT INITIAL.
 1306          CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1307        ELSE.
 1308  *         before note 1592894, automatic 541 line has empty KZBWS
 1309          CALL FUNCTION 'GET_BUSTR_FROM_MOVEMENT_TYPE'
 1310            EXPORTING
 1311              bwart    = g_s_mseg_lean-bwart
 1312            IMPORTING
 1313              bustr    = gv_bustr_tp
 1314            EXCEPTIONS
 1315              no_entry = 1
 1316              OTHERS   = 2.
 1317          IF gv_bustr_tp EQ cl_adsub_constants=>bustr_tp.
 1318            CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1319          ENDIF.
 1320        ENDIF.
 1321      ENDIF.
 1322      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1323
 1324  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1325
 1326    ELSE.
 1327  *   b) check the combination of special stock indicator and
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    810
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1328  *      storage location
 1329      IF       g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'O'  OR
 1330               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'V'  OR
 1331               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'W'.
 1332        "do nothing allow entries with a storage location
 1333      ELSEIF   g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'T'.               "SIT
 1334  *     these entries must not have a storage location
 1335        IF  NOT g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1336          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1337        ENDIF.
 1338      ELSE.
 1339  *     the others entries should have a storage location
 1340        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1341          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1342        ENDIF.
 1343      ENDIF.
 1344
 1345      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1346  * GA1551829
 1347  * A&D subcontracting stock: 'C', 'F', 'I', 'J' or 'R'
 1348  * these entries must not have a storage location
 1349      IF g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL AND
 1350         g_flag_delete       IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1351         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>c OR
 1352           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1353           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>i OR
 1354           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>j OR
 1355           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1356        CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1357      ENDIF.
 1358      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }

 1361
 1362    ENDIF.

 1417  *    F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK
 1418  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1419
 1420  FORM f9000_auth_plant_check
 1421                     USING     l_f_werks LIKE marc-werks.
 1422
 1423    CLEAR                      g_flag_authority.
 1424    ADD  1                     TO  g_f_cnt_before.
 1425
 1426    READ TABLE g_t_auth_plant  WITH KEY
 1427                               werks = l_f_werks BINARY SEARCH.
 1428
 1429    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1430  *   plant found in buffer; take the result from the buffer
 1431      MOVE  g_t_auth_plant-ok            TO  g_flag_authority.
 1432    ELSE.
 1433  *   new plant / do the authority check / save result in buffer table
 1434      AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'M_MSEG_WMB'
 1435                      ID 'ACTVT' FIELD actvt03
 1436                      ID 'WERKS' FIELD  l_f_werks.
 1437
 1438      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1439        MOVE : 'X'             TO  g_t_auth_plant-ok,
 1440               'X'             TO  g_flag_authority.
 1441      ELSE.
 1442        CLEAR : g_t_auth_plant-ok, g_flag_authority.
 1443      ENDIF.
 1444
 1445      MOVE  l_f_werks          TO  g_t_auth_plant-werks.
 1446      APPEND                   g_t_auth_plant.
 1447      SORT                     g_t_auth_plant.
 1448    ENDIF.
 1449
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    812
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1450    IF  g_flag_authority = 'X'.
 1451      ADD  1                   TO  g_f_cnt_after.
 1452    ENDIF.
 1453
 1454  ENDFORM.                     "f9000_authority_check_plant

 1502                     USING     l_f_keytype   LIKE g_s_organ-keytype
 1503                               l_f_keyfield  LIKE g_s_organ-keyfield.
 1504
 1505  * buffer
 1506    STATICS : l_s_old      TYPE      stype_organ,
 1507              l_9300_subrc LIKE      sy-subrc.
 1508

 1510        l_f_keyfield  =  l_s_old-keyfield.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    813
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1511  *   the same key : take the data from the buffer
 1512      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  l_s_old        TO  g_s_organ.
 1513      MOVE  l_9300_subrc                 TO  sy-subrc.
 1514    ELSE.
 1515  *   the key has changed : read in table g_t_organ
 1516      READ TABLE g_t_organ     WITH KEY
 1517                               keytype   =  l_f_keytype
 1518                               keyfield  =  l_f_keyfield
 1519                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1520
 1521      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1522  *     entry found
 1523        MOVE-CORRESPONDING : g_t_organ   TO  g_s_organ,
 1524                             g_t_organ   TO  l_s_old.
 1525        CLEAR                            l_9300_subrc.
 1526      ELSE.
 1527  *     entry not found / fill the buffer
 1528        CLEAR : l_s_old,       g_s_organ.
 1529        MOVE  : sy-subrc       TO  l_9300_subrc,
 1530                l_f_keytype    TO  l_s_old-keytype,
 1531                l_f_keyfield   TO  l_s_old-keyfield.
 1532      ENDIF.
 1533    ENDIF.

 1551  *    f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1552  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1553
 1554  FORM f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1555           USING  l_s_belege   TYPE  stype_belege
 1556                  l_f_tabname  TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1557
 1558    DATA : l_f_fieldname       TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1559    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs_field>.
 1560
 1561  * clear the table with the color information
 1562    REFRESH color. CLEAR color.
 1563
 1564    LOOP AT g_t_color_fields.
 1565      CONCATENATE  l_f_tabname
 1566                   '-'
 1567                   g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1568                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 1569      ASSIGN (l_f_fieldname)   TO  <l_fs_field>.
 1570
 1571      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    814
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1572
 1573      MOVE : g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1574                               TO  color-fieldname,
 1575             0                 TO  color-color-int.
 1576
 1577  *   the color and the sign of this numeric field depend on the
 1578  *   debit/credit-indicator
 1579      CASE    l_s_belege-shkzg.
 1580        WHEN  'H'.
 1581          color-color-col = '6'.         "red
 1582          APPEND color.
 1583
 1584          IF  g_t_color_fields-type  <>  'C'.
 1585            COMPUTE : <l_fs_field> = <l_fs_field> * -1.
 1586          ENDIF.
 1587
 1588        WHEN  'S'.
 1589          color-color-col = '5'.         "green
 1590          APPEND color.
 1591      ENDCASE.
 1592    ENDLOOP.
 1593
 1594  * customizing : set the color information
 1595    IF  g_cust_color  = 'X'.
 1596  *   default : colorize the numeric fields
 1597      MOVE  color[]            TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_feld.
 1598    ELSE.
 1599  *   the performant way : colorize the line on when GI
 1600      IF  l_s_belege-shkzg = 'H'.
 1601        MOVE  'C21'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "grey
 1602      ELSE.
 1603        MOVE  'C20'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "light grey
 1604      ENDIF.
 1605    ENDIF.
 1606
 1607  ENDFORM.                     "f9500_set_color_and_sign

 1618  FORM tpc_check_tax_auditor.                                 "n547170
 1619                                                              "n547170
 1620  * - the function module FI_CHECK_DATE of note 486477 will   "n547170
 1621  *   be processed when it exists                             "n547170

 1623      EXPORTING                                               "n547170
 1624        funcname           = 'FI_CHECK_DATE'              "n547170
 1625      EXCEPTIONS                                              "n547170
 1626        function_not_exist = 1                            "n547170
 1627        OTHERS             = 2.                           "n547170
 1628                                                              "n547170
 1629    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                   "n547170
 1630  *   the function module FI_CHECK_DATE exists -> go on       "n547170
 1631                                                              "n547170
 1632  *   separate time depending authorization for tax auditor   "n547170
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    815
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1633  *   first step : check, whether the user is a tax auditor   "n547170
 1634      MOVE  sy-repid             TO  g_f_repid.               "n486477
 1635                                                              "n486477
 1636      CALL FUNCTION 'FI_CHECK_DATE'                           "n486477
 1637        EXPORTING                                             "n486477
 1638          i_bukrs           = space                           "n486477
 1639          i_user            = sy-uname                        "n486477
 1640          i_program         = g_f_repid                       "n486477
 1641        IMPORTING                                             "n486477
 1642          e_return          = g_flag_tpcuser                  "n486477
 1643        EXCEPTIONS                                            "n486477
 1644          no_authority_prog = 1                               "n486477
 1645          no_authority_date = 2                               "n486477
 1646          wrong_parameter   = 3                               "n486477
 1647          OTHERS            = 4.                              "n486477
 1648                                                              "n486477
 1649      CASE  sy-subrc.                                         "n486477
 1650        WHEN  0.                                              "n486477
 1651  *       what kind of user : g_flag_tpcuser = 1 tax auditor  "n486477
 1652  *                           g_flag_tpcuser = 4 other other  "n486477
 1653        WHEN  1.                                              "n486477
 1654  *       user is tax auditor, but program is not allowed     "n486477
 1655          MESSAGE  e001(ca_check_date) WITH g_f_repid.        "n486477
 1656                                                              "n486477
 1657        WHEN  OTHERS.                                         "n486477
 1658  *       other error                                         "n486477
 1659          MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno   "n486477
 1660                  WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.   "n486477
 1661      ENDCASE.                                                "n486477
 1662    ENDIF.                                                    "n547170
 1663                                                              "n486477
 1664    IF  g_flag_tpcuser = '1'.                                 "n486477
 1665  *   check and complete the selection-dates                  "n486477
 1666      IF datum-low IS INITIAL.                                "n486477
 1667        datum-low = '00000101'.                               "n486477
 1668        IF datum-high IS INITIAL.                             "n486477
 1669          datum-high = '99991231'.                            "n486477
 1670        ENDIF.                                                "n486477
 1671      ELSE.                                                   "n486477
 1672        IF datum-high IS INITIAL.                             "n486477
 1673          datum-high = datum-low.                             "n486477
 1674        ENDIF.                                                "n486477
 1675      ENDIF.                                                  "n486477
 1676                                                              "n486477
 1677  *   second step : the user is an auditor -> check periods   "n486477
 1678      PERFORM                  tpc_check_date_for_all_cc.     "n486477
 1679    ENDIF.                                                    "n486477
 1680                                                              "n547170
 1681  ENDFORM.                     "tpc_check_tax_auditor         "n547170
 1682                                                              "n547170

 1694  * clear working aeras and ranges                            "n486477
 1695    CLEAR    : g_s_bukrs,  g_s_t001k,  g_s_t001w.             "n486477
 1696    REFRESH  : g_t_bukrs,  g_t_t001k,  g_t_t001w.             "n486477
 1697                                                              "n486477
 1698    IF  werks[] IS INITIAL.                                   "n486477
 1699  *   no restriction for plant :                              "n486477
 1700  *   get all matching company codes from table T001          "n486477
 1701      SELECT bukrs             FROM t001                      "n486477
 1702           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_bukrs       "n486477
 1703           WHERE  bukrs IN bukrs.                             "n486477
 1704                                                              "n486477
 1705      IF  sy-subrc <> 0.                                      "n486477
 1706        SET  CURSOR            FIELD  'BUKRS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1707        MESSAGE  e282(m7).     "Company code does not exist   "n486477
 1708      ENDIF.                                                  "n486477
 1709    ELSE.                                                     "n486477
 1710  *   look for the corresponding company codes                "n486477
 1711      PERFORM                  tpc_check_get_all_cc.          "n486477
 1712    ENDIF.                                                    "n486477
 1713                                                              "n486477
 1714  * check the selected company codes and the dates            "n486477
 1715    LOOP AT g_t_bukrs          INTO  g_s_bukrs.               "n486477
 1716  *   check the authorization for dates and company code      "n486477
 1717      CALL FUNCTION 'FI_CHECK_DATE'                           "n486477
 1718        EXPORTING                                             "n486477
 1719          i_bukrs           = g_s_bukrs-bukrs                 "n486477
 1720          i_user            = sy-uname                        "n486477
 1721          i_program         = g_f_repid                       "n486477
 1722          i_from_date       = datum-low                       "n486477
 1723          i_to_date         = datum-high                      "n486477
 1724        EXCEPTIONS                                            "n486477
 1725          no_authority_prog = 1                               "n486477
 1726          no_authority_date = 2                               "n486477
 1727          wrong_parameter   = 3                               "n486477
 1728          OTHERS            = 4.                              "n486477
 1729                                                              "n486477
 1730      CASE sy-subrc.                                          "n486477
 1731        WHEN 0.                                               "n486477
 1732  *       authorization ok --> take this company code         "n486477
 1733                                                              "n486477
 1734        WHEN 2.                                               "n486477
 1735  *       send 2 messages to show the company code           "n486477
 1736          SET  CURSOR          FIELD  'BUKRS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1737  *       no display authorization for company code &         "n486477
 1738          MESSAGE  i113(fg)    WITH  g_s_bukrs-bukrs.         "n486477
 1739                                                              "n486477
 1740          SET CURSOR           FIELD  'BWKEY-LOW'.            "n486477
 1741  *       Keine Berechtigung zur Anzeige von Daten aus ...    "n486477
 1742          MESSAGE              e002(ca_check_date).           "n486477
 1743                                                              "n486477
 1744        WHEN OTHERS.                                          "n486477
 1745  *       an error occurred                                   "n486477
 1746          MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno   "n486477
 1747                  WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.   "n486477
 1748      ENDCASE.                                                "n486477
 1749    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n486477
 1750                                                              "n486477
 1751    FREE : g_t_bukrs,  g_t_t001k,  g_t_t001w.                 "n486477
 1752                                                              "n486477

 1755  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n486477
 1756  *   tpc_check_get_all_cc                                    "n486477

 1762  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1763  *       text
 1764  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1765  FORM tpc_check_get_all_cc.                                  "n486477
 1766                                                              "n486477
 1767  * select the matching plants from T001W                     "n486477
 1768    SELECT werks bwkey         FROM  t001w                    "n486477
 1769           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_t001w       "n486477
 1770           WHERE  werks IN werks.                             "n486477
 1771                                                              "n486477
 1772    IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                  "n486477
 1773      SORT  g_t_t001w          BY  werks bwkey.               "n486477
 1774    ELSE.                                                     "n486477
 1775      SET CURSOR               FIELD  'WERKS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1776  *   Plant & does not exist                                  "n486477
 1777      MESSAGE e892             WITH   werks-low.              "n486477
 1778    ENDIF.                                                    "n486477
 1779                                                              "n486477
 1780    LOOP AT g_t_t001w          INTO  g_s_t001w.               "n486477
 1781  *   select the matching valuation areas and comany codes    "n486477
 1782      SELECT SINGLE bwkey bukrs FROM  t001k                   "n486477
 1783           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF g_s_t001k             "n486477
 1784           WHERE  bwkey  =  g_s_t001w-bwkey                   "n486477
 1785             AND  bukrs  IN bukrs.                            "n486477
 1786                                                              "n486477
 1787      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n486477
 1788        MOVE  g_s_t001k-bukrs  TO  g_s_bukrs-bukrs.           "n486477
 1789        COLLECT  g_s_bukrs     INTO  g_t_bukrs.               "n486477
 1790      ELSE.                                                   "n486477
 1791        SET CURSOR             FIELD  'WERKS-LOW'.            "n486477
 1792        MESSAGE  e283          WITH   g_s_t001w-werks.        "n486477
 1793      ENDIF.                                                  "n486477
 1794    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n486477
 1795                                                              "n486477
 1796  ENDFORM.                     "tpc_check_get_all_cc          "n486477

 1946  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1947  *&      Form  ADD_ARIDX_DOC_TO_G_T_MSEG_LEAN
 1948  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1949  FORM add_aridx_doc_to_g_t_mseg_lean .
 1950  * Eliminate dublettes from the archive and tranfer data       "n1481757
 1951  * into working ITAB                                           "n1481757
 1952    READ TABLE g_t_mseg_lean   INTO g_s_mseg_lean             "n1481757
 1953                               WITH KEY mblnr = xmseg-mblnr   "n1481757
 1954                               mjahr = xmseg-mjahr            "n1481757
 1955                               zeile = xmseg-zeile            "n1481757
 1956                               BINARY SEARCH.                 "n1481757
 1957                                                              "n1481757
 1958    CASE  sy-subrc.                                           "n1481757
 1959      WHEN  0.                                                "n1481757
 1960  *       MM doc is available from database -> ignore it        "n1481757
 1961                                                              "n1481757
 1962      WHEN  4.                                                "n1481757
 1963  *       MM doc not found -> insert entry                      "n1481757
 1964        MOVE  sy-tabix       TO  g_f_tabix.                   "n1481757
 1965        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1966          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1967          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1968                                                              "n1481757
 1969        INSERT g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_mseg_lean INDEX  g_f_tabix. "n148175
       7
 1970        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1971                                                              "n1481757
 1972      WHEN  8.                                                "n1481757
 1973  *       MM doc not found / key to high -> append entry        "n1481757
 1974        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1975          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1976          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1977                                                              "n1481757
 1978        APPEND g_s_mseg_lean TO g_t_mseg_lean.                "n1481757
 1979        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1980                                                              "n1481757
 1981    ENDCASE.                                                  "n1481757
 1982                                                              "n1481757
 1983                                                              "n1481757
 1984  ENDFORM.                    " ADD_ARIDX_DOC_TO_G_T_MSEG_LEAN

 2083  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2084  *&      Form  FILL_FRANGE
 2085  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2086  FORM fill_frange .
 2087  * copy select-options for field FELDNAME                      "n1481757
 2088  * using select-option table FELDNAME                          "n1481757
 2089                                                              "n1481757
 2090    IF matnr IS NOT INITIAL.                                  "n1481757
 2091      REFRESH g_s_frange-selopt_t.                            "n1904996
 2092      LOOP AT matnr.                                          "n1904996
 2093        MOVE-CORRESPONDING matnr TO g_s_selopt.               "n1481757
 2094        APPEND  g_s_selopt  TO  g_s_frange-selopt_t.          "n1481757
 2095      ENDLOOP.                                                "n1904996
 2096                                                              "n1481757
 2097      MOVE 'MATNR' TO g_s_frange-fieldname.                   "n1481757
 2098      APPEND  g_s_frange   TO  g_t_frange.                    "n1481757
 2099    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
 2100                                                              "n1481757
 2101    IF bukrs IS NOT INITIAL.                                  "n1481757
 2102      REFRESH g_s_frange-selopt_t.                            "n1904996
 2103      LOOP AT bukrs.                                          "n1904996
 2104        MOVE-CORRESPONDING bukrs TO g_s_selopt.               "n1481757
 2105        APPEND  g_s_selopt  TO  g_s_frange-selopt_t.          "n1481757
 2106      ENDLOOP.                                                "n1904996
 2107                                                              "n1481757
 2108      MOVE 'BUKRS' TO g_s_frange-fieldname.                   "n1481757
 2109      APPEND  g_s_frange   TO  g_t_frange.                    "n1481757
 2110    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
 2111                                                              "n1481757
 2112    IF werks IS NOT INITIAL.                                  "n1481757

 2169  *   datum is defined with NO EXTENSION and has such max.    "n2110304
 2170  *   one entry. We take only datum-low as we need all        "n2110304
 2171  *   documents from archive till datum-low for the back      "n2110304

 2175      g_s_selopt-sign = 'I'.                                  "n2110304

 2215  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2216  *&      Form  GET_ARCHIVE_FIELD_CATALOGS
 2217  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2218  FORM get_archive_field_catalogs .
 2219    CLEAR   : g_f_afcat.                                      "n1481757
 2220    REFRESH : g_t_aind_str1_fc.                               "n1481757
 2221                                                              "n1481757
 2222  *   look for active archive info structures from the        "n1481757
 2223  *   customizing tables aind_str1 and aind_str2              "n1481757
 2224    SELECT aind_str1~archindex                  "#EC CI_BYPASS  "n1511550
 2225         aind_str1~itype                                      "n1481757
 2226         aind_str1~skey                                       "n1481757
 2227    INTO TABLE g_t_aind_str1_ais                              "n1481757
 2228      FROM aind_str1 JOIN aind_str2           "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN  "n1511550
 2229      ON aind_str1~archindex = aind_str2~archindex            "n1481757
 2230           WHERE itype  = 'I'                                 "n1481757
 2231             AND aind_str1~archindex = pa_aistr               "n1481757
 2232             AND object = 'MM_MATBEL'                         "n1481757
 2233             AND active = 'X'.                                "n1481757
 2234  * there must be one entry                                   "n1481757
 2235    IF sy-dbcnt <> 1.                                         "n1481757
 2236      SET CURSOR               FIELD 'PA_AISTR'.              "n1481757
 2237  *   Enter a suitable info structure                         "n1481757
 2238      MESSAGE e509(q6)         WITH pa_aistr.                 "n1481757
 2239    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
 2240                                                              "n1481757

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2241    READ TABLE g_t_aind_str1_ais                              "n1481757
 2242      INTO g_s_aind_str1_ais                                  "n1481757
 2243        INDEX 1.                                              "n1481757
 2244                                                              "n1481757
 2245    CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                              "n1481757
 2246  ENDFORM.                    " GET_ARCHIVE_FIELD_CATALOGS
 2247  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2248  *&      Form  FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR
 2249  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2250  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or                                 "n1481757
 2251              USING    uht_mmdocs_arch
 2252              CHANGING ct_mseg_key TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2253                       ct_mseg_or TYPE stab_mseg_xauto.
 2254    " c_ra_xauto.
 2255
 2256    DATA: lt_mseg_key       TYPE stab_mseg_xauto,
 2257          lt_mseg_key_group LIKE lt_mseg_key.
 2258
 2259    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_group,
 2260             mblnr LIKE mkpf-mblnr,
 2261             mjahr LIKE mkpf-mjahr,
 2262           END OF ts_group.
 2263
 2264    DATA: ls_group_new TYPE ts_group,
 2265          ls_group_old TYPE ts_group.
 2266
 2267  *data: lt_ra_xauto like gt_ra_xauto.
 2268
 2269    FIELD-SYMBOLS  <ls_mseg_key> LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key.
 2270
 2271  *-----------------------------------------------------------------------
       *
 2272
 2273    MOVE ct_mseg_key[] TO lt_mseg_key[].
 2274    REFRESH ct_mseg_key.
 2275
 2276  *APPEND c_ra_xauto to lt_ra_xauto.
 2277
 2278    SORT lt_mseg_key BY mblnr mjahr zeile.
 2279
 2280    LOOP AT lt_mseg_key ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_key>.
 2281      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_key> TO ls_group_new.
 2282
 2283      IF ls_group_new <> ls_group_old.
 2284        PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2285  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2286                CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
 2287                          lt_mseg_key
 2288                          ct_mseg_or.
 2289
 2290        MOVE ls_group_new TO ls_group_old.
 2291        REFRESH lt_mseg_key_group.
 2292      ENDIF.
 2293
 2294      APPEND <ls_mseg_key>  TO lt_mseg_key_group.
 2295
 2296    ENDLOOP.
 2297
 2298    PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2299  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2300               CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    826
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2301                         lt_mseg_key
 2302                         ct_mseg_or.
 2303  ENDFORM.                    " FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR         "n1481757
 2304  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2305  *&      Form  FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR_GROUP
 2306  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2307  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group                           "n1481757
 2308  *            using    ut_ra_xauto       like gt_ra_xauto
 2309              CHANGING ct_mseg_key_group TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2310                       ct_mseg_key       TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2311                       ct_mseg_or        TYPE stab_mseg_xauto.
 2312
 2313  *--------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2314    DATA: ls_mseg_key_group LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key_group,
 2315          ls_mseg_or        LIKE LINE OF  ct_mseg_or.
 2316  *      lt_mseg_archiv Like mseg.
 2317
 2318    DATA : BEGIN OF lt_mseg_archiv  OCCURS 0.
 2319             INCLUDE STRUCTURE   mseg.
 2320    DATA : END OF lt_mseg_archiv.
 2321
 2322    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <ls_mseg_archiv> LIKE LINE OF lt_mseg_archiv.
 2323
 2324  *--------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2325
 2326    READ TABLE ct_mseg_key_group INTO ls_mseg_key_group
 2327        INDEX 1.
 2328
 2329    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2330      RETURN.
 2331    ENDIF.
 2332
 2333    READ TABLE  ht_mmdocs_arch INTO wa_hashtable
 2334       WITH TABLE KEY mblnr = ls_mseg_key_group-mblnr
 2335                      mjahr = ls_mseg_key_group-mjahr.
 2336
 2337  * check if there are mm docs from the archive
 2338
 2339    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2340      APPEND LINES OF ct_mseg_key_group TO g_t_mseg_key_te.
 2341      RETURN.
 2342    ENDIF.
 2343
 2344    CALL FUNCTION 'ASH_MM_MATBEL_READ'
 2345      EXPORTING
 2346        i_archivekey   = wa_hashtable-archivekey
 2347        i_offset       = wa_hashtable-offset
 2348      TABLES
 2349        et_mseg        = lt_mseg_archiv
 2350      EXCEPTIONS
 2351        not_in_archive = 1
 2352        OTHERS         = 2.
 2353    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2354      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
 2355              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
 2356    ENDIF.
 2357
 2358    LOOP AT lt_mseg_archiv ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_archiv>.
 2359
 2360      READ TABLE ct_mseg_key_group INTO ls_mseg_key_group
 2361        WITH KEY mblnr = <ls_mseg_archiv>-mblnr
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    827
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2362                 mjahr = <ls_mseg_archiv>-mjahr
 2363                 zeile = <ls_mseg_archiv>-zeile BINARY SEARCH.
 2364
 2365      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 2366  *  delete ct_mseg_key_group.
 2367
 2368      IF ls_mseg_key_group-xauto IN g_ra_xauto.
 2369        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_archiv> TO ls_mseg_or.
 2370        APPEND ls_mseg_or TO ct_mseg_or.
 2371      ENDIF.
 2372
 2373      IF ct_mseg_key_group IS INITIAL.
 2374        EXIT.
 2375      ENDIF.
 2376
 2377    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n1481757
 2378  ENDFORM.             " FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR_GROUP          "n1481757

    9  *   MAT_PSPNR from release 4.5B and higher                  "n599218

   15  * - customizing for the selection of remaining BSIM entries "n497992
   16  * - customizing for the processing of tied empties          "n497992

   18  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
   19  * report RM07MLBD and its includes improved  May 10th, 2001 "n400992
   20  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
   21
   22  * This include contains the structure for additional fields for report
   23  * RM07MLBD ( transaction MB5B )
   24
   25  * the following fields are not shown in the list of report
   26  * RM07MLBD
   27  * If you want to insert some of these fields in the list of the
   28  * hidden fields delete the '*' in the type definition.
   29  *
   30  * There are only fields from database table MSEG possible
   31  * Please use only the following fields, because these fields
   32  * are considered during the creation of the field catalog;
   33  * plaese consider, that each active field will cost performance
   34
   35  ENHANCEMENT-SECTION RM07MLBD_CUST_FIELDS_01 SPOTS ES_RM07MLBD_CUST_FIELD
       S STATIC .
   36  TYPES : BEGIN OF STYPE_MB5B_ADD,
   37            DUMMY(01)          TYPE C,             "filler
   38  *
   39  * the following fields of database table MSEG can be activated
   40  *         insmk    like      mseg-insmk,    "Bestandsart
   41  *         LIFNR    LIKE      MSEG-LIFNR,    "Kontonummer Lieferant
   42  *         KUNNR    LIKE      MSEG-KUNNR,    "Kontonummer Kunde
   43
   44  *  Caution : functionalitiy was changed after release 4.0B  "n599218
   45  *  you will find the sales order in the following fields :  "n599218
   46  *  Field       Description           release                "n599218
   47  *  MAT_KDAUF   sales order number    4.5B and higher        "n599218
   48  *  MAT_KDPOS   sales order item      4.5B and higher        "n599218
   49  *  KDAUF       sales order number    4.0B                   "n599218
   50  *  KDPOS       sales order item      4.0B                   "n599218
   51  *                                                           "n599218
   52  *         MAT_KDAUF  like    mseg-mat_kdauf,                "n599218
   53  *         MAT_KDPOS  like    mseg-mat_kdpos,                "n599218
   54  *         KDAUF    LIKE      MSEG-KDAUF,    "Kundenauftragsnummer
   55  *         KDPOS    LIKE      MSEG-KDPOS,    "Positionsnummer
   56
   57  *         KDEIN    LIKE      MSEG-KDEIN,    "Einteilung Kundenauftrag
   58  *
   59  * please activate or deactivate the following two fields togehter
   60  *        erfmg    like      mseg-erfmg,    "Menge in ERFME
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_CUST_FIELDS                  Page    854
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

   61  *         erfme    like      mseg-erfme,    "Erfassungsmengeneinheit
   62  *
   63  * please activate or deactivate the following two fields togehter
   64  *         BPMNG    LIKE      MSEG-BPMNG,    " Menge in BPRME
   65  *         BPRME    LIKE      MSEG-BPRME,    " Bestellpreismengeneinheit
   66  *
   67  *         EBELN    LIKE      MSEG-EBELN,    " Bestellnummer
   68  *         EBELP    LIKE      MSEG-EBELP,    " Positionsnummer
   69  *
   70  *         ELIKZ    LIKE      MSEG-ELIKZ,    " Endlieferungskennzeichen

  268  * ( FI document ) without matching MSEG ( MM document )     "n497992
  269  * like price changes, account adjustments, etc...           "n497992
  270  *                                                           "n497992
  271  * value ' ' : (default) take all remaining BSIM entries     "n497992
  272  * value 'X' : take only the remaining BSIM entries when     "n497992
  273  *             when the original BSEG entry contains the     "n497992
  274  *             transaction key ( KTOSL ) 'BSX'               "n497992
  275  *             this mode will cost performance               "n497992
  276    data : G_cust_bseg_bsx(01) type c    value ' '.           "n497992
  277  * data : G_cust_bseg_bsx(01) type c    value 'X'.           "n497992
  278

  281  * customizing for the processing of tied emptied materials  "n497992
  282  *                                                           "n497992
  283  * value ' ' : (default) do not consider tied empties        "n497992
  284  * value 'X' : consider tied empties materials with their    "n497992
  285  *             special rules in the inventory management     "n497992
  286  *             this mode will cost performance               "n497992
  287    data : G_cust_tied_empties(01)  type c    value ' '.      "n497992

   47  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
   48  *&      Form  INITIALISIERUNG
   49  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
   50  *       Vorbelegung der Anzeigevariante                                *
   51  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
   52
   53  FORM initialisierung.
   54
   55    repid = sy-repid.
   56    variant_save = 'A'.
   57    CLEAR variante.
   58    variante-report = repid.
   59  * Default-Variante holen:
   60    def_variante = variante.
   61
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    860
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

   62    CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_VARIANT_DEFAULT_GET'
   63      EXPORTING
   64        i_save     = variant_save
   65      CHANGING
   66        cs_variant = def_variante
   67      EXCEPTIONS
   68        not_found  = 2.
   69    IF sy-subrc = 0.
   70  *   save the initial, e.g. default variant                  "n599218
   71      MOVE  def_variante-variant  TO  alv_default_variant.    "n599218
   72      p_vari = def_variante-variant.
   73    ENDIF.
   74  *  print-no_print_listinfos = 'X'.
   75
   76  * show the block with the parameters for the best database  "n921165
   77  * access depending on the database system                   "n921165
   78    MOVE  sy-dbsys+0(03)       TO  g_f_database.              "n921165
   79                                                              "n921165
   80    BREAK-POINT                ID mmim_rep_mb5b.              "n921164
   81  * dynamic break-point : check installed database system     "n921165
   82                                                              "n921165
   83    IF  g_f_database = 'INF'   OR                             "n921165
   84        g_f_database = 'DB6'   OR                             "n921165
   85        g_f_database = 'MSS'   OR   " consider MSSQL, too     "n921165
   86        g_f_database = 'ADA'.                                 "n921165
   87  *   show the 3 parameters                                   "n921165
   88      MOVE : 'X'               TO  g_flag_db_parameters.      "n921165
   89    ELSE.                                                     "n921165
   90  *   ORACLE and DB2 work hist histograms                     "n921165
   91  *   do not show the 3 parameters on the selection screen    "n921165
   92      CLEAR                    g_flag_db_parameters.          "n921165
   93  *   set hidden parameters                                   "n921165
   94      MOVE  'X'                TO  pa_dbstd.                  "n921165
   95      CLEAR :                  pa_dbmat, pa_dbdat.            "n921165
   96    ENDIF.                                                    "n921165
   97
   98    CALL FUNCTION 'MB_CHECK_MSEG_CONVERSION_DONE'             "n1558298
   99      IMPORTING                                               "n1558298
  100        e_conversion_done = g_f_msegex_act.             "n1558298
  101
  102  ENDFORM.                               " INITIALISIERUNG

  104  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
  105  *&      Form  AKTUELLE_BESTAENDE
  106  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
  107  *      Ermittlung der aktuellen eigenen Bestände,
  108  *      d.h. der bewerteten Bestände und des Retourensperrbestandes,
  109  *      auf Lagerortebene und auf Material- bzw. Chargenebene;
  110  *      folgende Sonderbestände können gesondert ausgewiesen werden:
  111  *       Lohnbearbeitung         ( Sonderbestandskennzeichen  O )
  112  *       Kundenkonsignation      (             "              V, W, M )
  113  *       Lieferantenkonsignation (             "              K )
  114  *       Projektbestand          (             "              Q )
  115  *       Kundenauftragsbestand   (             "              E )
  116  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  117
  118  FORM aktuelle_bestaende.

  121          lo_converter_osql TYPE REF TO if_auth_objects_to_sql. "vn_189954
       4

        = ''

       = 'WERKS' ) )

  492                                   AND  (gv_where_clause)     "n_1899544

  494                                 AND  charg  IN  charg
  495                                 AND  sobkz  =   'O'.
  496    ELSE.                                                     "n_1899544
  497      sy-subrc = 4.                                           "n_1899544
  498    ENDIF.                                                    "n_1899544

  500    IF sy-subrc <> 0.                     "no records found ?
  501      MESSAGE s289.
  502  *    Kein Material in Selektion vorhanden.
  503      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
  504    ENDIF.

  510                               USING      xmslb-werks.

  511

  904  *       Lesen der Materialkurztexte (Tabelle MAKT),                    *
  905  *       der Mengeneinheiten (Tabelle MARA) und                         *
  906  *       Mengen- und Wertfortschreibung zum Material (Tabelle T134M)    *

  912
  913    IF  NOT g_t_mat_key[] IS INITIAL.                         "n451923
  914  ENHANCEMENT-SECTION ehp605_tabellen_lesen_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
  915  LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07ML
       BD\EHP605_TABELLEN_LESEN_01\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer=>ge
       t_field( ).
  916  *   select the material masters
  917  PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MARA' ''.            "1791598/1710850
  918  SELECT matnr meins mtart
  919         /cwm/valum                                           "1734569
  920         /cwm/xcwmat FROM mara CONNECTION (dbcon)     "1791598/1710850
  921                 INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE imara
  922                 FOR ALL ENTRIES IN g_t_mat_key
  923                           WHERE  matnr  =  g_t_mat_key-matnr.
  924  END-ENHANCEMENT-SECTION.
  925
  926  *   select the short text for all materials
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    875
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  927  *   take only the necessary fields                          "n451923
  928      PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MAKT' ''.                "n1710850
  929      SELECT matnr maktx       FROM makt CONNECTION (dbcon)   "n1710850
  930           INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_makt        "n451923
  931                     FOR ALL ENTRIES IN g_t_mat_key
  932                     WHERE  matnr = g_t_mat_key-matnr
  933                       AND  spras = sy-langu.
  934
  935      SORT  imara              BY  matnr.                     "n451923
  936      SORT  g_t_makt           BY  matnr.                     "n451923
  937      FREE                     g_t_mat_key.
  938    ENDIF.
  939
  940    DATA: BEGIN OF k1 OCCURS 0,
  941            mtart LIKE t134m-mtart,
  942          END OF k1.
  943    REFRESH k1.
  944
  945    LOOP AT imara.
  946      k1-mtart = imara-mtart.
  947      COLLECT k1.

  950    IF  NOT k1[] IS INITIAL.                                  "n451923
