  959      PERFORM  f9300_read_organ
  960                     USING     c_bwkey     it134m-bwkey.
  961
  962      IF sy-subrc NE 0.
  963        DELETE it134m.
  964      ENDIF.
  965    ENDLOOP.
  966
  967  * To find postings with valuation string, but without relevance for
  968  * the valuated stock, Big-G recommended this logic:
  969  * Take lines from MSEG where for the combination BUSTW/XAUTO=XBGBB
  970  * there is an entry in T156W with key BSX.
  971    SELECT bustw xbgbb FROM t156w
  972                       INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it156w
  973                       WHERE vorsl = 'BSX'.
  974    SORT it156w BY bustw xbgbb.

 1023  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1024  *&      Form  FI_BELEGE_LESEN                                          *
 1025  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1026  *       Lesen der Buchhaltungsbelege                                   *
 1027  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1028  *  Beim Erfassen der Werte ist es notwendig, die Buchhaltungsbelege    *
 1029  *  zum Material zu lesen, um abweichende Werte zwischen Wareneingang   *
 1030  *  und Rechnungseingang sowie Nachbelastungen zu berücksichtigen.      *
 1031  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1032
 1033  FORM fi_belege_lesen.
 1034
 1035  * Not related to note 184465, but a significant performance issue
 1036  * if ORGAN is large due to many plants/storage locations.
 1037  * begin of 2749148                                             "v2749148
 1038    DATA: lr_bwkey  TYPE RANGE OF bseg-bwkey,
 1039          lrs_bwkey LIKE LINE OF lr_bwkey.
 1040
 1041    DATA: lv_zaehler TYPE i,
 1042          lv_limit TYPE limit_records.
 1043
 1044    lrs_bwkey-sign   = 'I'.
 1045    lrs_bwkey-option = 'EQ'.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    877
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1046
 1047    LOOP AT g_t_organ          WHERE  keytype  =  c_bwkey.
 1048      lrs_bwkey-low = g_t_organ-bwkey.
 1049      APPEND lrs_bwkey TO lr_bwkey.
 1050    ENDLOOP.
 1051
 1052    SORT lr_bwkey BY low.
 1053    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lr_bwkey COMPARING low.
 1054
 1055    IF lr_bwkey[] IS INITIAL.
 1056      RETURN.
 1057    ENDIF.
 1058
 1059    IF gv_run_mode = 'A'.                                         "3116194
 1060      DATA(lo_fi_reader) = cl_stock_on_postdate_fi_reader=>create( ).
 1061      g_t_bsim_lean = CORRESPONDING #( lo_fi_reader->set_earliest_posting_
       date( datum-low
 1062                                           )->set_material_numbers( matnr[
       ]
 1063                                           )->set_valuation_area( lr_bwkey
       []
 1064                                           )->set_valuation_types( bwtar[]
 1065                                           )->get( )
 1066                                      ).
 1067    ELSE.
 1068  * select is now made directly to BSEG instead of BSIM           "2749148
 1069  * thus we can also restrict to KTOSL = BSX directly             "2749148
 1070      SELECT mandt matnr bwkey bwtar belnr gjahr buzei
 1071             buzid shkzg dmbtr menge meins h_budat AS budat
 1072             h_bldat AS bldat h_blart AS blart squan awtyp    "3005740
 1073          FROM bseg
 1074             INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_bsim_lean
 1075                WHERE  bwkey   IN lr_bwkey
 1076                 AND   h_bstat <> 'D'
 1077                 AND   h_bstat <> 'M'
 1078                 AND   awtyp   <> 'GLYEC'
 1079                 AND   koart   =  'M'
 1080                 AND   matnr   <> ''
 1081                 AND   ktosl   =  'BSX'
 1082                 AND   matnr   IN matnr
 1083                 AND   bwtar   IN bwtar
 1084                 AND   h_budat >= datum-low.
 1085    ENDIF.
 1086  * end of 2749148
 1087
 1088  * Get record limit for table  to avoid memory overflow
 1089    SELECT SINGLE limit INTO lv_limit
 1090      FROM mmim_rep_ln_lim
 1091      WHERE report = 'RM07MLBD'
 1092        AND tabname = 'BSIM_LEAN'.
 1093                                                   "^2749148
 1094    CLEAR lv_zaehler.
 1095    LOOP AT g_t_bsim_lean      INTO  g_s_bsim_lean.           "n443935
 1096      PERFORM  f9300_read_organ
 1097                     USING     c_bwkey  g_s_bsim_lean-bwkey.  "n443935
 1098
 1099      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1100
 1101  *     record found : the user has the authority, go on
 1102        MOVE  g_s_organ-bukrs  TO  g_s_bsim_lean-bukrs.       "n443935
 1103        MODIFY  g_t_bsim_lean  FROM  g_s_bsim_lean            "n443935
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    878
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1104                               TRANSPORTING  bukrs.           "n451923
 1105
 1106       IF gv_run_mode IS INITIAL.                             "3116194
 1107  *     create working table with the keys for the FI documents
 1108        MOVE-CORRESPONDING  g_s_bsim_lean                     "n443935
 1109                               TO  g_t_bkpf_key.              "n443935
 1110        APPEND                 g_t_bkpf_key.
 1111       ENDIF.                                                 "3116194
 1112        IF lv_limit > 0.
 1113  * Check entries before the memory for internal table is to small
 1114          ADD 1 TO lv_zaehler.
 1115          IF lv_zaehler > lv_limit.
 1116            MESSAGE i555(m7).
 1117  * Too many records selected. Not enough memory. Restrict your selection
 1118            SUBMIT rm07mlbd VIA SELECTION-SCREEN .
 1119          ENDIF.
 1120        ENDIF.
 1121      ELSE.
 1122        DELETE                 g_t_bsim_lean.                 "n443935
 1123      ENDIF.
 1124    ENDLOOP.

 1126  ENDFORM.                               " FI_BELEGE_LESEN
 1127
 1128  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1129  *&      Form  BELEGE_SORTIEREN
 1130  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1131  *    Die Materialbelege werden anhand des Buchungsdatums sortiert.
 1132  *    Die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum zwischen 'datum-high'
 1133  *    und dem aktuellen Datum werden in der internen Tabelle IMSWEG
 1134  *    gesammelt, während die Materialbelege mit Buchungsdatum
 1135  *    zwischen 'datum-low' und 'datum-high' in der internen Tabelle
 1136  *    IMSEG verbleiben.
 1137  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1138
 1139  FORM belege_sortieren.
 1140
 1141    DATA: lv_zaehler TYPE i,
 1142          lv_limit TYPE limit_records.
 1143
 1144    aktdat = sy-datlo + 365.                                  "1227437
 1145    IF NOT ( datum-high IS INITIAL OR datum-high > aktdat ).
 1146  * Get record limit for table  to avoid memory overflow
 1147      SELECT SINGLE limit INTO lv_limit
 1148        FROM mmim_rep_ln_lim
 1149        WHERE report = 'RM07MLBD'
 1150          AND tabname = 'MSEG_LEAN'.
 1151
 1152      CLEAR lv_zaehler.
 1153      LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean    INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1154                               WHERE budat > datum-high.
 1155        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean TO imsweg.
 1156        IF lv_limit > 0.
 1157  * Check entries before the memory for internal table is to small
 1158          ADD 1 TO lv_zaehler.
 1159          IF lv_zaehler > lv_limit.

 1175  *&      Form  KONTIERT_AUSSORTIEREN

 1181  FORM kontiert_aussortieren.
 1182
 1183  * process table g_t_mseg_lean
 1184  * loop at imseg where kzvbr <> space and                         "144845
 1185  *     ( kzbew = 'B' or kzbew = 'F' ).                            "144845
 1186  *     read table imara with key matnr = imseg-matnr.
 1187  *     read table it134m with key mtart = imara-mtart.
 1188  *     if not it134m-mengu is initial and not it134m-wertu is initial.
 1189  *  Die Felder 'mengu' und 'wertu' (Mengen- bzw. Wertfortschreibung)
 1190  *  sind ab Release 3.0 D auch in die Tabelle MSEG aufgenommen.
 1191  *  Die Einträge in der Tabelle T134M stellen nach wie vor die generelle
 1192  *  Einstellung dar; auf Positionsebene sind jedoch Abänderungen möglich,
 1193  *  die anhand der Einträge in der Tabelle MSEG nachverfolgt werden
 1194  *  können.
 1195  *       delete imseg.
 1196  *     endif.
 1197  * endloop.
 1198
 1199    DATA : l_f_bwkey           LIKE  t001k-bwkey.             "n497992
 1200
 1201    SORT  it134m               BY  bwkey  mtart.              "n497992
 1202
 1203    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 1204                               WHERE  kzvbr <> space
 1205                                 AND ( kzbew = 'B' OR kzbew = 'F' ).
 1206
 1207  *   get the valuation area                                  "n497992
 1208      IF  curm = '3'.                                         "n497992
 1209  *     valuation level is company code                       "n497992
 1210        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs IS INITIAL.                   "n497992
 1211  *       get the valuation area for this plant               "n497992
 1212          PERFORM  f9300_read_organ                           "n497992
 1213                     USING     c_werks   g_s_mseg_lean-werks. "n497992
 1214                                                              "n497992
 1215          MOVE  g_s_organ-bwkey     TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1216        ELSE.                                                 "n497992
 1217          MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-bukrs TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1218        ENDIF.                                                "n497992
 1219      ELSE.                                                   "n497992
 1220  *     valuation level is plant                              "n497992
 1221        MOVE  g_s_mseg_lean-werks   TO  l_f_bwkey.            "n497992
 1222      ENDIF.                                                  "n497992
 1223
 1224      READ TABLE imara WITH KEY matnr = g_s_mseg_lean-matnr
 1225                               BINARY SEARCH.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    880
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1226
 1227      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1228        READ TABLE it134m      WITH KEY  bwkey = l_f_bwkey    "n497992
 1229                                         mtart = imara-mtart  "n497992
 1230                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1231
 1232        IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1233          IF NOT it134m-mengu IS INITIAL AND
 1234             NOT it134m-wertu IS INITIAL.
 1235            IF LGBST = abap_true.                             "3164181
 1236              IF NOT ( g_s_mseg_lean-mengu = abap_true AND
 1237                       g_s_mseg_lean-wertu = abap_false ).
 1238                DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 1239              ENDIF.
 1240            ELSE.
 1241              DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 1242            ENDIF.
 1243          ENDIF.
 1244        ENDIF.
 1245      ELSE.
 1246        DELETE                  g_t_mseg_lean.

 1252  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1253  *&      Form  BELEGE_ERGAENZEN (engl. enrich documents)
 1254  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1255  * Material documents and FI documents from BSIM are merged together.
 1256  * Complications:
 1257  * - A material document can have more than one FI document.
 1258  * - There are FI documents without material documnts
 1259  * - There are material documents without FI documents
 1260  * - The document type is customizeable
 1261  * - There is no link from the materia document position to
 1262  *   the FI document entry in BSIM (except URZEILE, but this
 1263  *   can be filled incorrectly)

 1274  * relevance to the valuated stock. IT156W contains all valuation
 1275  * strings with posting key BSX. XBGBB says: "I am an accrural posting".
 1276  * For more details please ask Big-G.

 1572
 1573    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
 1574      <fs_mseg_lean> TYPE stype_mseg_lean,
 1575      <fs_bseg>      TYPE stype_bseg.
 1576
 1577    DATA:
 1578      ls_accdet   TYPE stype_accdet.
 1579
 1580  * add G/L account data to G_T_MSEG_LEAN
 1581  * (if available - from FI doc item, if not - from current settings)
 1582  * In case of gv_run_mode the account data are alreday read from ACDOCA i
       n form routine fi_belege_lesen
 1583    IF gv_switch_ehp6ru = abap_true AND gv_run_mode <> 'A' .
 1584      SORT g_t_bseg_key BY bukrs belnr gjahr buzei.
 1585      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_bseg_key.
 1586
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    886
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1587  *   save result from database selection into hashed table
 1588      IF NOT g_t_bseg_key[] IS INITIAL.
 1589        SELECT bukrs belnr gjahr buzei hkont FROM bseg
 1590          INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_bseg
 1591          FOR ALL ENTRIES IN g_t_bseg_key
 1592            WHERE bukrs = g_t_bseg_key-bukrs
 1593              AND belnr = g_t_bseg_key-belnr
 1594              AND gjahr = g_t_bseg_key-gjahr
 1595              AND buzei = g_t_bseg_key-buzei
 1596          ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY.
 1597      ENDIF.
 1598
 1599      LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean ASSIGNING <fs_mseg_lean>.
 1600  *     look for the matching FI document item
 1601        READ TABLE g_t_bseg ASSIGNING <fs_bseg>
 1602          WITH KEY bukrs = <fs_mseg_lean>-bukrs
 1603                   belnr = <fs_mseg_lean>-belnr
 1604                   gjahr = <fs_mseg_lean>-gjahr
 1605                   buzei = <fs_mseg_lean>-buzei.
 1606        IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1607  *       enrich table G_T_MSEG_LEAN with the G/L account
 1608          <fs_mseg_lean>-hkont = <fs_bseg>-hkont.
 1609        ELSE.
 1610  *       get G/L account from current account determination settings
 1611          CLEAR ls_accdet.
 1612          MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_mseg_lean> TO ls_accdet.
 1613          PERFORM get_acc_det CHANGING ls_accdet.
 1614          <fs_mseg_lean>-hkont = ls_accdet-hkont.
 1615        ENDIF.
 1616      ENDLOOP.
 1617      FREE: g_t_bseg_key, g_t_bseg.
 1618    ENDIF.
 1619
 1620  * filter documents by G/L account, in case G/L account is restricted
 1621    IF gv_switch_ehp6ru = abap_true AND hkont IS NOT INITIAL.
 1622      DELETE g_t_mseg_lean WHERE hkont NOT IN hkont.
 1623  *   leave program if no records left
 1624      IF g_t_mseg_lean IS INITIAL.
 1625        MESSAGE s289.
 1626        PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 1627      ENDIF.
 1628    ENDIF.
 1629
 1630  ENDFORM.                     "belege_ergaenzen
 1631

 3003  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3004  *&      Form  BESTAENDE_AUSGEBEN
 3005  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3006  *       Ausgabe der Bestände zu 'datum-low' und 'datum-high'           *
 3007  *       und der Zu- und Abgänge in diesem Zeitintervall                *
 3008  *       für den Lagerort-/Chargen- und den Sonderbestand               *
 3009  *       bzw. für den bewerteten Bestand                                *
 3010  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3011
 3012  FORM bestaende_ausgeben.
 3013    ENHANCEMENT-POINT bestaende_ausgeben_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd.
 3014
 3015  *   show the wole list with the ALV
 3016    READ TABLE bestand INDEX 1.
 3017    MOVE-CORRESPONDING bestand TO bestand1.
 3018    APPEND bestand1.
 3019
 3020    CLEAR g_t_belege. REFRESH g_t_belege.
 3021
 3022    IF bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3023  *     fill the data table for the ALV with the              "n921165
 3024  *     corresponding MM documents for mode = stock           "n921165
 3025      PERFORM  fill_data_table                                "n921165
 3026                             TABLES    g_t_belege1            "n921165
 3027                             USING     bestand-matnr          "n921165
 3028                                       bestand-werks          "n921165
 3029                                       bestand-charg.         "n921165
 3030
 3031    ELSEIF NOT bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3032  *     fill the data table for the ALV with the              "n921165
 3033  *     corresponding MM documents for mode = valuated stock  "n921165
 3034      PERFORM  process_plants_of_bwkey                        "n921165
 3035                             TABLES    g_t_belege1            "n921165
 3036                             USING     bestand-matnr          "n921165
 3037                                       bestand-bwkey.         "n921165
 3038    ENDIF.
 3039
 3040    SORT g_t_belege1         BY budat mblnr zeile.
 3041
 3042    events-name = 'TOP_OF_PAGE'.
 3043    events-form = 'UEBERSCHRIFT1'.
 3044    APPEND events.
 3045
 3046  *   set this event depending on the entries in working      "n599218
 3047  *   table BESTAND                                           "n599218
 3048    DESCRIBE TABLE bestand   LINES  g_f_cnt_lines.            "n599218
 3049                                                              "n599218
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    913
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3050    IF  g_f_cnt_lines = 1.                                    "n599218
 3051      events-form  =  'PRINT_END_OF_LIST'.                    "n599218
 3052    ELSE.                                                     "n599218
 3053      events-form = 'LISTE'.                                  "n599218
 3054    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218
 3055
 3056    events-name = 'END_OF_LIST'.
 3057    APPEND events.
 3058
 3059    PERFORM listausgabe1.
 3060
 3061  ENDFORM.                               " BESTAENDE_AUSGEBEN
 3062

 3064  *       FORM ANFORDERUNGSBILD                                          *
 3065  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*

 3067  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3068  FORM anforderungsbild.

 3078  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3079  *&      Form  F4_FOR_VARIANT
 3080  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3081  *       F4-Hilfe für Reportvariante                                    *
 3082  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3083  FORM f4_for_variant.
 3084
 3085    CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_VARIANT_F4'
 3086      EXPORTING
 3087        is_variant = variante
 3088        i_save     = variant_save
 3089  *     it_default_fieldcat =
 3090      IMPORTING
 3091        e_exit     = variant_exit
 3092        es_variant = def_variante
 3093      EXCEPTIONS
 3094        not_found  = 2.
 3095    IF sy-subrc = 2.
 3096      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE 'S' NUMBER sy-msgno
 3097              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
 3098    ELSE.
 3099      IF variant_exit = space.
 3100        p_vari = def_variante-variant.
 3101      ENDIF.
 3102    ENDIF.
 3103
 3104  ENDFORM.                               " F4_FOR_VARIANT

 3420  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3421  *    create_headline                                        "n599218
 3422  *-----------------------------------------------------------"n599218
 3423                                                              "n599218
 3424  FORM create_headline.                                       "n599218
 3425                                                              "n599218
 3426    DATA : l_offset TYPE i,                                   "n599218
 3427           l_strlen TYPE i.                                   "n599218
 3428                                                              "n599218
 3429  * get the length of the title                               "n599218
 3430    COMPUTE  l_strlen          = strlen( sy-title ).          "n599218
 3431                                                              "n599218
 3432    IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.                                     "n599218
 3433  *   stocks only --> small line with 77 bytes                "n599218
 3434      IF      l_strlen   =  59.                               "n599218
 3435        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title.       "n599218
 3436      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  59.                               "n599218
 3437        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_77-title,       "n599218
 3438               '...'          TO  g_s_header_77-title+56(03). "n599218
 3439      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3440        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 59 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3441        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_77-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3442      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3443                                                              "n599218
 3444      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_77-date.   "n599218
 3445    ELSE.                                                     "n599218
 3446  *   stocks and values --> wide line with 91 bytes           "n599218
 3447      IF      l_strlen   =  73.                               "n599218
 3448        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title.       "n599218
 3449      ELSEIF  l_strlen   >  73.                               "n599218
 3450        MOVE : sy-title        TO  g_s_header_91-title,       "n599218
 3451               '...'          TO  g_s_header_91-title+70(03). "n599218
 3452      ELSE.                                                   "n599218
 3453        COMPUTE  l_offset      =  ( 73 - l_strlen ) / 2.      "n599218
 3454        MOVE : sy-title     TO  g_s_header_91-title+l_offset. "n599218
 3455      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
 3456                                                              "n599218
 3457      WRITE : sy-datlo DD/MM/YYYY   TO  g_s_header_91-date.   "n599218
 3458    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218
 3459                                                              "n599218
 3460  * create the end lines, too                                 "n599218
 3461    CONCATENATE  TEXT-062      "End of List                   "n599218
 3462                 ':'           sy-title                       "n599218
 3463                               INTO  g_end_line_77            "n599218
 3464                               SEPARATED BY space.            "n599218
 3465    MOVE : g_end_line_77       TO  g_end_line_91.             "n599218
 3466                                                              "n599218
 3467  ENDFORM.                     "create_headline               "n599218

 3633        MOVE-CORRESPONDING imsfd TO imsfdx.
 3634        COLLECT imsfdx.
 3635      ENDLOOP.
 3636      SORT imsfdx.
 3637    ELSEIF xchar = 'X'.
 3638      LOOP AT imsfd.
 3639        CHECK imsfd-charg IS INITIAL.
 3640        DELETE imsfd.
 3641      ENDLOOP.
 3642    ENDIF.
 3643  ENDFORM.                     "aktuelle_bst_sbbst_f

 3715      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 3716    ENDIF.

 3720      IF  g_flag_authority IS INITIAL.
 3721        DELETE                   xmsid.
 3722      ELSE.
 3723        PERFORM  f9200_collect_plant     USING  xmsid-werks.
 3724        PERFORM  f9400_material_key      USING  xmsid-matnr.
 3725      ENDIF.

 3728    IF  g_f_cnt_lines IS INITIAL.        "no records left ?

 3732    ENDIF.

 3736      COLLECT imsid.

 3762
 3763  FORM fill_data_table
 3764           TABLES    l_t_belege      TYPE  stab_belege
 3765           USING     l_matnr         TYPE  mseg-matnr
 3766                     l_werks         TYPE  mseg-werks
 3767                     l_charg         TYPE  mseg-charg.
 3768
 3769  * define local data fields
 3770    DATA : l_s_belege          TYPE  stype_belege.
 3771
 3772  * sort table with the MM docs only once
 3773    IF  g_flag_sorted  IS INITIAL.
 3774      MOVE  'X'                TO  g_flag_sorted.
 3775      SORT  g_t_mseg_lean      BY  matnr  werks  charg.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    925
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 3776    ENDIF.
 3777
 3778  * read the first matching line depending on the batch
 3779    IF  l_charg IS INITIAL.
 3780      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3781        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3782                 werks = l_werks    BINARY SEARCH.
 3783    ELSE.
 3784      READ  TABLE g_t_mseg_lean     ASSIGNING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>
 3785        WITH KEY matnr = l_matnr
 3786                 werks = l_werks
 3787                 charg = l_charg    BINARY SEARCH.
 3788    ENDIF.
 3789
 3790  * the first entry found ? -> go on
 3791    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 3792
 3793    MOVE  sy-tabix             TO  g_tabix_set.
 3794
 3795  * go on with sequential reading
 3796    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean     INTO  g_s_mseg_lean
 3797      FROM g_tabix_set.
 3798
 3799  *   take this entry when the key fields match
 3800      IF  g_s_mseg_lean-matnr = l_matnr   AND
 3801          g_s_mseg_lean-werks = l_werks.
 3802
 3803  *     cnsider the batches when this report runs in mode
 3804  *     "storage loc/batches" or "special stock"
 3805        IF  bwbst IS INITIAL.
 3806          CHECK : xchar               IS INITIAL       OR
 3807                  g_s_mseg_lean-charg = l_charg.
 3808        ENDIF.
 3809
 3810        MOVE-CORRESPONDING g_s_mseg_lean
 3811                               TO  l_s_belege.
 3812
 3813  *     enrich some fields with color and numeric fields with sign
 3814  *     the negative sign was not set for GI postings         "n944522
 3815        PERFORM  f9500_set_color_and_sign                     "n944522
 3816                         USING  l_s_belege  'L_S_BELEGE'.     "n944522
 3817
 3818        APPEND  l_s_belege     TO  l_t_belege.
 3819      ELSE.
 3820        EXIT.
 3821      ENDIF.
 3822    ENDLOOP.
 3823
 3824  ENDFORM.                    " fill_data_table

 3831           TABLES    l2_t_belege  TYPE  stab_belege

 3837      <l_fs_organ>             TYPE  stype_organ.

 3839
 3840
 3841    IF  curm = '1'.
 3842  *   valuation level is plant / process the MM docs
 3843      PERFORM  fill_data_table TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3844                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3845                                         l2_bwkey             "n921165
 3846                                         space.               "n921165
 3847      EXIT.                    " leave this routine
 3848    ENDIF.
 3849
 3850  * valuation leve = company code : plenty of plants could
 3851  * be assigned to the valuation area, look for the assigned
 3852  * plants and look for the MM doc per plant
 3853

 3857               keyfield = l2_bwkey

 3861    CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.

 3868

 3870          <l_fs_organ>-keyfield  = l2_bwkey.
 3871  *     process the MM docs from this plant
 3872        PERFORM  fill_data_table                              "n921165
 3873                               TABLES    l2_t_belege          "n921165
 3874                               USING     l2_matnr             "n921165
 3875                                         <l_fs_organ>-werks   "n921165
 3876                                         space.               "n921165
 3877      ELSE.
 3878        EXIT.
 3879      ENDIF.
 3880    ENDLOOP.

 3958  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3959  *&      Form  BUILD_BKLAS_SELECTION
 3960  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3961  *       Build internal selection options for Valuation Class
 3962  *       restriction, in case G/L account is restricted
 3963  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3964  *  -->  HKONT       Selection screen options
 3965  *  <--  iBKLAS      Internal selection options
 3966  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 3967  FORM build_bklas_selection
 3968      USING
 3969            et_mbew TYPE stab_mbew.
 3970
 3971    TYPES:
 3972      BEGIN OF lts_valuation_area,
 3973        bwkey TYPE bwkey,
 3974        bukrs TYPE bukrs,
 3975        bwmod TYPE bwmod,
 3976      END OF lts_valuation_area,
 3977
 3978      BEGIN OF lts_account,
 3979        ktopl TYPE t030r-ktopl,
 3980
 3981      bwmod TYPE t030-bwmod,
 3982        bklas TYPE t030-bklas,
 3983
 3984        saknr TYPE t030-konts,
 3985      END OF lts_account,
 3986
 3987      ltt_account TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_account.
 3988
 3989
 3990
 3991    DATA:
 3992      lt_organ       LIKE g_t_organ[].
 3993
 3994
 3995  * table G_T_ORGAN should be already filled in; otherwise settings for al
       l
 3996  * charts of accounts need to be read which is very time consuming
 3997    lt_organ = g_t_organ[].
 3998    SORT lt_organ BY ktopl bwmod.
 3999    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_organ COMPARING ktopl bwmod.
 4000    IF lt_organ IS INITIAL.
 4001      MESSAGE s480.
 4002      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 4003    ENDIF.
 4004
 4005  * read Valuation Areas with Valuation Grouping Code
 4006    DATA:
 4007      lt_valuation_areas TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_valuation_area,
 4008      ls_valuation_area  TYPE lts_valuation_area.
 4009
 4010    SELECT
 4011      valuation_area~bwkey
 4012      valuation_area~bukrs
 4013      valuation_area~bwmod
 4014    FROM
 4015      t001k AS valuation_area
 4016    INTO
 4017      CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_valuation_areas
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    929
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4018    WHERE
 4019      valuation_area~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey.
 4020
 4021
 4022  **********************************************************************
 4023  * Read accounts and account determination rules for specified accounts a
       nd organizations
 4024    DATA:
 4025      lt_rules    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t030r,
 4026      lt_accounts TYPE ltt_account.
 4027
 4028    SELECT
 4029      account~ktopl
 4030
 4031      account~bwmod
 4032      account~bklas
 4033
 4034      account~konts AS saknr
 4035
 4036    FROM
 4037      t030 AS account
 4038    INTO
 4039      CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_accounts
 4040
 4041    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN
 4042      lt_organ
 4043    WHERE
 4044          account~ktopl = lt_organ-ktopl
 4045      AND account~ktosl = 'BSX'
 4046      AND account~komok = ''
 4047      AND account~konts IN hkont.
 4048
 4049
 4050    SELECT *
 4051    FROM
 4052      t030r AS standart_account_rule
 4053    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE
 4054      lt_rules
 4055    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN
 4056      lt_organ
 4057    WHERE
 4058          standart_account_rule~ktopl = lt_organ-ktopl
 4059      AND standart_account_rule~ktosl EQ 'BSX'
 4060    ORDER BY
 4061      PRIMARY KEY.
 4062
 4063
 4064  * determine if rules restrict selection by valuation grouping codes or v
       aluation classes
 4065    DATA:
 4066      lv_bklas_restricted TYPE abap_bool,
 4067      lv_bwmod_restricted TYPE abap_bool.
 4068    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
 4069      <fs_valuation_area>   TYPE lts_valuation_area,
 4070      <fs_selected_account> TYPE lts_account,
 4071      <fs_standart_account_rule> TYPE t030r.
 4072
 4073    READ TABLE lt_rules WITH KEY xbwmo = 'X' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4074    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4075      lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4076    ELSE.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    930
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4077      lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4078    ENDIF.
 4079
 4080    READ TABLE lt_rules WITH KEY xbkla = 'X' TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4081    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4082      lv_bklas_restricted = 'X'.
 4083    ELSE.
 4084      lv_bklas_restricted = ''.
 4085    ENDIF.
 4086
 4087    g_ra_bwkey-sign = 'I'.
 4088    g_ra_bwkey-option = 'EQ'.
 4089
 4090  * if selection is restricted by valuation grouping code(BWMOD) also rest
       rict valuation area selection
 4091    IF lv_bwmod_restricted = abap_true.
 4092      CLEAR g_ra_bwkey-low.
 4093      LOOP AT lt_rules ASSIGNING <fs_standart_account_rule> WHERE XBWMO =
       'X'.
 4094          LOOP AT lt_accounts ASSIGNING <fs_selected_account> WHERE ktopl
       = <fs_standart_account_rule>-ktopl.
 4095            LOOP AT lt_valuation_areas ASSIGNING <fs_valuation_area> WHERE
        bwmod = <fs_selected_account>-bwmod.
 4096              g_ra_bwkey-low = <fs_valuation_area>-bwkey.
 4097              APPEND g_ra_bwkey TO g_ra_bwkey.
 4098          ENDLOOP.
 4099          ENDLOOP.
 4100      ENDLOOP.
 4101    ENDIF.
 4102    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bwkey.
 4103
 4104
 4105    IF lt_accounts IS INITIAL.
 4106      MESSAGE s289.
 4107  *   no data contained in the selection
 4108      PERFORM anforderungsbild.
 4109    ENDIF.
 4110
 4111
 4112  **********************************************************************
 4113
 4114    TYPES: BEGIN OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4115             INCLUDE TYPE stype_mbew.
 4116
 4117    TYPES:   bklas TYPE bklas.
 4118    TYPES: bwmod TYPE bwmod.
 4119    TYPES: END OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4120
 4121    DATA:
 4122          lt_mbew TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF lts_stype_mbew.
 4123
 4124    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MBEW' ''.
 4125    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'T001K' ''.
 4126
 4127    IF ( lt_accounts IS NOT INITIAL ).
 4128
 4129  * if selection is restricted either by valuation grouping code (BWMOD) o
       r by valuation class (BKLAS)
 4130  * use corresponding condition in WHERE clause
 4131      IF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4132        SELECT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    931
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4133          bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4134          bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4135          bewertung~lbkum
 4136          bewertung~salk3
 4137
 4138        FROM mbew AS bewertung
 4139
 4140        JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewert
       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4141
 4142        CONNECTION
 4143          (dbcon)
 4144
 4145        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_mbew
 4146
 4147        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_accounts
 4148
 4149        WHERE bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4150          AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4151          AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4152          AND bewertung~bklas = lt_accounts-bklas
 4153          AND bewertungskreis~bwmod = lt_accounts-bwmod.
 4154
 4155      ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4156      SELECT
 4157        bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4158        bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4159        bewertung~lbkum
 4160        bewertung~salk3
 4161
 4162        FROM mbew AS bewertung
 4163
 4164      JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewertun
       g~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4165
 4166      CONNECTION
 4167        (dbcon)
 4168
 4169        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_mbew
 4170
 4171        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_accounts
 4172
 4173        WHERE bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4174          AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4175          AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4176          AND bewertung~bklas = lt_accounts-bklas.
 4177
 4178      ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = '' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4179        SELECT
 4180          bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4181          bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4182          bewertung~lbkum
 4183          bewertung~salk3
 4184
 4185        FROM mbew AS bewertung
 4186
 4187        JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewert
       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4188
 4189        CONNECTION
 4190          (dbcon)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    932
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4191
 4192        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_mbew
 4193
 4194        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_accounts
 4195
 4196        WHERE bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4197        AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4198        AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4199        AND bewertungskreis~bwmod = lt_accounts-bwmod.
 4200        ELSE.
 4201        SELECT
 4202        bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4203        bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4204        bewertung~lbkum
 4205        bewertung~salk3
 4206
 4207        FROM mbew AS bewertung
 4208
 4209        JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewert
       ung~bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4210
 4211        CONNECTION
 4212          (dbcon)
 4213
 4214        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_mbew
 4215
 4216        WHERE bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4217          AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4218          AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar.
 4219      ENDIF.
 4220    ENDIF.
 4221
 4222  *   special stock sales order
 4223    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'EBEW' ''.
 4224    SELECT
 4225      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4226      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4227      SUM( bewertung~lbkum ) AS lbkum
 4228      SUM( bewertung~salk3 ) AS salk3
 4229    FROM
 4230      ebew AS bewertung
 4231
 4232    JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewertung~
       bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4233
 4234    CONNECTION
 4235      (dbcon)
 4236
 4237    APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE
 4238      lt_mbew
 4239
 4240    WHERE
 4241          bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4242      AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4243      AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4244    GROUP BY
 4245      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4246      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod.
 4247
 4248
 4249  *   special stock projects
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    933
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4250    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'QBEW' ''.
 4251    SELECT
 4252      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4253      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4254      SUM( bewertung~lbkum ) AS lbkum
 4255      SUM( bewertung~salk3 ) AS salk3
 4256    FROM
 4257      qbew AS bewertung
 4258
 4259    JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewertung~
       bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4260
 4261    CONNECTION
 4262      (dbcon)
 4263
 4264    APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE
 4265      lt_mbew
 4266
 4267    WHERE
 4268          bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4269      AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4270      AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4271    GROUP BY
 4272      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4273      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod.
 4274
 4275
 4276  *   special subcontractor stock OBEW
 4277    PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'OBEW' ''.
 4278    SELECT
 4279      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4280      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod
 4281      SUM( bewertung~lbkum ) AS lbkum
 4282      SUM( bewertung~salk3 ) AS salk3
 4283    FROM
 4284      obew AS bewertung
 4285
 4286    JOIN t001k AS bewertungskreis ON ( bewertungskreis~bwkey =  bewertung~
       bwkey ) "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN
 4287
 4288    CONNECTION
 4289      (dbcon)
 4290
 4291    APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE
 4292      lt_mbew
 4293
 4294    WHERE
 4295          bewertung~matnr IN matnr
 4296      AND bewertung~bwkey IN g_ra_bwkey
 4297      AND bewertung~bwtar IN bwtar
 4298    GROUP BY
 4299      bewertung~matnr bewertung~bwkey bewertung~bwtar bewertung~bwtty
 4300      bewertung~bklas bewertungskreis~bwmod.
 4301
 4302
 4303    FIELD-SYMBOLS:
 4304      <fs_full_mbew> TYPE lts_stype_mbew,
 4305      <fs_mbew>      TYPE stype_mbew.
 4306    DATA:
 4307          lv_bklas TYPE t030-bklas,
 4308          lv_bwmod TYPE t030-bwmod.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    934
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4309
 4310  * Restrict selection from QBEW, EBEW, OBEW
 4311    LOOP AT lt_mbew ASSIGNING <fs_full_mbew>.
 4312      IF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4313
 4314        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4315          WITH KEY bklas = <fs_full_mbew>-bklas
 4316                   bwmod = <fs_full_mbew>-bwmod TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4317
 4318    ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = 'X' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = ''.
 4319
 4320        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4321          WITH KEY bklas = <fs_full_mbew>-bklas TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4322
 4323    ELSEIF lv_bklas_restricted = '' AND lv_bwmod_restricted = 'X'.
 4324
 4325        READ TABLE lt_accounts
 4326          WITH KEY bwmod = <fs_full_mbew>-bwmod TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
 4327
 4328      ELSE.
 4329
 4330        LOOP AT lt_accounts TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS
 4331          WHERE bklas = '' AND bwmod = ''.
 4332        ENDLOOP.
 4333      ENDIF.
 4334
 4335      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 4336        CONTINUE.
 4337      ENDIF.
 4338
 4339      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO et_mbew ASSIGNING <fs_mbew>.
 4340      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_full_mbew> TO <fs_mbew>.
 4341    ENDLOOP.
 4342
 4343  ENDFORM.                    " BUILD_BKLAS_SELECTION
 4344

 4346
 4347  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4348  *&      Form  GET_ACC_DET
 4349  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4350  *       Get G/L account from current account determination settings
 4351  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4352  FORM get_acc_det  CHANGING cs_accdet  TYPE stype_accdet.
 4353
 4354    TYPES:
 4355      BEGIN OF ltt_acc,
 4356        bklas LIKE t030-bklas,
 4357        bwmod LIKE t030-bwmod,
 4358        ktopl LIKE t030-ktopl,
 4359        hkont LIKE t030-konts,
 4360      END OF ltt_acc.
 4361
 4362    STATICS:
 4363      lt_acc TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ltt_acc WITH UNIQUE KEY bklas bwmod ktop
       l.
 4364    DATA:
 4365      ls_acc TYPE ltt_acc.
 4366
 4367  * get organizational data
 4368    PERFORM f9300_read_organ
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    935
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4369      USING c_werks cs_accdet-werks.
 4370    CHECK g_s_organ-bukrs = cs_accdet-bukrs.
 4371    cs_accdet-bwkey = g_s_organ-bwkey.
 4372    cs_accdet-ktopl = g_s_organ-ktopl.
 4373    cs_accdet-bwmod = g_s_organ-bwmod.
 4374
 4375  * check for special stock that is valuated in MBEW
 4376    IF ( cs_accdet-sobkz = 'Q' OR cs_accdet-sobkz = 'E' ) AND
 4377       cs_accdet-kzbws = 'A'.
 4378      CLEAR: cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4379    ENDIF.
 4380    IF cs_accdet-sobkz = 'O' AND cs_accdet-xobew IS INITIAL.
 4381      CLEAR: cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4382    ENDIF.
 4383
 4384  * get special stock data
 4385  * (if not filled yet via customer's enhancement of type STYPE_MB5B_ADD)
 4386    CASE cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4387      WHEN 'Q'.
 4388        IF cs_accdet-mat_pspnr IS INITIAL.
 4389          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4390          SELECT SINGLE mat_pspnr FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (dbcon) "n17
       10850
 4391            INTO cs_accdet-mat_pspnr
 4392            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4393              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4394              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4395        ENDIF.
 4396        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4397      WHEN 'E'.
 4398        IF cs_accdet-mat_kdauf IS INITIAL OR cs_accdet-mat_kdpos IS INITIA
       L.
 4399          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4400          SELECT SINGLE mat_kdauf mat_kdpos FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (d
       bcon) "n1710850
 4401            INTO (cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos)
 4402            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4403              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4404              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4405        ENDIF.
 4406        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_pspnr, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4407      WHEN 'O'.
 4408        IF cs_accdet-lifnr IS INITIAL.
 4409          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MSEG' ''.            "n1710850
 4410          SELECT SINGLE lifnr FROM nsdm_v_mseg CONNECTION (dbcon) "n171085
       0
 4411            INTO cs_accdet-lifnr
 4412            WHERE mblnr = cs_accdet-mblnr
 4413              AND mjahr = cs_accdet-mjahr
 4414              AND zeile = cs_accdet-zeile.
 4415        ENDIF.
 4416        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos, cs_accdet-mat_psp
       nr.
 4417      WHEN OTHERS.
 4418        CLEAR: cs_accdet-mat_kdauf, cs_accdet-mat_kdpos,
 4419               cs_accdet-mat_pspnr, cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4420    ENDCASE.
 4421
 4422  * get valuation class
 4423    PERFORM get_bklas CHANGING cs_accdet.
 4424
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    936
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4425  * get G/L account
 4426    READ TABLE lt_acc INTO ls_acc
 4427      WITH TABLE KEY bklas = cs_accdet-bklas
 4428                     bwmod = cs_accdet-bwmod
 4429                     ktopl = cs_accdet-ktopl.
 4430    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4431      cs_accdet-hkont = ls_acc-hkont.
 4432    ELSE.
 4433      CALL FUNCTION 'MR_ACCOUNT_ASSIGNMENT'
 4434        EXPORTING
 4435          bewertungsklasse       = cs_accdet-bklas
 4436          bewertung_modif        = cs_accdet-bwmod
 4437          kontenplan             = cs_accdet-ktopl
 4438          soll_haben_kennzeichen = 'S'
 4439          vorgangsschluessel     = 'BSX'
 4440        IMPORTING
 4441          konto                  = cs_accdet-hkont
 4442        EXCEPTIONS
 4443          OTHERS                 = 5.
 4444      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 4445        CLEAR cs_accdet-hkont.
 4446      ENDIF.
 4447      ls_acc-bklas = cs_accdet-bklas.
 4448      ls_acc-bwmod = cs_accdet-bwmod.
 4449      ls_acc-ktopl = cs_accdet-ktopl.
 4450      ls_acc-hkont = cs_accdet-hkont.
 4451      INSERT ls_acc INTO TABLE lt_acc.
 4452    ENDIF.
 4453
 4454  ENDFORM.                    " GET_ACC_DET
 4455  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4456  *&      Form  GET_BKLAS
 4457  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4458  *      Get valuation class from current settings
 4459  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4460  FORM get_bklas  CHANGING cs_accdet  TYPE stype_accdet.
 4461
 4462    TYPES:
 4463      BEGIN OF ltt_bklas,
 4464        matnr     LIKE mbew-matnr,
 4465        bwkey     LIKE mbew-bwkey,
 4466        bwtar     LIKE mbew-bwtar,
 4467        sobkz     LIKE qbew-sobkz,
 4468        mat_pspnr LIKE qbew-pspnr,
 4469        mat_kdauf LIKE ebew-vbeln,
 4470        mat_kdpos LIKE ebew-posnr,
 4471        lifnr     LIKE obew-lifnr,
 4472        bklas     LIKE mbew-bklas,
 4473      END OF ltt_bklas.
 4474
 4475    STATICS:
 4476      lt_bklas TYPE HASHED TABLE OF ltt_bklas WITH UNIQUE KEY matnr bwkey
 4477        bwtar sobkz mat_pspnr mat_kdauf mat_kdpos lifnr.
 4478    DATA:
 4479      ls_bklas TYPE ltt_bklas.
 4480
 4481    READ TABLE lt_bklas INTO ls_bklas
 4482      WITH TABLE KEY matnr     = cs_accdet-matnr
 4483                     bwkey     = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4484                     bwtar     = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4485                     sobkz     = cs_accdet-sobkz
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    937
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4486                     mat_pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr
 4487                     mat_kdauf = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf
 4488                     mat_kdpos = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos
 4489                     lifnr     = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4490    IF sy-subrc = 0.
 4491      cs_accdet-bklas = ls_bklas-bklas.
 4492    ELSE.
 4493      CASE cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4494        WHEN 'Q'.
 4495          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'QBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4496          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM qbew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4497            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4498            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4499              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4500              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4501              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4502              AND pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr.
 4503        WHEN 'E'.
 4504          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'EBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4505          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM ebew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4506            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4507            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4508              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4509              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4510              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4511              AND vbeln = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf
 4512              AND posnr = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos.
 4513        WHEN 'O'.
 4514          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'OBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4515          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM obew CONNECTION (dbcon)    "n1710850
 4516            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4517            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4518              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4519              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar
 4520              AND sobkz = cs_accdet-sobkz
 4521              AND lifnr = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4522        WHEN OTHERS.
 4523          PERFORM hdb_check_table USING 'MBEW' ''.            "n1710850
 4524          SELECT SINGLE bklas FROM v_mbew_md CONNECTION (dbcon) "n1710850
 4525            INTO cs_accdet-bklas
 4526            WHERE matnr = cs_accdet-matnr
 4527              AND bwkey = cs_accdet-bwkey
 4528              AND bwtar = cs_accdet-bwtar.
 4529      ENDCASE.
 4530      ls_bklas-matnr     = cs_accdet-matnr.
 4531      ls_bklas-bwkey     = cs_accdet-bwkey.
 4532      ls_bklas-bwtar     = cs_accdet-bwtar.
 4533      ls_bklas-sobkz     = cs_accdet-sobkz.
 4534      ls_bklas-mat_pspnr = cs_accdet-mat_pspnr.
 4535      ls_bklas-mat_kdauf = cs_accdet-mat_kdauf.
 4536      ls_bklas-mat_kdpos = cs_accdet-mat_kdpos.
 4537      ls_bklas-lifnr     = cs_accdet-lifnr.
 4538      ls_bklas-bklas     = cs_accdet-bklas.
 4539      INSERT ls_bklas INTO TABLE lt_bklas.
 4540    ENDIF.
 4541
 4542  ENDFORM.                    " GET_BKLAS
 4543
 4544  FORM hdb_check_table  USING                                 "n1710850
 4545                        lv_tab1 TYPE tabname
 4546                        lv_tab2 TYPE tabname.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_01                      Page    938
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 4547
 4548  * clear dbcon, set only at the end if OK
 4549    CLEAR dbcon.
 4550
 4551    IF dbcon_active IS INITIAL.
 4552      RETURN.
 4553    ENDIF.
 4554
 4555    DATA: lt_chk_tab TYPE typ_t_tablename.
 4556
 4557    IF lv_tab1 IS NOT INITIAL.
 4558      APPEND lv_tab1 TO lt_chk_tab.
 4559    ENDIF.
 4560    IF lv_tab2 IS NOT INITIAL.
 4561      APPEND lv_tab2 TO lt_chk_tab.
 4562    ENDIF.
 4563
 4564    CALL FUNCTION c_hdb_dbcon_get
 4565      EXPORTING
 4566        i_subappl  = c_hdb_subappl
 4567  *     I_ACT_CHECK_ONLY       =
 4568        it_req_tab = lt_chk_tab
 4569      IMPORTING
 4570        e_dbcon    = dbcon.
 4571
 4572  ENDFORM.                                                    "n1710850
 4573  * begin of note 2120566                                        "v2120566
 4574  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4575  *&      Form  wesperr_aussortieren
 4576  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4577  *       Delete the non-valuated GR blocked stock for special stock OVW *
 4578  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 4579  FORM wesperr_aussortieren.
 4580
 4581    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      INTO   g_s_mseg_lean
 4582                                WHERE sobkz CA 'OVW'
 4583                                AND   bustm EQ 'ME11'.
 4584      DELETE              g_t_mseg_lean.
 4585    ENDLOOP.
 4586
 4587  ENDFORM.                            "wesperr_aussortieren
 4588  * end of note 2120566                                          "^2120566

  183  * case at least one category is not active                  "n599218
  184    CHECK : NOT g_cnt_empty_parameter IS INITIAL.             "n599218
  185  *                                                           "n599218
  186  * cat. I docs I stock on   I    I stock on I Parameter      "n599218
  187  *      I      I start date I    I end date I                "n599218
  188  * -----+------+------------+----+----------+----------      "n599218
  189  *  1   I yes  I =  zero    I =  I =  zero  I pa_wdzer       "n599218
  190  *  2   I yes  I =  zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdzew       "n599218
  191  *  3   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I =  zero  I pa_wdwiz       "n599218
  192  *  4   I yes  I <> zero    I <> I <> zero  I pa_wdwuw       "n599218

  197    LOG-POINT ID /cwm/enh SUBKEY to_upper( sy-tcode && '\/CWM/APPL_MM_RM07
       MLBD\EHP605_RM07MLBD_FORM_02_01\' && sy-cprog ) FIELDS /cwm/cl_enh_layer
       =>get_field( ).
  198                                                              "n599218
  199  * process table BESTAND                                     "n599218
  200    LOOP AT bestand.                                          "n599218
  201      CLEAR                    l_category.                    "n599218
  202                                                              "n599218
  203  *   determine the category of each entry                    "n599218
  204
  205      IF  bestand-soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  206          bestand-haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  207          bestand-/cwm/soll      IS INITIAL    AND
  208          bestand-/cwm/haben     IS INITIAL    AND
  209          bestand-sollwert  IS INITIAL    AND
  210          bestand-habenwert IS INITIAL.
  211  *     material without movements
  212
  213        IF  bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  214            bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  215            bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  216            bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  217            bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL  AND
  218            bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  219  *       material without movements / no stocks
  220          MOVE  'PA_NDZER'     TO  l_category.
  221        ELSE.
  222  *       material without movements / with stocks
  223          MOVE  'PA_NDSTO'     TO  l_category.
  224        ENDIF.
  225      ELSE.
  226  *     material with movements
  227  *
  228        IF      bestand-anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  229                bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  230                bestand-anfwert   IS INITIAL.
  231  *       stock and value on start date are zero
  232          IF   bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  233               bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  234               bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  235  *         stock and value on end date are zero, too
  236            MOVE  'PA_WDZER'     TO  l_category.
  237          ELSE.
  238  *         stock and value on end date <> zero
  239            MOVE  'PA_WDZEW'     TO  l_category.
  240          ENDIF.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    943
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  241        ELSE.
  242  *       stock and value on start date <> zero
  243          IF     bestand-endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  244                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge  IS INITIAL  AND
  245                 bestand-endwert   IS INITIAL.
  246  *         stock and value on end date are zero
  247            MOVE  'PA_WDWIZ'   TO  l_category.
  248          ELSEIF bestand-endmenge = bestand-anfmenge  AND
  249                 bestand-/cwm/endmenge = bestand-/cwm/anfmenge  AND
  250                 bestand-anfwert  = bestand-endwert.
  251  *         stock and value on end date are equal
  252            MOVE  'PA_WDWEW'   TO  l_category.
  253          ELSE.
  254  *         stock and values on end date are differnt
  255            MOVE  'PA_WDWUW'   TO  l_category.
  256          ENDIF.
  257        ENDIF.
  258      ENDIF.
  259  ENHANCEMENT-POINT ehp605_rm07mlbd_form_02_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
  260
  261  *   evaluate category and corresponding parameter settings  "n599218
  262      CHECK : NOT l_category IS INITIAL.                      "n599218
  263      ASSIGN (l_category)      TO  <l_fs>.                    "n599218
  264                                                              "n599218
  265      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  266        IF  <l_fs> IS INITIAL.                                "n599218
  267          DELETE               bestand.                       "n599218
  268        ENDIF.                                                "n599218
  269      ENDIF.                                                  "n599218
  270    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n599218
  271  ENDFORM.                               " LISTUMFANG

  340  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  341  *    F0000_CREATE_TABLE_G_T_ORGAN
  342  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  343
  344  FORM f0000_create_table_g_t_organ
  345                     USING     l_f_error TYPE stype_organ-keytype.
  346
  347    DATA: l_ra_bukrs TYPE RANGE OF bukrs,                      "3116194
  348          l_bukrs    TYPE bukrs.                               "3116194
  349
  350  * at least on of these 3 range tables must be filled for the creation
  351  * of table g_t_organ
  352  * field  description         range table
  353  * -----  -----------         -----------
  354  * werks  plant               g_0000_ra_plant
  355  * bwkey  valuation area      g_0000_ra_bwkey
  356  * bukrs  company code        g_0000_ra_plant
  357
  358  * table g_t_organ must be empty
  359    CHECK : g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                           "n433765
  360
  361  * START OF CHANGE for note 1049935                         "n1049935
  362  * First check if there was a selection for company code    "n1049935
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    945
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  363  * then do the F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK only for necessary    "n1049935
  364  * selected items..                                         "n1049935
  365
  366  * select all plant from table t001w
  367    SELECT * FROM t001w        WHERE  werks  IN  g_0000_ra_werks.
  368
  369  *   check the valuation area
  370      CHECK : t001w-bwkey IN g_0000_ra_bwkey.
  371
  372  *   read the valuation area
  373      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001k
  374                               WHERE  bwkey  =  t001w-bwkey.
  375
  376      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  377
  378  *   company code is required ?
  379      CHECK : t001k-bukrs IN g_0000_ra_bukrs.
  380
  381      SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001  WHERE  bukrs  =  t001k-bukrs.
  382
  383      CHECK : sy-subrc IS INITIAL.       "entry found ?
  384
  385
  386      PERFORM  f9000_auth_plant_check    USING  t001w-werks.
  387
  388  *   go on if the user has authority for this plant
  389      CHECK : g_flag_authority = 'X'.
  390  * END OF CHANGE for note 1049935                           "n1049935
  391
  392  *   create table g_t_organ_lean
  393      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_s_organ-werks,
  394             t001w-bwkey       TO  g_s_organ-bwkey,
  395             t001-bukrs        TO  g_s_organ-bukrs,
  396             t001-ktopl        TO  g_s_organ-ktopl,
  397             t001k-bwmod       TO  g_s_organ-bwmod,
  398             t001-waers        TO  g_s_organ-waers.
  399
  400  *   write 2 entries for the both search methods _
  401  *   1. with key   valuation area
  402  *   2. with key   plant
  403      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  g_s_organ
  404                               TO  g_t_organ.
  405      MOVE : c_bwkey           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  406             g_s_organ-bwkey   TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  407      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  408
  409      MOVE : c_werks           TO  g_t_organ-keytype,
  410           g_s_organ-werks     TO  g_t_organ-keyfield.
  411      APPEND                   g_t_organ.
  412      CLEAR                    g_s_organ.
  413
  414  *   create the range tables for plants
  415      MOVE : t001w-werks       TO  g_ra_werks-low,
  416             'I'               TO  g_ra_werks-sign,
  417             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_werks-option.
  418      APPEND                   g_ra_werks.
  419
  420  *   create the range tables for plants and valuation areas
  421      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  g_ra_bwkey-low,
  422             'I'               TO  g_ra_bwkey-sign,
  423             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_bwkey-option.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    946
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  424      APPEND                   g_ra_bwkey.
  425
  426  *   create the range table for company codes                "3116194
  427      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO l_ra_bukrs ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_ra_bukr
       s>).
  428      MOVE : t001k-bwkey       TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-low,
  429             'I'               TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-sign,
  430             'EQ'              TO  <fs_ra_bukrs>-option.
  431    ENDSELECT.
  432
  433  * is table g_t_organ empty ?
  434    IF  g_t_organ[] IS INITIAL.                               "n433765
  435  *   no plants for selection found / process error message ?
  436      IF  l_f_error = c_error.
  437        MESSAGE e281.
  438  *     Kein Eintrag zur Selektion Buchungskreis Werk Lagerort vorhanden
  439      ENDIF.
  440    ELSE.
  441      SORT  g_t_organ          BY  keytype  keyfield  bwkey  werks.
  442      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_organ.
  443
  444      SORT                     g_ra_werks.
  445      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_werks.
  446
  447      SORT                     g_ra_bwkey.
  448      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_ra_bwkey.
  449    ENDIF.
  450
  451  ENDFORM.                     "f0000_create_table_g_t_organ

  453  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  454  *    F0300_GET_FIELDS
  455  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  456
  457  FORM f0300_get_fields.
  458
  459    DATA : l_f_type(01)        TYPE c.
  460
  461  * find out the fields of structure g_s_mseg_lean
  462    DESCRIBE FIELD g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_td.
  463
  464    LOOP AT g_t_td-names       INTO  g_s_nameinfo.
  465  *   select all entries who contain 'MSEG-' oder 'MKPF-'
  466      CASE  g_s_nameinfo-name(05).
  467        WHEN  'MKPF-'.
  468          MOVE    c_tilde      TO  g_s_nameinfo-name+4(01).
  469          MOVE    'MSEG'       TO  g_s_nameinfo-name(04).     "2963312
  470          APPEND  g_s_nameinfo-name
  471                               TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  472
  473        WHEN  'MSEG-'.
  474          MOVE  : g_s_nameinfo-name
  475                               TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname,
  476                  c_tilde      TO  g_s_mseg_fields-fieldname+4(01).
  477          APPEND  g_s_mseg_fields        TO  g_t_mseg_fields.
  478
  479        WHEN  OTHERS.
  480      ENDCASE.
  481    ENDLOOP.
  482                                                              "n1784874
  483                                                              "n599218 A
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    947
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  484    IF  g_flag_is_oil_active = 'X'.           "IS-OIL ?       "n599218 A
  485  *   the 2 IS-OIL specific data fields will be inserted into "n599218 A
  486  *   working table G_T_MSEG_FIELDS. Then these fields will   "n599218 A
  487  *   transported from database table MSEG, too               "n599218 A
  488      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLCALC'  TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  489      APPEND  'MSEG~OIGLSKU'   TO  g_t_mseg_fields.           "n599218 A
  490    ENDIF.                                                    "n599218 A
  491                                                              "n1784874
  492
  493  * serious error if table g_t_mseg_field does not contain fields
  494    IF  g_t_mseg_fields[] IS INITIAL.                         "n599218
  495      MESSAGE e895                                     "#EC *    "n599218
  496        WITH 'Error, contact system administrator'.    "#EC *    "n599218
  497    ELSE.
  498      SORT                     g_t_mseg_fields.
  499      DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM  g_t_mseg_fields.
  500    ENDIF.
  501
  502  ENDFORM.                     "f0300_get_fields.

  507
  508  FORM f0500_append_ra_sobkz
  509                     USING     l_f_sobkz LIKE      mseg-sobkz.
  510
  511  * create ranges table with special stock indicator
  512    CLEAR                      g_ra_sobkz.
  513    MOVE : l_f_sobkz           TO  g_ra_sobkz-low,
  514           'I'                 TO  g_ra_sobkz-sign,
  515           'EQ'                TO  g_ra_sobkz-option.

  520  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  521  *    F0600_CREATE_RANGE_LGORT
  522  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
  523
  524  FORM f0600_create_range_lgort.
  525
  526    REFRESH                    g_ra_lgort.
  527    CLEAR                      g_ra_lgort.
  528
  529    IF      lgbst = 'X'.       "only Storage loc./batch stock
  530  *   copy the existing select-options
  531      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  532
  533  *   add an exclusion for storage location = space
  534      MOVE : 'E'               TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  535             'EQ'              TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  536      APPEND                   g_ra_lgort.
  537
  538    ELSEIF  bwbst = 'X'.       "only valuated stocks
  539  *   copy the existing select-options
  540      MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  541
  542    ELSEIF  sbbst = 'X'.       "only special stocks
  543      IF      sobkz  =  'O'  OR
  544              sobkz  =  'V'  OR
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    948
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  545              sobkz  =  'W'.
  546        MOVE lgort[]               TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  547  **     only records with storage location = space allowed
  548  *      MOVE : 'I'             TO  g_ra_lgort-sign,
  549  *             'EQ'            TO  g_ra_lgort-option.
  550  *      APPEND                 g_ra_lgort.
  551      ELSE.
  552  *     Copy the existing select-options
  553        MOVE lgort[]             TO  g_ra_lgort[].
  554      ENDIF.
  555    ENDIF.
  556
  557  ENDFORM.                     "f0600_create_range_lgort

  563  * this flag will be set after the found MM doc items
  564  * contain at least one of these values in indicator
  565  * MSEG-XAUTO
  566  *                                                           "n547170

  568  *     use : 'F', 'L', 'M', and 'W'                          "n547170

  593                                                              "n547170

  595    APPEND                     g_ra_xauto.                    "n547170
  596                                                              "n547170

  598  *   plus these for stock type = valuated stock              "n547170

  911  * selection of material docs in database tables MKPF and MSEG
  912
  913  *--- begin of note 921165 ----------------------------------"n921165
  914  * improve performance of the access database tables MKPF    "n921165
  915  * and MSEG using database specific hints                    "n921165
  916                                                              "n921165
  917    BREAK-POINT                ID mmim_rep_mb5b.              "n921164
  918  * dynamic break-point : before the main SELECT command      "n921164
  919                                                              "n921165
  920    DATA: sql_ex TYPE REF TO cx_sy_open_sql_db.
  921  * read data from cold store also if necessary
  922    DATA(lv_date) = datum-low.
  923    IF lv_date IS INITIAL OR lv_date(4) = '0000'.
  924      lv_date = '00010101'.
  925    ENDIF.
  926    DATA(lv_cold_store_access) = cl_nsdm_matdoc_aging_helper=>is_cold_stor
       e_relevant( lv_date ).
  927    IF lv_cold_store_access = abap_true.
  928      cl_abap_stack_temperature=>set_temperature( lv_date ).
  929    ENDIF.
  930
  931  * get data from MATDOC directly
  932    TRY.                                                      "2963312
  933        SELECT (g_t_mseg_fields)
  934         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE g_t_mseg_lean
  935          FROM matdoc AS mseg
  936           WHERE mseg~matnr      IN  matnr
  937            AND mseg~werks       IN  g_ra_werks
  938            AND mseg~lgort       IN  g_ra_lgort
  939            AND mseg~charg       IN  charg
  940            AND mseg~bwtar       IN  bwtar
  941            AND mseg~bwart       IN  bwart
  942            AND mseg~budat       GE  datum-low
  943            AND mseg~sobkz       IN  g_ra_sobkz
  944            AND record_type      EQ  'MDOC'.
  945
  946      CATCH cx_sy_open_sql_db INTO sql_ex.
  947    ENDTRY.
  948
  949    IF lv_cold_store_access = abap_true.
  950      cl_abap_stack_temperature=>set_hot( ).
  951    ENDIF.
  952
  953  *--- begin of note 1481757 ---------------------------------"n1481757
  954    IF archive = 'X'.                                         "n1481757
  955      IF pa_aistr IS NOT INITIAL.                             "n1481757
  956  * process the MM docs from the new AS archive               "n1481757
  957        "enable read with binary search                       "n1858578
  958        SORT  g_t_mseg_lean BY mblnr mjahr zeile.             "n1858578
  959        PERFORM process_archive_mm_doc.                       "n1481757
  960      ENDIF.                                                  "n1481757
  961    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
  962  *----- end of note 1481757 ---------------------------------"n1481757
  963    IF  g_t_mseg_lean IS INITIAL.
  964  *   no material documents found
  965      MESSAGE                  s842.
  966    ENDIF.
  967
  968    DATA: lt_imchb_tmp LIKE imchb OCCURS 0,                   "838360
  969          ls_imchb     LIKE imchb.                            "838360
  970
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    955
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  971  * check whether the found MM doc items contain retail and
  972  * and beverage specific values
  973  * check authority in this loop - endloop
  974    LOOP AT g_t_mseg_lean      ASSIGNING <g_fs_mseg_lean>.
  975  *   a) check authorisation
  976      PERFORM        f9000_auth_plant_check
  977                               USING  <g_fs_mseg_lean>-werks.
  978
  979      IF  g_flag_authority IS INITIAL.
  980        DELETE                g_t_mseg_lean.
  981        CONTINUE.             "take the next entry
  982      ENDIF.
  983
  984  *   b) look for special indicators
  985      IF  NOT <g_fs_mseg_lean>-xauto IS INITIAL.
  986        IF  <g_fs_mseg_lean>-xauto IN g_ra_xauto.
  987          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_cust_tied_empties.
  988        ENDIF.
  989      ENDIF.
  990  *   838360_v
  991  *   according to note 62272 MCHB may be archived even if the batches
  992  *   are still in use. Therefore we try to find such batches by
  993  *   collecting the batches used in MSEG.
  994      IF NOT xnomchb IS INITIAL AND
  995         NOT <g_fs_mseg_lean>-charg IS INITIAL.
  996        ls_imchb-matnr = <g_fs_mseg_lean>-matnr.
  997        ls_imchb-werks = <g_fs_mseg_lean>-werks.
  998        ls_imchb-lgort = <g_fs_mseg_lean>-lgort.
  999        ls_imchb-charg = <g_fs_mseg_lean>-charg.
 1000        APPEND ls_imchb TO lt_imchb_tmp.
 1001      ENDIF.
 1002  *   838360_^
 1003  * for active ingredient materials MB5B should not display  "n1265674
 1004  * the 141 and 142 movements for the selection valuated     "n1265674
 1005  * stock to avoid wrong beginning stock amount.             "n1265674
 1006      IF bwbst = 'X' AND <g_fs_mseg_lean>-bustw = 'MB08'.     "n1265674
 1007        DELETE                 g_t_mseg_lean.                 "n1265674
 1008        CONTINUE.              "take the next entry          "n1265674
 1009      ENDIF.                                                  "n1265674
 1010      IF bwbst = 'X' AND <g_fs_mseg_lean>-wertu = abap_false. "n3164181
 1011        DELETE                 g_t_mseg_lean.                 "n3164181
 1012        CONTINUE.              "take the next entry           "n3164181
 1013      ENDIF.                                                  "n3164181
 1014  *   Remove KZVBR for XAUTO & SOBKZ _                                 "28
       92462
 1015      IF <g_fs_mseg_lean>-kzvbr = 'E' AND <g_fs_mseg_lean>-sobkz IS INITIA
       L AND
 1016         <g_fs_mseg_lean>-xauto = abap_true.
 1017        CLEAR: <g_fs_mseg_lean>-kzvbr.
 1018      ENDIF.
 1019    ENDLOOP.
 1020
 1021  * 838360_v
 1022    IF NOT lt_imchb_tmp[] IS INITIAL.
