 1278  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1279  *    F1100_CHECK_LGORT_SOKZG
 1280  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1281
 1282  FORM f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.
 1283    CLEAR                      g_flag_delete.
 1284  *   c) additional checks if valuated stock is required
 1285    IF  bwbst = 'X'.
 1286  *     check fields sobkz and kzwbs for valuated stocks
 1287      IF      g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  c_space  OR
 1288              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'O'      OR
 1289              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'V'      OR
 1290              g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz  =  'W'.                    "n435403
 1291  *       OK : special stock indicator = ' ', 'O', 'W' or 'V'
 1292      ELSEIF  g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'A'  OR
 1293              g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws = 'M'.
 1294  *       ok : document with valuated special stock
 1295      ELSE.
 1296        MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1297      ENDIF.
 1298
 1299      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1300  * GA1551829
 1301  *     A&D subcontracting valuated stock = 'F' or 'R'
 1302      IF g_flag_delete IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1303         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1304           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1305        IF g_s_mseg_lean-kzbws IS NOT INITIAL.
 1306          CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1307        ELSE.
 1308  *         before note 1592894, automatic 541 line has empty KZBWS
 1309          CALL FUNCTION 'GET_BUSTR_FROM_MOVEMENT_TYPE'
 1310            EXPORTING
 1311              bwart    = g_s_mseg_lean-bwart
 1312            IMPORTING
 1313              bustr    = gv_bustr_tp
 1314            EXCEPTIONS
 1315              no_entry = 1
 1316              OTHERS   = 2.
 1317          IF gv_bustr_tp EQ cl_adsub_constants=>bustr_tp.
 1318            CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1319          ENDIF.
 1320        ENDIF.
 1321      ENDIF.
 1322      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1323
 1324  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_01 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1325
 1326    ELSE.
 1327  *   b) check the combination of special stock indicator and
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    961
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1328  *      storage location
 1329      IF       g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'O'  OR
 1330               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'V'  OR
 1331               g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'W'.
 1332        "do nothing allow entries with a storage location
 1333      ELSEIF   g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = 'T'.               "SIT
 1334  *     these entries must not have a storage location
 1335        IF  NOT g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1336          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1337        ENDIF.
 1338      ELSE.
 1339  *     the others entries should have a storage location
 1340        IF  g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL.
 1341          MOVE  'X'            TO  g_flag_delete.
 1342        ENDIF.
 1343      ENDIF.
 1344
 1345      "{ Begin ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1346  * GA1551829
 1347  * A&D subcontracting stock: 'C', 'F', 'I', 'J' or 'R'
 1348  * these entries must not have a storage location
 1349      IF g_s_mseg_lean-lgort IS INITIAL AND
 1350         g_flag_delete       IS NOT INITIAL AND
 1351         ( g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>c OR
 1352           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>f OR
 1353           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>i OR
 1354           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>j OR
 1355           g_s_mseg_lean-sobkz = cl_adsub_constants=>r ).
 1356        CLEAR g_flag_delete.
 1357      ENDIF.
 1358      "{ End ENHO DIPCS_RM07MLBD_FORM_02 IS-AD-SSP AD_SUB }
 1359
 1360  ENHANCEMENT-POINT f1100_check_lgort_sokzg_02 SPOTS es_rm07mlbd .
 1361
 1362    ENDIF.
 1363
 1364  ENDFORM.                     "f1100_check_lgort_sokzg.

 1390
 1391  FORM f2200_read_t001
 1392                     USING     l_f_werks LIKE t001w-werks.
 1393
 1394    STATICS : BEGIN OF l_s_t001w,                             "n999530
 1395                werks TYPE  t001w-werks,                      "n999530
 1396                name1 TYPE  t001w-name1,                      "n999530
 1397              END OF l_s_t001w.                               "n999530
 1398
 1399  * read name of this plant after the plant has changed       "n999530
 1400    IF  l_f_werks <> l_s_t001w-werks.                         "n999530
 1401      SELECT SINGLE werks name1                               "n999530
 1402        FROM t001w                                            "n999530
 1403          INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF l_s_t001w              "n999530
 1404            WHERE werks = l_f_werks.                          "n1574925
 1405
 1406      IF NOT sy-subrc IS INITIAL.                             "n999530
 1407        CLEAR                  l_s_t001w.                     "n999530
 1408        MOVE  l_f_werks        TO  l_s_t001w-werks.           "n999530
 1409      ENDIF.                                                  "n999530
 1410    ENDIF.                                                    "n999530
 1411
 1412    MOVE  l_s_t001w-name1      TO  t001w-name1.               "n999530
 1413
 1414  ENDFORM.                     "f2200_read_t001

 1416  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1417  *    F9000_AUTH_PLANT_CHECK
 1418  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1419
 1420  FORM f9000_auth_plant_check
 1421                     USING     l_f_werks LIKE marc-werks.
 1422
 1423    CLEAR                      g_flag_authority.
 1424    ADD  1                     TO  g_f_cnt_before.
 1425
 1426    READ TABLE g_t_auth_plant  WITH KEY
 1427                               werks = l_f_werks BINARY SEARCH.
 1428
 1429    IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1430  *   plant found in buffer; take the result from the buffer
 1431      MOVE  g_t_auth_plant-ok            TO  g_flag_authority.
 1432    ELSE.
 1433  *   new plant / do the authority check / save result in buffer table
 1434      AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'M_MSEG_WMB'
 1435                      ID 'ACTVT' FIELD actvt03
 1436                      ID 'WERKS' FIELD  l_f_werks.
 1437
 1438      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1439        MOVE : 'X'             TO  g_t_auth_plant-ok,
 1440               'X'             TO  g_flag_authority.
 1441      ELSE.
 1442        CLEAR : g_t_auth_plant-ok, g_flag_authority.
 1443      ENDIF.
 1444
 1445      MOVE  l_f_werks          TO  g_t_auth_plant-werks.
 1446      APPEND                   g_t_auth_plant.
 1447      SORT                     g_t_auth_plant.
 1448    ENDIF.

 1463      WHEN  g_f_cnt_before.
 1464  *     user has authority for all plants in G_RA_WERKS

 1472        MESSAGE s124.   "Wegen fehlender Berechtigung ist ...
 1473    ENDCASE.

 1497  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1498  *    F9300_READ_ORGAN
 1499  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1500
 1501  FORM f9300_read_organ
 1502                     USING     l_f_keytype   LIKE g_s_organ-keytype
 1503                               l_f_keyfield  LIKE g_s_organ-keyfield.
 1504
 1505  * buffer
 1506    STATICS : l_s_old      TYPE      stype_organ,
 1507              l_9300_subrc LIKE      sy-subrc.
 1508
 1509    IF  l_f_keytype   =  l_s_old-keytype  AND
 1510        l_f_keyfield  =  l_s_old-keyfield.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    964
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1511  *   the same key : take the data from the buffer
 1512      MOVE-CORRESPONDING  l_s_old        TO  g_s_organ.
 1513      MOVE  l_9300_subrc                 TO  sy-subrc.
 1514    ELSE.
 1515  *   the key has changed : read in table g_t_organ
 1516      READ TABLE g_t_organ     WITH KEY
 1517                               keytype   =  l_f_keytype
 1518                               keyfield  =  l_f_keyfield
 1519                               BINARY SEARCH.
 1520
 1521      IF  sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 1522  *     entry found
 1523        MOVE-CORRESPONDING : g_t_organ   TO  g_s_organ,
 1524                             g_t_organ   TO  l_s_old.
 1525        CLEAR                            l_9300_subrc.
 1526      ELSE.
 1527  *     entry not found / fill the buffer
 1528        CLEAR : l_s_old,       g_s_organ.
 1529        MOVE  : sy-subrc       TO  l_9300_subrc,
 1530                l_f_keytype    TO  l_s_old-keytype,
 1531                l_f_keyfield   TO  l_s_old-keyfield.
 1532      ENDIF.
 1533    ENDIF.
 1534
 1535  ENDFORM.                     "f9300_read_organ

 1550  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1551  *    f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1552  *----------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1553
 1554  FORM f9500_set_color_and_sign
 1555           USING  l_s_belege   TYPE  stype_belege
 1556                  l_f_tabname  TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1557
 1558    DATA : l_f_fieldname       TYPE  stype_fields-fieldname.
 1559    FIELD-SYMBOLS : <l_fs_field>.
 1560
 1561  * clear the table with the color information
 1562    REFRESH color. CLEAR color.
 1563
 1564    LOOP AT g_t_color_fields.
 1565      CONCATENATE  l_f_tabname
 1566                   '-'
 1567                   g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1568                               INTO l_f_fieldname.
 1569      ASSIGN (l_f_fieldname)   TO  <l_fs_field>.
 1570
 1571      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    965
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1572
 1573      MOVE : g_t_color_fields-fieldname
 1574                               TO  color-fieldname,
 1575             0                 TO  color-color-int.
 1576
 1577  *   the color and the sign of this numeric field depend on the
 1578  *   debit/credit-indicator
 1579      CASE    l_s_belege-shkzg.
 1580        WHEN  'H'.
 1581          color-color-col = '6'.         "red
 1582          APPEND color.
 1583
 1584          IF  g_t_color_fields-type  <>  'C'.
 1585            COMPUTE : <l_fs_field> = <l_fs_field> * -1.
 1586          ENDIF.
 1587
 1588        WHEN  'S'.
 1589          color-color-col = '5'.         "green
 1590          APPEND color.
 1591      ENDCASE.
 1592    ENDLOOP.
 1593
 1594  * customizing : set the color information
 1595    IF  g_cust_color  = 'X'.
 1596  *   default : colorize the numeric fields
 1597      MOVE  color[]            TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_feld.
 1598    ELSE.
 1599  *   the performant way : colorize the line on when GI
 1600      IF  l_s_belege-shkzg = 'H'.
 1601        MOVE  'C21'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "grey
 1602      ELSE.
 1603        MOVE  'C20'  TO  l_s_belege-farbe_pro_zeile. "light grey
 1604      ENDIF.
 1605    ENDIF.
 1606
 1607  ENDFORM.                     "f9500_set_color_and_sign

 1770           WHERE  werks IN werks.                             "n486477
 1771                                                              "n486477

 1785             AND  bukrs  IN bukrs.                            "n486477
 1786                                                              "n486477

 1790      ELSE.                                                   "n486477

 1792        MESSAGE  e283          WITH   g_s_t001w-werks.        "n486477
 1793      ENDIF.                                                  "n486477

 1795                                                              "n486477

 1847  * show the current activity and the progress                "n1481757
 1848    CALL FUNCTION 'SAPGUI_PROGRESS_INDICATOR'                 "n1481757
 1849      EXPORTING                                               "n1481757
 1850        text = TEXT-136.       "reading archive info records  "n1481757
 1851                                                              "n1481757
 1852    PERFORM  call_as_api_read_block_keys                      "n1481757
 1853                   TABLES    g_t_frange[]                     "n1481757
 1854                             g_t_as_key[].                    "n1481757
 1855                                                              "n1481757
 1856  * eliminate duplicates                                      "n1481757
 1857    SORT  g_t_as_key           BY  mblnr mjahr.               "n1481757
 1858    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM g_t_as_key                "n1481757
 1859                          COMPARING mblnr mjahr.              "n1481757
 1860                                                              "n1481757
 1861  * show the current activity and the progress                "n1481757
 1862    CALL FUNCTION 'SAPGUI_PROGRESS_INDICATOR'                 "n1481757
 1863      EXPORTING                                               "n1481757
 1864        text = TEXT-135.       "Reading MM docs in archive    "n1481757
 1865                                                              "n1481757
 1866  * get the full data of the MM documents from the AS archiv  "n1481757

 1868                                                              "n1481757
 1869      REFRESH : xmkpf, xmseg.                                 "n1481757
 1870                                                              "n1481757
 1871      CALL FUNCTION 'ASH_MM_MATBEL_READ'                      "n1481757
 1872        EXPORTING                                             "n1481757
 1873          i_archivekey           = g_s_as_key-archivekey       "n1481757
 1874          i_offset               = g_s_as_key-archiveofs       "n1481757
 1875        TABLES                                                "n1481757
 1876          et_mkpf                = xmkpf                       "n1481757
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    970
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1877          et_mseg                = xmseg                       "n1481757
 1878        EXCEPTIONS                                            "n1481757
 1879          not_in_infostructure   = 1                          "n1481757
 1880          not_in_archive         = 2                          "n1481757
 1881          no_instructure_defined = 3                          "n1481757
 1882          OTHERS                 = 4.                         "n1481757
 1883                                                              "n1481757
 1884      CASE  sy-subrc.                                         "n1481757
 1885        WHEN  0.               " MM document found            "n1481757
 1886                                                              "n1481757
 1887        WHEN  1 OR 2.                                         "n1481757
 1888  *       this message will never be send here, it is only    "n1481757
 1889  *       here for the where-use list of the messages         "n1481757
 1890  *       using transcation SE91                              "n1481757
 1891          IF 'A' = 'B'.                                       "n1481757
 1892  *         BA 109 : No data object found for key &           "n1481757
 1893            MESSAGE e109(ba)   WITH  space.                   "n1481757
 1894          ENDIF.                                              "n1481757
 1895                                                              "n1481757

 1897          MOVE : 'BA'          TO  archive_messages-msgid,    "n1481757
 1898                 '109'         TO  archive_messages-msgno.    "n1481757

 1901          offset = g_s_as_key-archiveofs.
 1902                                                              "n1481757

 1904                      g_s_as_key-mjahr                        "n1481757
 1905                      g_s_as_key-archivekey                   "n1481757
 1906                               INTO  archive_messages-msgv1   "n1481757
 1907                               SEPARATED BY space.            "n1481757
 1908          APPEND               archive_messages.              "n1481757
 1909          CONTINUE.            " take the next entry          "n1481757
 1910                                                              "n1481757
 1911        WHEN OTHERS.                                          "n1481757
 1912          MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno   "n1481757
 1913            WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.         "n1481757
 1914      ENDCASE.                                                "n1481757
 1915                                                              "n1481757
 1916  *   process table with MM doc header                        "n1481757
 1917      LOOP AT xmkpf.                                          "n1481757
 1918  *      CHECK: xmkpf-budat IN datum.                         "n2110304
 1919  **     process the corresponding items                      "n1481757
 1920        LOOP AT xmseg                                         "n1481757
 1921          WHERE  mblnr = xmkpf-mblnr                          "n1481757
 1922            AND  mjahr = xmkpf-mjahr.                         "n1481757
 1923          CHECK: xmseg-bwart IN bwart.                        "n1481757
 1924          CHECK: xmseg-charg IN charg.                        "n1481757
 1925          CHECK: xmseg-lgort IN lgort.                        "n1481757
 1926          CHECK: xmseg-matnr IN matnr.                        "n1481757
 1927          IF bwbst IS INITIAL.                                "n1995040
 1928            CHECK: xmseg-sobkz = sobkz.                       "n1481757
 1929          ENDIF.                                              "n1995040
 1930          CHECK: xmseg-bukrs IN bukrs.                        "n1481757
 1931          CHECK: xmseg-bwart IN bwart.                        "n1481757
 1932
 1933          wa_hashtable-mblnr = xmseg-mblnr.                   "n1481757
 1934          wa_hashtable-mjahr = xmseg-mjahr.                   "n1481757
 1935                                                              "n1481757
 1936          INSERT wa_hashtable INTO TABLE ht_mmdocs_arch.      "n1481757
 1937                                                              "n1481757
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    971
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 1938          PERFORM add_aridx_doc_to_g_t_mseg_lean.             "n1481757
 1939                                                              "n1481757
 1940        ENDLOOP.                                              "n1481757
 1941      ENDLOOP.                                                "n1481757
 1942    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n1481757
 1943                                                              "n1481757
 1944                                                              "n1481757
 1945  ENDFORM.                    " PROCESS_ARCHIVE_MM_DOC
 1946  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1947  *&      Form  ADD_ARIDX_DOC_TO_G_T_MSEG_LEAN
 1948  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 1949  FORM add_aridx_doc_to_g_t_mseg_lean .
 1950  * Eliminate dublettes from the archive and tranfer data       "n1481757
 1951  * into working ITAB                                           "n1481757
 1952    READ TABLE g_t_mseg_lean   INTO g_s_mseg_lean             "n1481757
 1953                               WITH KEY mblnr = xmseg-mblnr   "n1481757
 1954                               mjahr = xmseg-mjahr            "n1481757
 1955                               zeile = xmseg-zeile            "n1481757
 1956                               BINARY SEARCH.                 "n1481757
 1957                                                              "n1481757
 1958    CASE  sy-subrc.                                           "n1481757
 1959      WHEN  0.                                                "n1481757
 1960  *       MM doc is available from database -> ignore it        "n1481757
 1961                                                              "n1481757
 1962      WHEN  4.                                                "n1481757
 1963  *       MM doc not found -> insert entry                      "n1481757
 1964        MOVE  sy-tabix       TO  g_f_tabix.                   "n1481757
 1965        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1966          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1967          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1968                                                              "n1481757
 1969        INSERT g_s_mseg_lean INTO g_t_mseg_lean INDEX  g_f_tabix. "n148175
       7
 1970        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1971                                                              "n1481757
 1972      WHEN  8.                                                "n1481757
 1973  *       MM doc not found / key to high -> append entry        "n1481757
 1974        MOVE-CORRESPONDING :                                  "n1481757
 1975          xmkpf TO g_s_mseg_lean,                             "n1481757
 1976          xmseg TO g_s_mseg_lean.                             "n1481757
 1977                                                              "n1481757
 1978        APPEND g_s_mseg_lean TO g_t_mseg_lean.                "n1481757
 1979        CLEAR g_s_mseg_lean .                                 "n1481757
 1980                                                              "n1481757
 1981    ENDCASE.                                                  "n1481757
 1982                                                              "n1481757
 1983                                                              "n1481757
 1984  ENDFORM.                    " ADD_ARIDX_DOC_TO_G_T_MSEG_LEAN

 2059  * clear working areas                                       "n1481757

 2219    CLEAR   : g_f_afcat.                                      "n1481757

 2221                                                              "n1481757
 2222  *   look for active archive info structures from the        "n1481757
 2223  *   customizing tables aind_str1 and aind_str2              "n1481757
 2224    SELECT aind_str1~archindex                  "#EC CI_BYPASS  "n1511550
 2225         aind_str1~itype                                      "n1481757
 2226         aind_str1~skey                                       "n1481757
 2227    INTO TABLE g_t_aind_str1_ais                              "n1481757
 2228      FROM aind_str1 JOIN aind_str2           "#EC CI_BUFFJOIN  "n1511550
 2229      ON aind_str1~archindex = aind_str2~archindex            "n1481757
 2230           WHERE itype  = 'I'                                 "n1481757
 2231             AND aind_str1~archindex = pa_aistr               "n1481757
 2232             AND object = 'MM_MATBEL'                         "n1481757
 2233             AND active = 'X'.                                "n1481757
 2234  * there must be one entry                                   "n1481757
 2235    IF sy-dbcnt <> 1.                                         "n1481757
 2236      SET CURSOR               FIELD 'PA_AISTR'.              "n1481757
 2237  *   Enter a suitable info structure                         "n1481757
 2238      MESSAGE e509(q6)         WITH pa_aistr.                 "n1481757
 2239    ENDIF.                                                    "n1481757
 2240                                                              "n1481757

 2247  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*

 2249  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2250  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or                                 "n1481757
 2251              USING    uht_mmdocs_arch
 2252              CHANGING ct_mseg_key TYPE stab_mseg_xauto
 2253                       ct_mseg_or TYPE stab_mseg_xauto.
 2254    " c_ra_xauto.
 2255
 2256    DATA: lt_mseg_key       TYPE stab_mseg_xauto,
 2257          lt_mseg_key_group LIKE lt_mseg_key.
 2258
 2259    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_group,
 2260             mblnr LIKE mkpf-mblnr,
 2261             mjahr LIKE mkpf-mjahr,
 2262           END OF ts_group.
 2263
 2264    DATA: ls_group_new TYPE ts_group,
 2265          ls_group_old TYPE ts_group.
 2266
 2267  *data: lt_ra_xauto like gt_ra_xauto.
 2268
 2269    FIELD-SYMBOLS  <ls_mseg_key> LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key.
 2270
 2271  *-----------------------------------------------------------------------
       *
 2272
 2273    MOVE ct_mseg_key[] TO lt_mseg_key[].
 2274    REFRESH ct_mseg_key.
 2275
 2276  *APPEND c_ra_xauto to lt_ra_xauto.
 2277
 2278    SORT lt_mseg_key BY mblnr mjahr zeile.
 2279
 2280    LOOP AT lt_mseg_key ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_key>.
 2281      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_key> TO ls_group_new.
 2282
 2283      IF ls_group_new <> ls_group_old.
 2284        PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2285  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2286                CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group
 2287                          lt_mseg_key
 2288                          ct_mseg_or.
 2289
 2290        MOVE ls_group_new TO ls_group_old.
 2291        REFRESH lt_mseg_key_group.
 2292      ENDIF.
 2293
 2294      APPEND <ls_mseg_key>  TO lt_mseg_key_group.
 2295
 2296    ENDLOOP.
 2297
 2298    PERFORM  fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group
 2299  *            using     lt_ra_xauto
 2300               CHANGING  lt_mseg_key_group

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2301                         lt_mseg_key
 2302                         ct_mseg_or.
 2303  ENDFORM.                    " FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR         "n1481757
 2304  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2305  *&      Form  FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR_GROUP
 2306  *&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
 2307  FORM fill_table_g_t_mseg_or_group                           "n1481757
 2308  *            using    ut_ra_xauto       like gt_ra_xauto
 2309              CHANGING ct_mseg_key_group TYPE stab_mseg_xauto

 2312

 2314    DATA: ls_mseg_key_group LIKE LINE OF ct_mseg_key_group,
 2315          ls_mseg_or        LIKE LINE OF  ct_mseg_or.

 2319             INCLUDE STRUCTURE   mseg.
 2320    DATA : END OF lt_mseg_archiv.

 2325

 2327        INDEX 1.
 2328

 2330      RETURN.
 2331    ENDIF.
 2332
 2333    READ TABLE  ht_mmdocs_arch INTO wa_hashtable
 2334       WITH TABLE KEY mblnr = ls_mseg_key_group-mblnr
 2335                      mjahr = ls_mseg_key_group-mjahr.

 2337  * check if there are mm docs from the archive
 2338
 2339    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2340      APPEND LINES OF ct_mseg_key_group TO g_t_mseg_key_te.
 2341      RETURN.
 2342    ENDIF.
 2343
 2344    CALL FUNCTION 'ASH_MM_MATBEL_READ'
 2345      EXPORTING
 2346        i_archivekey   = wa_hashtable-archivekey
 2347        i_offset       = wa_hashtable-offset
 2348      TABLES
 2349        et_mseg        = lt_mseg_archiv
 2350      EXCEPTIONS
 2351        not_in_archive = 1
 2352        OTHERS         = 2.
 2353    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
 2354      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
 2355              WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
 2356    ENDIF.
 2357
 2358    LOOP AT lt_mseg_archiv ASSIGNING <ls_mseg_archiv>.
 2359
 2360      READ TABLE ct_mseg_key_group INTO ls_mseg_key_group
 2361        WITH KEY mblnr = <ls_mseg_archiv>-mblnr
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLBD_FORM_02                      Page    978
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 2362                 mjahr = <ls_mseg_archiv>-mjahr
 2363                 zeile = <ls_mseg_archiv>-zeile BINARY SEARCH.
 2364
 2365      CHECK sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
 2366  *  delete ct_mseg_key_group.
 2367
 2368      IF ls_mseg_key_group-xauto IN g_ra_xauto.
 2369        MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_mseg_archiv> TO ls_mseg_or.
 2370        APPEND ls_mseg_or TO ct_mseg_or.
 2371      ENDIF.
 2372
 2373      IF ct_mseg_key_group IS INITIAL.
 2374        EXIT.
 2375      ENDIF.
 2376
 2377    ENDLOOP.                                                  "n1481757
 2378  ENDFORM.             " FILL_TABLE_G_T_MSEG_OR_GROUP          "n1481757
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
21.07.26 DEV      Include RM07MLDD                              Page    979
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
